name: Eric Swalwell
subject: This wouldn't be possible without you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Team —

As we step into the year 2024, I wanted to personally express my gratitude for your unwavering support throughout 2023.

Last year had its fair share of triumphs and challenges, but with supporters like you, we were able to navigate through and conclude the year with renewed vigor, highlighting the strength of our grassroots movement.

But if there's one lesson I've learned from my tenure in Congress, it's that our commitment to accountability and integrity will always be met with opposition from the GOP. They are well aware that I will persist in exposing their hypocrisy and falsehoods. As we approach the anniversary of one of the most significant threats to our democracy, your support is more critical than ever.

2024 is poised to be one of the most pivotal years for our democracy. But knowing that you have my back, friend, I know we'll be ready for anything that comes our way.

Happy New Year! Thank you for your unwavering support.

— Eric

| | Happy New Year! To kick off 2024, I want to thank you for the overwhelming support.

Whether it’s your everyday advocacy for this campaign, or grassroots donations, I'm beyond grateful. We **absolutely crushed our $30,000 fundraising goal** before the New Year's Eve deadline, **and it's all thanks to you!**

We are starting off the year strong, and that means we are getting closer to **ensuring Congressman Scott Perry not only loses his seat, but also can no longer keep trying to take away your rights!**

The **road to flip the House blue starts right here in PA-10** , and I'm galvanized by having you on my team! Every single dollar of your donations supports this campaign, as the hope of all of us disillusioned by Perry's extremism gains momentum, and the odds being in our favor come November are surging as well!

Thank you for your support,

Janelle

**TODAY'S HEADLINE**
---
The rape investigation into suspended Florida GOP Chairman Christian Ziegler took a darker turn Tuesday as more search warrant documents showing that Florida authorities are seeking a search warrant for Ziegler's META accounts became available to the public. Florida authorities believe Ziegler committed the crime of Video Voyeurism. META owns Facebook and Instagram. Ziegler has locked his Instagram account. However, Ziegler's Facebook account is filled with pro-DeSantis posts. The alleged rape victim disclosed to authorities that she had a threesome with Ziegler and his wife, Bridget Ziegler, before Christian's alleged rape. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has called on Ziegler to resign as Florida GOP's Chairman. However, there is growing outrage that DeSantis has not fired Bridget Ziegler from the Reedy Creek Board or the Sarasota School Board. DeSantis has spent most of his time in Iowa since the Ziegler scandal broke.

clean_body: | | | | Loomer Unleashed Newsletter | | | | | "Tripster Travels" | | | | | | TODAY'S HEADLINE The rape investigation into suspended Florida GOP Chairman Christian Ziegler took a darker turn Tuesday as more search warrant documents showing that Florida authorities are seeking a search warrant for Ziegler's META accounts became available to the public. Florida authorities believe Ziegler committed the crime of Video Voyeurism. META owns Facebook and Instagram. Ziegler has locked his Instagram account. However, Ziegler's Facebook account is filled with pro-DeSantis posts. The alleged rape victim disclosed to authorities that she had a threesome with Ziegler and his wife, Bridget Ziegler, before Christian's alleged rape. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has called on Ziegler to resign as Florida GOP's Chairman. However, there is growing outrage that DeSantis has not fired Bridget Ziegler from the Reedy Creek Board or the Sarasota School Board. DeSantis has spent most of his time in Iowa since the Ziegler scandal broke. | | | | | | | | | | Previous Article RFK JR'S Candidacy is Designed to Create a Contingent Election | | | | | "Trump Shirt" Previous Article The Japanese Secret for Joint Pain | | | | | Follow Laura Loomer on Social Media |

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: An honest update on this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I need your help [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends, I've run a lot of tough races in my life, but this race is certain to be my toughest yet. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
CNN says I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot. Politico says Ohio could decide Senate control. A Trump-allied dark money group is already running attack ads against me. And now, my wealthy GOP opponents are holding country club fundraisers and writing their campaigns multimillion dollar checks to try and buy this seat.
Without critical grassroots support from folks like you, I simply cannot fight back and compete. That's why I've set an ambitious $100,000 mid-month fundraising goal and have to ask you to split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's to help me get there. Please, will you donate now? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?refcode=jtk4225-bu-text&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250]
Friends, I'm fighting everyday in the Senate for the Dignity of Work – all work. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or work for tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I'm fighting for you.
Meanwhile, my millionaire GOP opponents have spent their lives profiting off of a system that too often puts the bottom line over the actual needs of workers and their families. That's not what Ohioans, or Americans, deserve.
I know we can defend this seat and keep making meaningful progress together – so please, friend : Will you split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's before the crucial mid-month deadline tonight at midnight? Every dollar goes a long way toward winning in Ohio and keeping the Senate blue. [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?refcode=jtk4225-bu-text&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
I can't thank you enough for your support.
Sherrod

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Your response to this will decide everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2ce772c49f144a7599282c2c9712400b&_e=gk3bapq1_sF5MzjI7MFWqroEih6rqiPrwCAFFTeXimbNL6dBTxfafK0uS3P4kerTp4aftUVUUMmehfO07OjJBpm4FYvYyaCT6MOfQbLBIEaThwtcUBccseYTxffZ8q7WxtJJISMrKrSL5r1kxyFce4R6h8luGUpBGirMxIzd8kzObKl1HOzWNeJrVVuKQ7Hiot8EXbnsfJO2iJr7y0i7BtMY2-NVcTzNCBMbQS3900Pb4KtBzP70tmwd3dbOaBQKaS0yGewRE_J0hTHcbbIZUOhzG9wlbc4j_vo2dVJlwwM%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC-10, a district that Congressman McHenrys just retired from and one that WILL decide who controls Washington.**
Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2ce772c49f144a7599282c2c9712400b&_e=gk3bapq1_sF5MzjI7MFWqroEih6rqiPrwCAFFTeXimbNL6dBTxfafK0uS3P4kerTp4aftUVUUMmehfO07OjJBpm4FYvYyaCT6MOfQbLBIEaThwtcUBccseYTxffZ8q7WxtJJISMrKrSL5r1kxyFce5N0ckdPnk7ttsShbnNTIRxpM95UGFdYyA3xysXODQX_yGWXk0KBa-3omO50NkYD67Np4SXDH8NDCVR9bYZDDV3W32fLWrssCN6NBNHUgAi4EA5yZK9GKfzh7YFtrJdgaTlSWE9whClaHjTamedHvcQ%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2ce772c49f144a7599282c2c9712400b&_e=gk3bapq1_sF5MzjI7MFWqroEih6rqiPrwCAFFTeXimbNL6dBTxfafK0uS3P4kerTp4aftUVUUMmehfO07OjJBpm4FYvYyaCT6MOfQbLBIEZTnM09KYC3TYok2tC3RGXE2Gt9s8G7ZyDR0IWq0fuxqshMx4IN2X7a5v9KNfYnCrdnTuPQG0jHcRWV2UWCL8URt6i9alCOews1-4gFOsOewP3tr34sAknvJuz7cIP_flQvaF88B_9brLQUktC2wsFcvJbIUmUxxv5Xg7O4_QKqZs_-xXDiJO9ab7QJWG1pBds%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2ce772c49f144a7599282c2c9712400b&_e=gk3bapq1_sF5MzjI7MFWqroEih6rqiPrwCAFFTeXimbNL6dBTxfafK0uS3P4kerTp4aftUVUUMmehfO07OjJBpm4FYvYyaCT6MOfQbLBIEaThwtcUBccseYTxffZ8q7WxtJJISMrKrSL5r1kxyFcewfTmqKOYL1LIvy3eEmsFiK-sD1fFPg6cZvP_8JLJ-GCHGZx_fwRpLPGXfqOpfr_fw_xOUvoA74MEMLMPzukHF2kGFnf6cRbbXU1Z3cRO0Qu6mpefpvB53pF-42VImgHJwPlrKF9AacJk4NE4jcNjj8%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2ce772c49f144a7599282c2c9712400b&_e=gk3bapq1_sF5MzjI7MFWqroEih6rqiPrwCAFFTeXimbNL6dBTxfafK0uS3P4kerTp4aftUVUUMmehfO07OjJBpm4FYvYyaCT6MOfQbLBIEaThwtcUBccseYTxffZ8q7WxtJJISMrKrSL5r1kxyFcez65LJSCp5hLsn7pAB71PIKFgm6zkdeFiKI_PUblvmsU3Gn_lwZnL7trEFDD92GZmhHSZvVhaB9AabsHiAXurFlKDwhImsHOsKLbD_akiekhASaBuw_VmKEZ5Zwh0eqS1XL2PRIeDnPT0nOClNs9QZQ%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2ce772c49f144a7599282c2c9712400b&_e=gk3bapq1_sF5MzjI7MFWqroEih6rqiPrwCAFFTeXimbNL6dBTxfafK0uS3P4kerTp4aftUVUUMmehfO07OjJBpm4FYvYyaCT6MOfQbLBIEaThwtcUBccseYTxffZ8q7WxtJJISMrKrSL5r1kxyFce3BxKL7yARVNSEqv7g3MKCdi8zmyAzRyceRkw41sjQS3glsIDNieWtWNJ7U28uH0Nca8qj1pu8XA86QaThXyUNgkufQ0I-kTBFhkvuToPOAf0G7IrF-XsAw9JYkAXYQhKozQ7zZf8v_tGiI-gX6oH0U%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://links.constitutionpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2ce772c49f144a7599282c2c9712400b&_e=gk3bapq1_sF5MzjI7MFWqroEih6rqiPrwCAFFTeXimbNL6dBTxfafK0uS3P4kerTp4aftUVUUMmehfO07OjJBpm4FYvYyaCT6MOfQbLBIEaThwtcUBccseYTxffZ8q7WxtJJISMrKrSL5r1kxyFce1GYmxbT0eUGutBL6Lkb59G0zM6rDl2tgweBTPCZftL2OjN8uaN8vnzbdyKwSa4YAXqJqiTdS5BsP9OcDXBwgvRpbwXlNLrGmBgRNkMXyArhwow8gvhUb0FVBrz8257j6FIbmG4BZdTGMPeMPmXd2EI%3D)
---
Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District

body:
Tell SCOTUS: Keep your hands off Mifepristone!
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76424216/447491959/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjcyZDY1ODItOTlhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3fNIgqGf8W89JqPrPnE4egpr_rxf01whqaDDLkD2Ck0=&emci=e685aae5-5faa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f72d6582-99aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=10481059)

| | Peter — **This week, I'm working with progressive candidates and causes from across the country to collect signatures to protect access to mifepristone — a safe, effective pill used in medication abortions.** [**Will you add your name and help us tell the Supreme Court: mifepristone is essential health care?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76424217/447491962/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-nick-melvoin-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-nick-melvoin%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjcyZDY1ODItOTlhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3fNIgqGf8W89JqPrPnE4egpr_rxf01whqaDDLkD2Ck0=&emci=e685aae5-5faa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f72d6582-99aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=10481059) [add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76424218/447491963/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-nick-melvoin-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-nick-melvoin%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjcyZDY1ODItOTlhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3fNIgqGf8W89JqPrPnE4egpr_rxf01whqaDDLkD2Ck0=&emci=e685aae5-5faa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f72d6582-99aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=10481059) After reversing _Roe v. Wade_ in 2022, the Supreme Court is now taking up a new case to decide whether or not doctors will be allowed to prescribe mifepristone. **Over half of the abortions in the U.S. use mifepristone so this decision could effectively end medication abortions as we know it, putting millions of Americans health care in jeopardy.** The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has called mifepristone "safe and effective" and has been used by millions of people since its approval in 2000. And yet, that hasn't stopped right-wing groups from launching campaigns to ban the drug for good. The White House denounced the cases against the drug as "extreme and dangerous," calling it another attempt at banning abortion nationwide. clean_body: Tell SCOTUS: Keep your hands off Mifepristone! | | | | Peter — This week, I'm working with progressive candidates and causes from across the country to collect signatures to protect access to mifepristone — a safe, effective pill used in medication abortions. After reversing Roe v. Wade in 2022, the Supreme Court is now taking up a new case to decide whether or not doctors will be allowed to prescribe mifepristone. Over half of the abortions in the U.S. use mifepristone so this decision could effectively end medication abortions as we know it, putting millions of Americans health care in jeopardy. The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has called mifepristone "safe and effective" and has been used by millions of people since its approval in 2000. And yet, that hasn't stopped right-wing groups from launching campaigns to ban the drug for good. The White House denounced the cases against the drug as "extreme and dangerous," calling it another attempt at banning abortion nationwide. More soon, Nick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

body:
#
Peter,
National insiders are terrified of the movement we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce here in Missouri — and they should be.
**FIRST —** A slew of public approval polling over the course of 2023 found Missouri voters holding _strongly unfavorable views_ of Josh Hawley. _Morning Consult_ found his approval tanking even lower than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida — making Hawley the most vulnerable GOP incumbent Senator running for re-election.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42205?refcode=em20240103-4528&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4528%2E614464%2EQhu1xc)
**THEN —** The GOP’s favorite oppo shop got busy launching all sorts of desperate attacks at Lucas. The majority of them were about playing a card game...
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42205?refcode=em20240103-4528&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4528%2E614464%2EQhu1xc)
**AND NOW —** With multiple recent polls already showing Josh Hawley and Lucas Kunce in a _statistical tie,_ these insiders have made Missouri their top defensive target in 2024. They’re doing, saying, and spending whatever it takes to re-elect Josh Hawley and keep this seat under their thumb.
**They know Lucas Kunce and the grassroots movement we’re building together have what it takes to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s Senate seat this year.**
Help us make their worst fear come true.
**[Please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today. clean_body: Peter, National insiders are terrified of the movement we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce here in Missouri — and they should be. FIRST — A slew of public approval polling over the course of 2023 found Missouri voters holding strongly unfavorable views of Josh Hawley. Morning Consult found his approval tanking even lower than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida — making Hawley the most vulnerable GOP incumbent Senator running for re-election. THEN — The GOP’s favorite oppo shop got busy launching all sorts of desperate attacks at Lucas. The majority of them were about playing a card game... AND NOW — With multiple recent polls already showing Josh Hawley and Lucas Kunce in a statistical tie, these insiders have made Missouri their top defensive target in 2024. They’re doing, saying, and spending whatever it takes to re-elect Josh Hawley and keep this seat under their thumb. They know Lucas Kunce and the grassroots movement we’re building together have what it takes to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s Senate seat this year. Help us make their worst fear come true. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for all your help, Team Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Hill Harper
subject: I am respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240103&t=1&akid=791%2E62735%2EFOcGy5)
Peter,
Senate control — and the future of our country — will come down to Michigan this year.
But it’s not enough to keep this critical Senate seat blue. With cost of living soaring, millions without access to health care, an out-of-control climate crisis, and escalating war abroad, **Michigan needs a true representative of the people as their next Senator.**
I am not in this race for personal gain, or to do the bidding of corporate lobbyists and ultra-wealthy donors. (I proved that when a mega-donor offered me $20 million to drop out and run against a progressive House incumbent, and I said no.)
I am running for Senate to stand up for the working people of Michigan — and I need your help to win.
[**I’m respectfully asking you to become one of the first 2024 Founding Donors to our Senate campaign. We are 100% grassroots funded, so this is the only way we stand a fighting chance to take on the Washington establishment.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240103?amount=5&refcode=em20240103-791&refcode2=791_62735_FOcGy5&akid=791%2E62735%2EFOcGy5)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240103?amount=5&refcode=em20240103-791&refcode2=791_62735_FOcGy5&akid=791%2E62735%2EFOcGy5)**
It’s contributions like yours that power this campaign from one day to the next. We won’t be able to take our people-powered movement to Washington without your support.
**Please join our 2024 Founding Donors today:****[https://act.hillharper.com/go/2024foundingdonor](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240103?amount=5&refcode=em20240103-791&refcode2=791_62735_FOcGy5&akid=791%2E62735%2EFOcGy5)**
Thank you,
Hill Harper

---
🚨 **Major Endorsement Announcement** 🚨
WASHINGTON, DC – Chairman David Avella released the following statement on Pennsylvania State Representative Ryan Mackenzie earning the endorsement of GOPAC’s Mission Majority in his campaign for the Republican nomination in the 7th Congressional District.
“GOPAC supported Ryan Mackenzie in his first election to the Pennsylvania House and watched him build a record as a thoughtful, pragmatic conservative. He has earned our endorsement in his congressional campaign by championing ideas to advance Americans’ personal and economic security. With each election cycle, Congress gains more Members who have been involved in GOPAC’s mission. Ryan will be a valuable addition and will strengthen our majority in the U.S. House.”
Mission Majority’s endorsed candidates receive the maximum allowable federal contribution from the GOPAC Election Fund. Further, the GOPAC Election Fund investors and supporters are encouraged to donate directly to each endorsed candidate. The candidates are also eligible for GOPAC Election Fund independent expenditures.
About GOPAC: The GOPAC network invested nearly $32 million to educate and elect Republican leaders in the 2021-2022 election cycle. The Washington Post reported that GOPAC ranked 4th nationally amongst organizations donating directly to Republican candidates and committees.

body:
I know everyone is getting settled back into their usual schedules after a little time away for the holidays, but I needed to reach out because of how crazy the past week has been.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e4d268189ac41d2baee4f2b6b73da73&_e=1bMIdJ21zJFjG7mUAVy8msmQJEsW2Q0Z9fmXzeldkd7dLje0RtOCayPTCdk9sWE6XwapcXbZrxrv2rlU50bFiZrn19f0tYeJmSsMXJA8zQkWsk51O3DD9VykfQgnwAkHkqrfoMJgP2R8VqlfF82k6QlAeFJBGvD-JjT6MyCNhXGwut050A19d5eLrbHfUampijhFIFj6uKB9kAL85_crJwkAefRvlrtsvNa_YF--t92lLb7y1tOKLw-5JGNJ5ws6Z7af73uyRxl_KcTAzXEcUlpxPlkJZvWWzFpgrjwcX3aNFSYuOEZ6hMk4R83QdihlvEsAGT8oVegyYh6uxpBijHDa8ud338O2kD3OqSkpBwSlPfRGFpf1YsrvG1KuonXVZIE-uAyVKksWt4pmerYYWw%3D%3D) Folks, I know everyone is getting settled back into their usual schedules after a little time away for the holidays, but I needed to reach out because of how crazy the past week has been. Lauren Boebert officially announced that she’s abandoning her constituents who elected her in CO-03 and will be running here in the Fourth District instead. Boebert is running scared from a difficult election this year, and she believes our district is more likely to send her back to her cushy job in DC. **[I say that she’s made a huge mistake that will cost her her seat. Will you help me defeat her by making a $10 donation to my campaign?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e4d268189ac41d2baee4f2b6b73da73&_e=1bMIdJ21zJFjG7mUAVy8msmQJEsW2Q0Z9fmXzeldkd7dLje0RtOCayPTCdk9sWE6XwapcXbZrxrv2rlU50bFiZrn19f0tYeJmSsMXJA8zQkWsk51O3DD9VykfQgnwAkHkqrfoMJgP2R8VqlfF82k6QlAeFJBGvD-JjT6MyCNhXGwut050A19d5eLrbHfUampijhFIFj6uKB9kAL85_crJwkAefRvlrtsvNa_YF--t93g3KC69Vb-3kj8XUuyYdjHiCesNl0Kc0XM-_Y5Ep48PpjMLC2VZ9qubnej1stcUr_elpefm3Ye8jzDVe7EwoiEfzR8hA3qgJ1D55UJ0Ge7IN0rJpQBorj8IZEY_d7baIsOpJbUemlZs-_pOFImofSlXJjK47oUnO5NKCKgBSiz8tDAacKQLETyt87nWB_cjWk%3D)** I know our community. That’s the type of leader I’d be for our district, and it’s why I know I can beat Boebert in November. **[But I need your help to make it happen, so I’m asking you to chip in $5, $10, or anything you can afford to my campaign to ensure we have the resources needed to win.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e4d268189ac41d2baee4f2b6b73da73&_e=1bMIdJ21zJFjG7mUAVy8msmQJEsW2Q0Z9fmXzeldkd7dLje0RtOCayPTCdk9sWE6XwapcXbZrxrv2rlU50bFiZrn19f0tYeJmSsMXJA8zQkWsk51O3DD9VykfQgnwAkHkqrfoMJgP2R8VqlfF82k6QlAeFJBGvD-JjT6MyCNhXGwut050A19d5eLrbHfUampijhFIFj6uKB9kAL85_crJwkAefRvlrtsvNa_YF--t92lLb7y1tOKLw-5JGNJ5ws6Rs33zShIQA5I6DCMd-WvvB0FtGF4XTLfHz77mQIt5dELQKQ3l9CpUNA7jP4XtJwQ2-2m-M2Xecd5FJ7onGVfoiAqbrlgRPhFuOIOiKZsOMdK7_MPGkjxIqO6E9PRXd2BjjIjhTOeeFEvvM010XLY6Q%3D%3D)** Thank you so much, John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. clean_body: I know everyone is getting settled back into their usual schedules after a little time away for the holidays, but I needed to reach out because of how crazy the past week has been. | | | Folks, I know everyone is getting settled back into their usual schedules after a little time away for the holidays, but I needed to reach out because of how crazy the past week has been. Lauren Boebert officially announced that she’s abandoning her constituents who elected her in CO-03 and will be running here in the Fourth District instead. Boebert is running scared from a difficult election this year, and she believes our district is more likely to send her back to her cushy job in DC. I know our community. We’re not interested in the type of extremism and divisiveness that Boebert offers. We want folks representing us who will stand up for our values and fight to make sure we aren’t left behind. That’s the type of leader I’d be for our district, and it’s why I know I can beat Boebert in November. Thank you so much, John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Chris Coulombe | Chris to Congress
subject: Our Military Service Members Need You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COMMITTEE TO ELECT CHRIS COULOMBE TO CONGRESS
body:
Americans who serve need courageous leaders in the military and in Congress. Right now, there are few.

| | | [ ](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_yl1Uj6BXJ24eOiILcksZzJyBpbdjKxZc2dvPW8Hi45qSjMaYV-UBtIT7GTlI3f5C8DEqAZNH9k8LuxiJ608ZETEycQptzqwufVwF6YfiJbN&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vax_blast_240103&n=1)
---
---
Dear Friend, As a Veteran, I feel a duty to help give a voice to all current and former members of our armed forces who had their constitutional rights violated and were harmed by military brass. I don’t enjoy needing to call out decorated officials, but they have imposed a great injustice upon the rank-and-file, and I cannot be silent. That’s why I’m proud to stand among 231 service members as a signatory of the Declaration of Military Accountability, which vows to hold accountable the military officials who illegally imposed COVID-19 shots upon hundreds of thousands of unwilling service members. Some of these individuals were severely harmed by the shots, some refused to take them and were fired (in the middle of a recruiting crisis!), and many took the shots only after being pressured and threatened by military and political leadership. Americans who serve need courageous leaders in the military and in Congress. Right now, there are few. I served for 16 years. As President Lincoln proclaimed, the humane treatment of Americans who serve is paramount. I will continue to serve this country and members of our military for the rest of my life. Please learn more about the Declaration, [consider adding your name](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=g7zfNjb3RgtKAu2qI_Qo1ZcFSad8RNLrIDv7zxjzPMgo3OL6JJ3TlpvCb_wShV3F&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vax_blast_240103&n=2), and if you can, [make a contribution to my Congressional campaign. Ballots go out in just a few weeks.](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_yl1Uj6BXJ24eOiILcksZzJyBpbdjKxZc2dvPW8Hi45qSjMaYV-UBtIT7GTlI3f5C8DEqAZNH9k8LuxiJ608ZETEycQptzqwufVwF6YfiJbN&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vax_blast_240103&n=3)
---
[ ](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_yl1Uj6BXJ24eOiILcksZzJyBpbdjKxZc2dvPW8Hi45qSjMaYV-UBtIT7GTlI3f5C8DEqAZNH9k8LuxiJ608ZETEycQptzqwufVwF6YfiJbN&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vax_blast_240103&n=4)
---
I’m inviting you to join me this Sunday at 10 AM for a neighborhood walk in NW Santa Rosa. We’ll be talking to members of our community about the pressing issues our service members face and how we can support them. To RSVP for the walk, [click here](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzUui37tQKBCJoCg9rrf4iNZ0GeykOePP29bXc2taC7J_&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vax_blast_240103&n=5). [I am so grateful for your continued support. I will never stop fighting for members of our Armed Forces. They need veterans and leaders to represent them in Congress. That’s why I’m asking you to consider chipping into my campaign with any amount that you feel comfortable with.](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_yl1Uj6BXJ24eOiILcksZzJyBpbdjKxZc2dvPW8Hi45qSjMaYV-UBtIT7GTlI3f5C8DEqAZNH9k8LuxiJ608ZETEycQptzqwufVwF6YfiJbN&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vax_blast_240103&n=6) Thank you. Semper Fidelis, **Chris Coulombe** Republican Candidate for California’s 2nd Congressional District
---

name: Trump Ballot Alert via Our Revolution
subject: How you can help kick Trump off the 2024 ballot:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump must never return to the White House. That’s why Our
Revolution needs your help to STOP TRUMP from appearing on the ballot!

First, Colorado determined that Trump was ineligible to appear on their
presidential ballot because of Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, which bars
insurrectionists who had previously taken the oath of office from holding
office. Then, yesterday, Maine’s Secretary of State disqualified Trump
from appearing on the ballot using the same Constitutional power.

These are extraordinary developments in the fight to save democracy, but
we need other states to take action. The more states that bar Trump from
the ballot, the harder it will be for the right-wing Supreme Court to save
him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13114?source=email-20240103&t=1011&akid=5140%2E5885482%2Euw0j8E ]Keep Trump OFF the presidential election ballot in 2024! Add your name
urging your Secretary of State to bar Trump from the ballot because of his
role in efforts to overturn the 2020 election results.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13114?source=email-20240103&t=1012&akid=5140%2E5885482%2Euw0j8E ]ADD YOUR NAME

This is the work of saving democracy, and we can only do it with continued
action from Our Revolution supporters.

Our Revolution led efforts to expel insurrectionists from Congress under
Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, and bar Trump from running in 2024. We
held protests outside the offices of Republican members of Congress
involved in January 6. We sent petitions to Secretaries of State to take
the extraordinary action that Secretary Shenna Bellows took in Maine. Our
Revolution staff even met with Bellows back in 2022 to discuss keeping
Trump off the ballot.

We must keep up our work and show Secretaries of State across the country
that they too must uphold the Constitution and bar Trump from the ballot.
Section 3 of the 14th Amendment was written to ensure that anyone who has
taken the oath of office could never again hold office if they engaged in
insurrection. Trump’s attempts to overturn the 2020 election clearly
disqualify him from running for President.

Before the extreme right-wing conservatives on the Supreme Court can rule
on the question of Trump’s status on the ballot, we need your help to make
sure as many states as possible invoke the Constitution to keep him off
the ballot.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13114?source=email-20240103&t=1013&akid=5140%2E5885482%2Euw0j8E ]Add your name urging your Secretary of State to kick Trump off the 2024
ballot!

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, Donald Trump must never return to the White House. That’s why Our Revolution needs your help to STOP TRUMP from appearing on the ballot! First, Colorado determined that Trump was ineligible to appear on their presidential ballot because of Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, which bars insurrectionists who had previously taken the oath of office from holding office. Then, yesterday, Maine’s Secretary of State disqualified Trump from appearing on the ballot using the same Constitutional power. These are extraordinary developments in the fight to save democracy, but we need other states to take action. The more states that bar Trump from the ballot, the harder it will be for the right-wing Supreme Court to save him. [ ]Keep Trump OFF the presidential election ballot in 2024! Add your name urging your Secretary of State to bar Trump from the ballot because of his role in efforts to overturn the 2020 election results. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME This is the work of saving democracy, and we can only do it with continued action from Our Revolution supporters. Our Revolution led efforts to expel insurrectionists from Congress under Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, and bar Trump from running in 2024. We held protests outside the offices of Republican members of Congress involved in January 6. We sent petitions to Secretaries of State to take the extraordinary action that Secretary Shenna Bellows took in Maine. Our Revolution staff even met with Bellows back in 2022 to discuss keeping Trump off the ballot. We must keep up our work and show Secretaries of State across the country that they too must uphold the Constitution and bar Trump from the ballot. Section 3 of the 14th Amendment was written to ensure that anyone who has taken the oath of office could never again hold office if they engaged in insurrection. Trump’s attempts to overturn the 2020 election clearly disqualify him from running for President. Before the extreme right-wing conservatives on the Supreme Court can rule on the question of Trump’s status on the ballot, we need your help to make sure as many states as possible invoke the Constitution to keep him off the ballot. [ ]Add your name urging your Secretary of State to kick Trump off the 2024 ballot! When we organize, we win. Before we closed out 2023, I wrote to you to remind you that******_“saving the country we all love so dearly will not come easy in 2024.”_**
---
I said that because sadly, the attacks, unlawful arrests, and phony witch hunts that you witnessed in 2023 were just the beginning...
---
Crooked Joe and his accomplices will throw every last scheme imaginable at us to try and stop our movement from winning back the White House in election year 2024.
---
But, thankfully, all the way back in February of _last year_ , I established _**THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST**_ to help peacefully DEFEND our movement from just that.
---
And to date, the Trust has proven to be a massive success, as we’ve fended off every last one of the Radical Democrats’ attacks to now be in the STRONGEST position of our entire campaign!
---
**But with my****FIRST SHAM TRIAL OF 2024****less than two weeks away, never has YOUR support through the President’s Trust been more critical.**
---
_And I couldn’t help but notice that you never accepted your place in the Trust in 2023, Patriot..._

_Now, let me first just say that if you didn’t accept because times are tough under Crooked Joe’s Third World regime, then please don’t even think about donating. I completely understand. I want you to take care of your family and yourself first. I mean it! _
---
_But, if you were simply waiting for the election year – when Crooked Joe and the Left’s vicious attacks would no doubt reach their highest point – then I want you to know that YOU are needed now more than ever._
---
**_And upon acceptance, you will receive your very own Founding Membership Card as proof of your membership within my inner circle of trusted defenders._**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Becoming a Founding Donor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| With two critical elections this year, your support is more important than ever.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4956%2E5257348%2EdTyoX7)
Hi Derek,
We are officially in the election year, and it’s been just under a year since we launched this campaign for U.S. Senate.
We’ve been steadfast in our commitment to fight for America’s democracy and build a better economy for everyone.
But here’s the truth: none of this would have been possible without the help of this grassroots team.
From holding Trump accountable through impeachment to my service on the January 6 Select Committee, you have consistently stood by my side.
Your unwavering support, resilience in fighting back, commitment to speaking truth to power, and tireless dedication to our shared mission to ensure our government upholds the promise of this country have been pivotal.
While we made significant strides this past year, the true challenge lies ahead.
With two critical elections this year, your support is more important than ever.
**[So Derek, please continue to stay by me in our fight by contributing $10 to become a 2024 Founding Donor today. Your support is essential in shaping a better future for our nation.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2024_abs_em.sN9m5T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240103_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4956%2E5257348%2EdTyoX7)** [DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2024_abs_em.sN9m5T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240103_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4956%2E5257348%2EdTyoX7)
---
The truth is that the fate of our democracy is in _your_ hands.
With Republican celebrity candidate Steve Garvey rising in the polls and Donald Trump leading in the presidential election polls, it’s clear that this election year is going to be a difficult one.
But with the support of this team, I know we can rise to the occasion and meet the challenges that lie ahead.
**[If you can once again help this movement to uphold our democratic values, pitch in $10 today to become a 2024 Founding Donor to start the new year strong.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2024_abs_em.sN9m5T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240103_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4956%2E5257348%2EdTyoX7)**

clean_body: | With two critical elections this year, your support is more important than ever. Hi Derek, We are officially in the election year, and it’s been just under a year since we launched this campaign for U.S. Senate. We’ve been steadfast in our commitment to fight for America’s democracy and build a better economy for everyone. But here’s the truth: none of this would have been possible without the help of this grassroots team. From holding Trump accountable through impeachment to my service on the January 6 Select Committee, you have consistently stood by my side. Your unwavering support, resilience in fighting back, commitment to speaking truth to power, and tireless dedication to our shared mission to ensure our government upholds the promise of this country have been pivotal. While we made significant strides this past year, the true challenge lies ahead. With two critical elections this year, your support is more important than ever. The truth is that the fate of our democracy is in your hands. With Republican celebrity candidate Steve Garvey rising in the polls and Donald Trump leading in the presidential election polls, it’s clear that this election year is going to be a difficult one. But with the support of this team, I know we can rise to the occasion and meet the challenges that lie ahead. body:
Just five seats represent the battle for the Senate Majority. Pitch in now to provide direct support to these critical races!
**Five Senate candidates need your help today, Peter.**

Tough conservatives are taking on sitting Democrats, and running for open seats, across the country. These are the races that will decide the Senate. More details:

_In West Virginia, Joe Manchin is NOT to run for re-election, and[**Gov. Jim Justice**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63ed7ed455fd43769bfcfc7d913a017c&_e=2Zp09dYWjuYxKGnKwDTEWa2PtFs9J54HDntYQBuN5YN_hNYwLykZXidw6l02uWhpFBS5mBwvUF1gjl9X7GCSAeEsrTZyKva3Gg0wDZBPbZBFsFu9wDiMNqawWa6tS7q0J9cuNCDecacNfhT2yytAtoOvZCFyo2H_d_CyzkwNXfq5rYIQMJWIGMEf4W4l_-z0XY_oNjE3wIYl7hClQzwFRPWCBWQj_Dl3EqmHL45-ofJG1pY3gII70919E96288rctvMXTmb2ZfabaWSRz3jcpz-SyrcCFZnQrNSX28JT2TSE4ytq5ZKWM2LW7o-pB8sIWuGAtP87xt_BFwzR-M345cZMDLJNiNtlz9Q88E5F7TNG0YS9a60S922rdaMl4zjQHF8g2TrnL3G0JEUcVmMePtypiY5BSYqAQNKu-9VBcPc%3D) can flip the seat.

In Montana, Democrat Jon Tester is up against [**Tim Sheehy**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63ed7ed455fd43769bfcfc7d913a017c&_e=2Zp09dYWjuYxKGnKwDTEWa2PtFs9J54HDntYQBuN5YN_hNYwLykZXidw6l02uWhpFBS5mBwvUF1gjl9X7GCSAeEsrTZyKva3Gg0wDZBPbZBFsFu9wDiMNqawWa6tS7q0J9cuNCDecacNfhT2yytAtoOvZCFyo2H_d_CyzkwNXfq5rYIQMJWIGMEf4W4l_-z0XY_oNjE3wIYl7hClQzwFRPWCBWQj_Dl3EqmHL45-ofJG1pY3gII70919E96288rctvMXTmb2ZfabaWSRz3jcp30b7TvFihjNclQhJqa1h4NS9RU5IaXweeNAFliEWDWMB62L_GvboFgr8U-DLSNDxtjosc_6LPxkQNBwckm_4XPDepDTKNTC9isx46Yq_6ydRPpFUIwy_z2dyRQgS-L1h804FJe0QDY_VKk9-sOieLw%3D), a tough conservative, and fellow veteran, who can win.

In Ohio, there are several strong GOP challengers running against [**Sherrod Brown**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63ed7ed455fd43769bfcfc7d913a017c&_e=2Zp09dYWjuYxKGnKwDTEWa2PtFs9J54HDntYQBuN5YN_hNYwLykZXidw6l02uWhpFBS5mBwvUF1gjl9X7GCSAeEsrTZyKva3Gg0wDZBPbZBFsFu9wDiMNqawWa6tS7q0J9cuNCDecacNfhT2yytAtoOvZCFyo2H_d_CyzkwNXfq5rYIQMJWIGMEf4W4l_-z0XY_oNjE3wIYl7hClQzwFRPWCBWQj_Dl3EqmHL45-ofJG1pY3gII70919E96288rctvMXTmb2ZfabaWSRz3jcp7Tuq_JqD22ENBLSmdg-tY59tgUr6Wt__AJAd5lPOIUDT9Q3-8OzNTcF9xvCmnvwsStjP_cPSnVImgyCy6rnJUAVLCN1HOsLDoydPvC4Zun4wMq7RLSviXlFKy5LDoDGRTDbNoV9FKO3XjOgKEmMDY0%3D). With an early investment, we can win this seat.

In Pennsylvania, another veteran, [**David McCormick**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63ed7ed455fd43769bfcfc7d913a017c&_e=2Zp09dYWjuYxKGnKwDTEWa2PtFs9J54HDntYQBuN5YN_hNYwLykZXidw6l02uWhpFBS5mBwvUF1gjl9X7GCSAeEsrTZyKva3Gg0wDZBPbZBFsFu9wDiMNqawWa6tS7q0J9cuNCDecacNfhT2yytAtoOvZCFyo2H_d_CyzkwNXfq5rYIQMJWIGMEf4W4l_-z0XY_oNjE3wIYl7hClQzwFRPWCBWQj_Dl3EqmHL45-ofJG1pY3gII70919E96288rctvMXTmb2ZfabaWSRz3jcp7goQy3UQyI5t0XIXvMI8nRhJe3WSnl36-E8S88Eg7Qf6l-0V5ZpSnbjrLT4WXP3HqNSDHItHh87FzCLG2Az-9LZnI-Z15hLQ8kIO79rLvefBdVtK43823Y73sHmnX4bI6ukds1SKFuO6a63yXgYjKY%3D), is taking on Democrat Bob Casey. It’ll be as close as it gets.

And in Arizona, [**Kari Lake**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63ed7ed455fd43769bfcfc7d913a017c&_e=2Zp09dYWjuYxKGnKwDTEWa2PtFs9J54HDntYQBuN5YN_hNYwLykZXidw6l02uWhpFBS5mBwvUF1gjl9X7GCSAeEsrTZyKva3Gg0wDZBPbZBFsFu9wDiMNqawWa6tS7q0J9cuNCDecacNfhT2yytAtoOvZCFyo2H_d_CyzkwNXfq5rYIQMJWIGMEf4W4l_-z0XY_oNjE3wIYl7hClQzwFRPWCBWQj_Dl3EqmHL45-ofJG1pY3gII70919E96288rctvMXTmb2ZfabaWSRz3jcp5syO-o13fsBYXSwoZTsbjPCu0iywyA9RKYcYIz44UCiIuGVs4ZoyrnSeAPeiMvgCmp-qZzKHUA92zL6X82VATZ4LI4qqFROyDPyh1PRLDo_0axbWhWYDmHSXGmWE69prp7yu55Wa9rxKBKzuHEczyk%3D) can defeat Sen. Kyrsten Sinema and Democrat Reuben Gallago._
We can win all five of these elections — and we [**cannot**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63ed7ed455fd43769bfcfc7d913a017c&_e=2Zp09dYWjuYxKGnKwDTEWa2PtFs9J54HDntYQBuN5YN_hNYwLykZXidw6l02uWhpFBS5mBwvUF1gjl9X7GCSAeEsrTZyKva3Gg0wDZBPbZBFsFu9wDiMNqawWa6tS7q0J9cuNCDecacNfhT2yytAtoOvZCFyo2H_d_CyzkwNXfq5rYIQMJWIGMEf4W4l_-z0XY_oNjE3wIYl7hClQzwFRPWCBWQj_Dl3EqmHL45-ofJG1pY3gII70919E96288rctvMXTmb2ZfabaWSRz3jcp0ex387gw42XFM_5Dsrl2MLWV5kSVsbFuNUJbErPZdYJziodAMsi2ShFmRzeZ06mBE9eKXhPKhUwzmRxmS5RzIWOjUOoIKd7q0R-B8SM2xVdFY85RH9haw0CparBbTeFtjsjC_6r2YpqsHP41SJD86k%3D) risk losing even one of them.

I’m asking you to split a donation between [**all five**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63ed7ed455fd43769bfcfc7d913a017c&_e=2Zp09dYWjuYxKGnKwDTEWa2PtFs9J54HDntYQBuN5YN_hNYwLykZXidw6l02uWhpFBS5mBwvUF1gjl9X7GCSAeEsrTZyKva3Gg0wDZBPbZBFsFu9wDiMNqawWa6tS7q0J9cuNCDecacNfhT2yytAtoOvZCFyo2H_d_CyzkwNXfq5rYIQMJWIGMEf4W4l_-z0XY_oNjE3wIYl7hClQzwFRPWCBWQj_Dl3EqmHL45-ofJG1pY3gII70919E96288rctvMXTmb2ZfabaWSRz3jcp-t5FAfot_aIDj1JQqfd4_LZ4VlUTGgqZwVp6KyqJwEgUodA7L1w4yQVb11d9uhoWEYL3EkiEGBDp5e2jP6JL_O0HHY4jbcEMvd7ri0KRxohNypYvkWSbwRL1Ra4YqCt5-gAanXe2yeNPMOVxbLh34k%3D) of these races. It will immediately be used to invest in victory come November.

Tough conservatives are taking on sitting Democrats, and running for open seats, across the country. These are the races that will decide the Senate. More details: In West Virginia, Joe Manchin is NOT to run for re-election, and can flip the seat. In Montana, Democrat Jon Tester is up against , a tough conservative, and fellow veteran, who can win. In Ohio, there are several strong GOP challengers running against . With an early investment, we can win this seat. In Pennsylvania, another veteran, , is taking on Democrat Bob Casey. It’ll be as close as it gets. And in Arizona, can defeat Sen. Kyrsten Sinema and Democrat Reuben Gallago. We can win all five of these elections — and we risk losing even one of them. I’m asking you to split a donation between of these races. It will immediately be used to invest in victory come November. As I’ve said before, if we lose in 2024, we’re done. But if we take back the White House, keep the House, and flip the Senate, we’ll have a chance to make America strong again. We have a plan to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks. The first step is sending reinforcements to the Senate, and that’s why I need every tough conservative to split a donation between these key races ASAP. body:
Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.

Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong And Here’s Why>>

Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

“Am I worried about this? Absolutely not.”

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

“Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years.” https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38687%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xuevlSM3WYFm9G9xLN%2fOyA&sysid=1{transaction_id}&aff_sub3=010124&aff_sub4=RM-YAN-20240104&aff_sub5=celebrity_BRICS_2024_a

| |
**BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media’s latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. The latest American Research Group Inc. also has me polling at #2 amongst “probable” GOP primary voters in New Hampshire:

Trump – 33%
**Ramaswamy—18%**
DeSantis—14%
Christie—9%
Haley—8%
Undecided—16%
| [** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://trk.secureandprosper.-vr9uPUNLjKSTA)
---

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories.”

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-gXl-XZPgk6UduI7bmw) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I’m “infecting the public with conspiracy,” “one step away from Nazi propaganda,” and “selling sinister lies.”

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](http://trk.secureandprosper.-xqpBfWDtLl7DjJg3EIw)
---

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don’t let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we’re bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you’ll tune in for the TRUTH.
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._eQ)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: American Briefing
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl0tgh4og30vj0ffu96pleturg5t7gak8gsm1bto_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o35c9h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4oeapom8o2s2gti8pm4utu3i65n5hgvbemnvsp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o35c9h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmvujuldiobmok0agphr4gkor9mvf21kro7t5bgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o35c9h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Briefing

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv9lkba0451qrl0mfrqco43aqfam1il68hi78un8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o36cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9nqr32stulss9gvln4alpochpn9c16ikk1s335o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o36cth2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z67uvnsum9uulbeungd41f5sf3oecdms40glujfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o36cth2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhdleojkt7o066r600r0kpepu2udjudahqi8lc40_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o36cth2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq3omom0jorm88s0urhbiqi5oncd5738f5r78f98_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o36cth2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5d7srqb8bo343564j6i5nd01hs8jhv1t8i5h360_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o36cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9h62pj6cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn28fanrrjm5087enhh5ha5fipud2jlea1vf1ga0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o36cth2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfacj42sc2oe98l65hb1le05jis527if65m3rl0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm6o36cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: my op-ed in the Washington Times
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

As I've been warning you for months, there are more than a handful of GOP members who'd love to see the pro-life movement just go away.

Others want our help when elections come around, but then want to give us nothing in return when it comes to saving babies.

That's why I recently wrote an op-ed for _The Washington Times_ entitled "Republicans Need to Be Unapologetically Pro-Life" addressing the concerns we as pro-lifers have while so-called 'Republicans' gamble and lose BIG on the issue of abortion!

**[Pro-Life Friend, if you haven't read it yet you can click here to read my op-ed](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-siklruk-duchtdja-y/).**

With so much at stake for our country right now, there's no doubt 2024 will be the most important year for the pro-life movement in my lifetime.

**[That's why I hope you'll consider making a contribution to _Students for Life Action_ to help us continue our life saving work & keep up the pressure on Republicans to do the right thing and vote pro-life](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-siklruk-duchtdja-j/).**

**It 's because of the support from good folks like you that we're able to fight back against the Abortion Lobby's LIES by inspiring and training our army of pro-life young people to take action.**

Thank you for all you do to support _Students for Life Action_ and our thousands of student leaders.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38681%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3h%2bC1qMgKO04XrewqNiLhg&sysid=1)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38682%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sagT3tcaPZAlMotXcvVJcA&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38683%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KPlyeqGUJhb6mQrO9visTw&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38681%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3h%2bC1qMgKO04XrewqNiLhg&sysid=1)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
BREAKING: CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---

| |
**BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media’s latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. The latest American Research Group Inc. also has me polling at #2 amongst “probable” GOP primary voters in New Hampshire:

Trump – 33%
**Ramaswamy—18%**
DeSantis—14%
Christie—9%
Haley—8%
Undecided—16%
| [** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-CpURZKW4eMoA)
---

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories.”

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I’m “infecting the public with conspiracy,” “one step away from Nazi propaganda,” and “selling sinister lies.”

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don’t let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we’re bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you’ll tune in for the TRUTH.
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._0IuEdatPXw)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._Sg39ZkSinggI4RGWQ)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-vQ)

---

---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.
