A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk41e13ggd0uvh54k0o1kug58srep2b5mfml8mfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm9or2c5h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmim4kfhst2g3c2dkmab3g110g16uebf2m4qqm18_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm9or2c5h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf1po2j2btaq6t0gis5lg4kqsmdvg8tno5j7i7co_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm9or2c5h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkmf8sgphvt4o8imucdc2g4rskqo7h6r9diognv8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64oj1cpj6eoh1k8gn48n24hjm0ob6cdie6oj1c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47i0lrb4n6ib98qp2rlvq79l1va9te327mjl7jg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cphm9or2c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt5lr46vkdo88rhjkhbodd3a9ltfii48i667ns1g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c5j66p73c9gm49fg)

Friend,

This final Republican presidential primary debate before the critical Iowa Caucus is GUARANTEED to be a showdown.

Who do you think is going to win: the strong conservative Governor who has led his state to unprecedented economic, education, and low-crime success, or the liberal-in-disguise who sells out to big donors and wants the government to track your identity online?

You could see it all go down FIRST HAND in the audience with us by submitting an entry today:

Your ✈️ to Iowa

2 free 🎟️ to the debate

A 2-night 🏨 stay

A 🤝 with Governor Ron DeSantis and First Lady Casey DeSantis!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bab2b8748d9826c68c330ad2ffdbdf9515263bf25fbd1ba4889fac3f874a283c1a45e8dba614ea3378c48cb3814af7de8eaaeeb9d115a1100693263abaca7737
> ENTER NOW <

This is the first highly anticipated political event of election year and YOU could be in the crowd experiencing it all with us. Make sure to do everything it takes to win your chance at attending this incredible event ASAP!

Hope to see you soon!

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bab2b8748d9826c68c330ad2ffdbdf9515263bf25fbd1ba4889fac3f874a283c1a45e8dba614ea3378c48cb3814af7de8eaaeeb9d115a1100693263abaca7737

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bab2b8748d9826c62e263d3f0bb2dbab157ae854b0ed02383fcd6e1090a13aaea6c818ca9e2a9fe64bab2f63113b9637d19909dc3da7a28787e988536bd28427
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bab2b8748d9826c68c330ad2ffdbdf9515263bf25fbd1ba4889fac3f874a283c1a45e8dba614ea3378c48cb3814af7de8eaaeeb9d115a1100693263abaca7737

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bab2b8748d9826c68c330ad2ffdbdf9515263bf25fbd1ba4889fac3f874a283c1a45e8dba614ea3378c48cb3814af7de8eaaeeb9d115a1100693263abaca7737

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bab2b8748d9826c6d72b1a24426168d42bd9b9753b3c18ead9be9ccbcdf0350198b6bbbde3224a0b173ed5bb8f9535c9888957946e2fecafc64696eadf46ac42

. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by

clicking here.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bab2b8748d9826c6f77bee6d5dc184768c02f91034e198139d92dfefb5b40cea73a13e606715b761f009d0328eac97041fb038c1588f9658825c1f476c9a1943
form . To enter without making a contribution,

click here. Void where prohibited or otherwise restricted by law. The Promotion begins on December 8, 2023 at 12:00 AM and ends on January 5, 2024 at 11:59 PM Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 PM Eastern Standard Time on January 5, 2024. One winner and a guest will receive the following Prize: Up to $1,500 total towards roundtrip airfare to Des Moines, Iowa, two nights of hotel accommodations, two tickets to the CNN Iowa Presidential Debate, and a meet and greet with Governor Ron DeSantis and First Lady Casey DeSantis. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of
Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bab2b8748d9826c6d72b1a24426168d42bd9b9753b3c18ead9be9ccbcdf0350198b6bbbde3224a0b173ed5bb8f9535c9888957946e2fecafc64696eadf46ac42
Official Rules. The Sponsor is Ron DeSantis for President, PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

UFC fighter Colby Covington blasted USA Boxing for allowing biological
men to fight women Wednesday, saying it was “completely
irresponsible.” USA Boxing’s rules that took effect Monday allow for
transgender athletes to compete against women provided they have
“completed gender reassignment surgery,” not exceed certain
testosterone levels for four years and provide documentation of the
hormone levels.

name: Jared Lovelace
subject: Campaign Volunteering
body:
Hi all,

If you're receiving this email, you signed up at one point over the last
couple months to volunteer in some capacity for my campaign. Some of you
may have already seen this message on social media and already signed up.
If so, you can disregard this email. For everyone else, I have
opportunities for both in-state and out-of-state volunteers.

For volunteer options: https://forms.gle/Yjrh2qN1WNmG13Z37
To receive a yard sign: https://forms.gle/LzsUrPvAiiSRxFfu7

You can also check out the events on my facebook page
<https://www.facebook.com/events/going/?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A[%7B%22mechanism%22%3A%22calendar_tab_event%22%2C%22surface%22%3A%22bookmark_calendar%22%7D]%2C%22ref_notif_type%22%3Anull%7D>
for the most up-to-date details on the days where I will be canvassing
across the district. I'm adding more events every day as the calendar for
the next 2 months starts to solidify. Please share the events and invite
your friends! Feel free to share these links with others who might be
interested. It goes without saying, but just don't send this email to
McCaul's staff or his friends!

We are gaining momentum! I am well received at every event that I go to,
and my message seems to be the right fit for what voters want right now.
McCaul will outspend me, but he will not out-work me. I'm expecting
65,000-68,000 to vote in the Republican primary. We need to get to 35,000
votes to win. I'm sitting at about 15,000 votes from people who will simply
vote against McCaul. Our canvassing, mailing, signs, email, and texting
efforts should raise my name recognition with enough people to get us
another 20,000 votes. Especially since I have a list of the 51,000 most
active Republican voters in our district (addresses, phone numbers, etc.).
See the attached image. Every red dot is a voter. We are going to canvass
with 20,000 door hangers and place signs in areas with the highest density
of voters. We will use mailers, emails, and texting to reach more rural
voters.
[image: Rename.JPG]
This is all napkin math based on assumptions from previous elections. My
point is that this is very achievable with your help. If you can place
signs in your community, please let me know. I will get you as many as you
need.

Thank you for your help! Any amount of time that you are able to give will
make a huge difference! Please reach out if you have any questions! Happy
new year!

Best,
Jared

--
*Jared B. Lovelace*
Republican Candidate
U.S. Congress, TX-10
www.jared2024.com

name: Mike Dugan
subject: I’m running for Congress. Here’s why.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE DUGAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/ce7b8add2312d0eb3947229f28c3afba/4aa956cecedc64c6c3d6b838967d376c/45443)
---
My name is Mike Dugan. I’m a U.S. Army veteran and conservative businessman, and I’m running for Congress in Georgia’s 3rd Congressional District. **I’ve been driven to serve my entire life. ** During my more than 20 years in the Army, I served around the world in more than 32 countries, including Afghanistan, Bosnia, and Iraq. As a member of the Georgia Senate, I helped shape the policies that have made Georgia the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. **[Now, it’s time to send some more Georgia common sense to Congress. Will you become one of the first donors to my campaign? Pitch in here or below.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/ce7b8add2312d0eb3947229f28c3afba/8ec5d489b0f93ad9c3d6b838967d376c/45443)**
---
[DONATE NOW](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/ce7b8add2312d0eb3947229f28c3afba/bea17684f8e70e0ac3d6b838967d376c/45443)
---
That’s a little bit about my background. Now, let me tell you about this seat and why I’m doing this. This is a Republican seat, and it’s one we must continue to hold. **But it’s not enough to send just another politician to Congress.** We’ve seen what happens too many times, and the stakes are way too high to do it again. **Case in point ⬇️** **The southern border is out of control. The national debt just topped $34 trillion. Millions of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. Crime is rising, and our enemies around the world are on the move.** I refuse to stand by and watch Joe Biden and his allies push our nation into decline. Now’s the time to step up, make a difference, and deliver results. **[I’m all-in, and it’s critical we hit the ground running. So I’m asking you, if you can, to chip in *any amount,* even just $1 will boost our campaign.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/ce7b8add2312d0eb3947229f28c3afba/d5fa404d10589bd4c3d6b838967d376c/45443)** I’m grateful for the opportunities I’ve had to serve our state and country, and I hope you’ll stand with me as I begin this new journey. Let's go,
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/ce7b8add2312d0eb3947229f28c3afba/e34cab8a146a5a39c3d6b838967d376c/45443)
---
Mike DuganRepublican for Georgia's 3rd District
---
[DONATE NOW](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/ce7b8add2312d0eb3947229f28c3afba/3194b13dec3f1a0ec3d6b838967d376c/45443)

---
Mike Dugan is an Army veteran and businessman running for Georgia's 3rd Congressional District. He's delivered for Georgia in the state Senate, and he'll keep it up in Congress. **_[**_Chip in here to help us bring back a federal government that works for the people._**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/ce7b8add2312d0eb3947229f28c3afba/8428eb7249000e5ec3d6b838967d376c/45443)_**

As a member of the Georgia Senate, I helped shape the policies that have made Georgia the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. That’s a little bit about my background. Now, let me tell you about this seat and why I’m doing this. This is a Republican seat, and it’s one we must continue to hold. But it’s not enough to send just another politician to Congress. We’ve seen what happens too many times, and the stakes are way too high to do it again. Case in point ⬇️ The southern border is out of control. The national debt just topped $34 trillion. Millions of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. Crime is rising, and our enemies around the world are on the move. I refuse to stand by and watch Joe Biden and his allies push our nation into decline. Now’s the time to step up, make a difference, and deliver results. I’m grateful for the opportunities I’ve had to serve our state and country, and I hope you’ll stand with me as I begin this new journey. Let's go, Mike DuganRepublican for Georgia's 3rd District | Mike Dugan is an Army veteran and businessman running for Georgia's 3rd Congressional District. He's delivered for Georgia in the state Senate, and he'll keep it up in Congress. Emails like this one are one of the most important ways we keep supporters in the loop. We'd hate to see you go, but if |

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: A New Year Message of Hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Together we can take back our country
| | | |
---
# Finding Hope in Troubled Times
---
We live in troubled times. It is easy to get depressed, discouraged, and downhearted. However, there are many reasons to have hope; hope that leads to "confidence, optimism, enthusiasm and patient perseverance" (Dieter F. Uchtdorf, November 2008).
Just look at what has happened in the United States and worldwide in just the past three years:
* A humiliating retreat in Afghanistan with billions of dollars of military equipment left to the Taliban. * Attacks on Ukraine and Israel, requiring them to defend their country's citizenry and sovereignty with our help. * China ratcheting up its threats to Taiwan and other Asian neighbors. * Iran, a sworn enemy, given billions by the Biden State Dept., which only helped encourage and finance Middle East violence. * American foreign policy is in shambles. Our enemies no longer fear us or our reaction to provocations. * A new axis of evil forming with Russia, China, North Korea, and Iran * The cost of groceries up by more than 25% * Near depletion of our strategic petroleum reserves * Partial shutdown of domestic oil and gas industries * Approaching 10,000,000 illegal border crossings costing hundreds of billions of dollars * Hundreds of thousands of Fentanyl deaths * An increase of $4,000,000,000,0000 (trillion) in the Federal debt * The spread of racism cloaked as "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" * A further decline of religion in the lives of Americans
That is a depressing list. It is easy to see why most Americans feel our Country is on the wrong track. I agree. However, there are still many reasons to have hope.
As we begin this new year, we should take stock of all we have to be grateful for. We still live in the greatest country in the history of the world. We have more freedoms and opportunities than most humans who have ever inhabited this planet. As Ronald Reagan said, "I've always thought New Year's Day was an especially American tradition, full of the optimism and hope we're famous for in our daily lives - an energy and confidence we call the American spirit. Perhaps because we know we control our own destiny, we believe deep down inside that working together we can make each new year better than the old." I agree!
Working together, we CAN take back our country. We can reverse course and return to freedom, family, faith, and prosperity. 2024 can be a pivotal year when we reignite the "American Spirit" and are once again filled with confidence, optimism, and enthusiasm!
Please join me as we take back our slice of America (Nevada's First Congressional District). Respond to this email if you can volunteer to support our campaign by sharing your time, talents, or money.
---

********

Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcca57ce0-5225-46ac-9a41-9a36db6e6da3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, A Republican celebrity candidate is surging in the polls for California’s Senate Race. Far-right Republican and former Major League Baseball star Steve Garvey could make it onto the ballot for the Senate General Election. [We’re setting an emergency goal of bringing in 10,000 grassroots contributions before midnight to make sure we increase Democratic voter turnout ahead of the Super Tuesday Primary Election on March 5. Will you make a split donation between us and Blue Amp Action right now? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6cd1250-03ab-445c-aa1a-931f8adeb276/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Peter, this scenario is what the California GOP has dreamed of. They recruited Steve Garvey, a MAGA Republican celebrity and former first baseman for the Padres and Dodgers, with millions of dollars of his own money to spend on this race. He spent decades on national TV. California has a jungle primary, meaning voters of all parties vote in the March 5 U.S. Senate primary — and the Super Tuesday presidential primary that could decide the GOP nomination for Donald Trump is happening the same day – on the same ballot. According to the Sacramento Bee, GOP voter turnout on the day of Adam’s U.S. Senate primary could be 20 points higher than for Democrats. That means with high Republican turnout, there is a real possibility that Republican Steve Garvey could finish in the top two of Adam’s U.S. Senate Primary and advance to the General Election. If that happens, Adam is the best candidate to beat him. [This could be the most expensive U.S. Senate race in the country — and because Adam isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, he needs your help to hit tonight’s emergency grassroots fundraising goal so we can reach the undecided voters we need to win. Will you rush a split contribution to Blue Amp Action and my campaign of $10 or any amount you can afford today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9eeefd8-59c4-4a9d-b87d-5d9b6af13c5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Adam has always counted on this grassroots team’s support, and he needs it now more than ever. Thanks for stepping up with whatever support you can give — it means the world to him. — Team Schiff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7a74bf3-0cc5-4d96-8de4-b0eb19c83281/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jen
subject: Many hats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Peter, Whether you’ve been with me from the start or this is the first time you’re hearing about me, I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on board. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e05fad2039d8207011e00fc502b761cfc4385d444acb17374493fb57d25b5937b899ca0fd3e5dca1fbf83ec08ba0e053a4 Once you’re done reading this, please consider making a donation of any amount to keep my momentum STRONG as we begin 2024! I’ve never thought I would be in the world of politics. It was something I didn’t know much about. But what I did know was that I always wanted to serve my country. It began when I was commissioned as a Naval officer in 1993 and then had the privilege to serve for a decade. I was a helicopter pilot flying H-46 helicopters and completed two deployments to the Persian Gulf. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e05fad2039d8207011e00fc502b761cfc4385d444acb17374493fb57d25b5937b899ca0fd3e5dca1fbf83ec08ba0e053a4 After serving in the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to go back to school and become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. Once again, serving our Greatest Generation by giving them the healthcare that they deserved. After years of watching the evening news, I got frustrated with the politicians in always saw on TV always talking about all the dysfunction and radical agendas in our government. Instead of continuing to get mad and yell at my TV, I did something about it….! I ran for office. I served three sessions in the Virginia State Senate, where I used my real-world experience to bring real solutions back to our Commonwealth. I championed legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e05fad2039d8207011e00fc502b761cfc4385d444acb17374493fb57d25b5937b899ca0fd3e5dca1fbf83ec08ba0e053a4 I found myself yelling at the TV again about the news in Washington. At that time we were represented by a Democrat in Congress who voted with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time and not by someone who put our values and community first. So instead of complaining about it, I did something again. I ran for Congress! With the odds stacked against me, I never lost sight of why I was running. The National Democrats poured OVER $10 MILLION dollars into my opponent's race to defeat me, but that never stopped me. On Election Night, we won by about 10,000 votes in one of the closest races in the entire nation. Now, I am working hard to make a big impact on our country. We are standing up for veterans, parents, taxpayers, and hard-working Americans. We’re making good progress, but the work is just getting started. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e05fad2039d8207011e00fc502b761cfc4385d444acb17374493fb57d25b5937b899ca0fd3e5dca1fbf83ec08ba0e053a4 I’ve worn many hats throughout my life. I’m a Wife, Mom, Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Strong Conservative. Most importantly, I’m a proud American who is in the fight to bring our country back to what it once was. But the Democrats are out for revenge. They’ve recruited a far-Left candidate to defeat me, and she’s spending all her time lying about me and my record. It’s absolutely ridiculous. She’s getting air support from dark money Democrat groups, and it’s critical that we have the resources to respond to the attacks! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e05fad2039d8207011e00fc502b761cfc4385d444acb17374493fb57d25b5937b899ca0fd3e5dca1fbf83ec08ba0e053a4 Will you rush support to my campaign today? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e05fad2039d8207011e00fc502b761cfc4385d444acb17374493fb57d25b5937b899ca0fd3e5dca1fbf83ec08ba0e053a4 RUSH SUPPORT With your help, we can continue reversing the damage Joe Biden and the far-Left has done to our families and country. Grassroots supporters are what makes a true difference in my fight. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e05fad2039d8207011e00fc502b761cfc4385d444acb17374493fb57d25b5937b899ca0fd3e5dca1fbf83ec08ba0e053a4 Will you chip in just $5 or more today to help me continue fighting for our country’s future? I promise I will make you proud. Thank you for your time reading my story – I know it was a long one! -Jen https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e05fad2039d8207011e00fc502b761cfc4385d444acb17374493fb57d25b5937b899ca0fd3e5dca1fbf83ec08ba0e053a4 DONATE To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d394e9290614f3e01f3f2e484c851c9bff4a83c39be4c6c5795b864d246800fdd78bb2b097f7fdc943cfddc0ae28510124b0ee453ac3ebe1 here . Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. Once you’re done reading this, please consider making a donation of any amount to keep my momentum STRONG as we begin 2024! I’ve never thought I would be in the world of politics. It was something I didn’t know much about. But what I did know was that I always wanted to serve my country. It began when I was commissioned as a Naval officer in 1993 and then had the privilege to serve for a decade. I was a helicopter pilot flying H-46 helicopters and completed two deployments to the Persian Gulf. After serving in the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to go back to school and become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. Once again, serving our Greatest Generation by giving them the healthcare that they deserved. After years of watching the evening news, I got frustrated with the politicians in always saw on TV always talking about all the dysfunction and radical agendas in our government. Instead of continuing to get mad and yell at my TV, I did something about it….! I ran for office. I served three sessions in the Virginia State Senate, where I used my real-world experience to bring real solutions back to our Commonwealth. I championed legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities. I found myself yelling at the TV again about the news in Washington. At that time we were represented by a Democrat in Congress who voted with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time and not by someone who put our values and community first. So instead of complaining about it, I did something again. I ran for Congress! With the odds stacked against me, I never lost sight of why I was running. The National Democrats poured OVER $10 MILLION dollars into my opponent's race to defeat me, but that never stopped me. On Election Night, we won by about 10,000 votes in one of the closest races in the entire nation. Now, I am working hard to make a big impact on our country. We are standing up for veterans, parents, taxpayers, and hard-working Americans. We’re making good progress, but the work is just getting started. I’ve worn many hats throughout my life. I’m a Wife, Mom, Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Strong Conservative. Most importantly, I’m a proud American who is in the fight to bring our country back to what it once was. But the Democrats are out for revenge. They’ve recruited a far-Left candidate to defeat me, and she’s spending all her time lying about me and my record. It’s absolutely ridiculous. She’s getting air support from dark money Democrat groups, and it’s critical that we have the resources to respond to the attacks! Will you rush support to my campaign today? RUSH SUPPORT With your help, we can continue reversing the damage Joe Biden and the far-Left has done to our families and country. Grassroots supporters are what makes a true difference in my fight. Will you chip in just $5 or more today to help me continue fighting for our country’s future? I promise I will make you proud. Thank you for your time reading my story – I know it was a long one! -Jen DONATE To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click here . subject: Epstein Files Released, a Deadly Terrorist Strike in Iran, and 'GrubGate'
body:
A trove of 40 court documents related to sex offender Jeffrey Epstein was [released by a federal court](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ_G7hwty58pKL4mXb72SgsvS0JEjIW5RHn7U66-cjTFSPN1WS4hl7xd_4cH-57qEqjnJy9iUhOqRY3RJ2ZkObIXFpS0Vs1yvPkEATA5aziQAcNCW0JtwbEUThCO2SOgAgFKgNYwn8QqV3AmuYhISrlBAcfcazvda976jVN51ye3E9XHWPyt9_0Y5L8BzwOew77x6_ioD7SeqfCA5zun1Pg98X50zttE9bv1qTHVFo9JzzYFHczKMTm5ktPzGkkGJyWAWWlsPu6vXEo-jB0UXB8hl998_-vFTwAAAP__ey5ewQ) late Wednesday. They include the real names of previously blacked-out associates and connections, though not in a list form.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

**Good Morning**! ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PpSAUQH8NdhgE_KCg2MbubbulQbjq3YC8wB2N_37ypp7-JOfk_HstL4cRz_2vS2Bpy4vzhBcsHddc6kU3wW4AElQDthuFVuOoJ9UctjcKoAcHg1-DWgc39UMYVz8ZA5MZTYNWCqlFJ3Qn-l5MbbeqVZhhM0FKr7VhWkBAyqX9n_GkA7b45AtK63Nqoj2I3pWpP0zOTM73fbc3uAJ0QML9oOeDMTm7QugjVCZnysE9HE-eMCK58vADK-XycJ8j8QoxVl7gyvGCUjll_lX5_lGeCU5icm6KDe8bY8Q6jEyLPTmMPz3025zvAAAA__8vhmlz)) Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQANCvsbcg--6AePBQKWIqXTsig89wrYGIuKn691XVMdnf8t77oQ-SZZvfwsq-pH0IU5E7D_ZEJ6CBdPSJGRg1e9sawralM-rFjzZFSza44BinJkWKGAjIQaQaHGvxYICMNWRNXZtzZUccjWuSiwATkVNkOErZj-pjl60snPLPfuejmvZVZ7-Ucr0pfFHQKegeiYKuD7NMr7J9_hnsWOElXr8lZ7k1rSIzr0Hyv22-yqrwQkYf_rnR5dn_NwAA__9UpFqT). ## Epstein File Released With Names
A trove of 40 court documents related to sex offender Jeffrey Epstein was [released by a federal court](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ_G7hwty58pKL4mXb72SgsvS0JEjIW5RHn7U66-cjTFSPN1WS4hl7xd_4cH-57qEqjnJy9iUhOqRY3RJ2ZkObIXFpS0Vs1yvPkEATA5aziQAcNCW0JtwbEUThCO2SOgAgFKgNYwn8QqV3AmuYhISrlBAcfcazvda976jVN51ye3E9XHWPyt9_0Y5L8BzwOew77x6_ioD7SeqfCA5zun1Pg98X50zttE9bv1qTHVFo9JzzYFHczKMTm5ktPzGkkGJyWAWWlsPu6vXEo-jB0UXB8hl998_-vFTwAAAP__ey5ewQ) late Wednesday. They include the real names of previously blacked-out associates and connections, though not in a list form. Instead, the documents comprise over 900 pages of depositions, transcribed interviews, emails, and other evidence, with previously redacted names now revealed. [You can read the documents in full here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fy6yAQheGnQZ2ZZVlLckFxi6vOaVMyCBZ7EyQ0FnImb59x6jRnTvfN_3711yBF1ttbWNi1XH2ITZ7szYlOSJ665DIzsu3YmQHIDgONtru7GXIIox0jBjLcQ5gHpDhCtj2eIYVOHAISGCAD5zOM2sx2hkufLwkxEl0UASdp9aE_qqztzrl81yc_dKxLV9y9tW1X9p_CSeF0bKWGtOvbIYuOVR-fCqcXoHAC85rXm2QNxf_f9say-lTjsfDadr2l3D1c2r6kFNn7QRHcliDll2p_df8EAAD__yEjV7g) In one document, it's alleged by an Epstein accuser that former President [Bill Clinton liked younger girls](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO6yAQheGnwR0W4ImJC4rbuMttt7QcGJKJMFgwijdvv_LWW5-vOPq_bsttpUT58X_d0HEsy-qZ3rhoCdLAAl1wEdHg0KHTVsFgLVyH7umsNdZe7l5Fq9bRB9DXYKcweh9h1NZ25IwyoLQCrS4Xde31fbiraYxTMMYDTAIUBuJS-1ehzE-M6VPeWHtfti65J_PexPBPmFmY-TiOPpbvjEc7d2HmvSRi8k2YOZa6YZV7xUYBM0ufKHPJMq8bBklZvjDGih-Je2Ok3E5xwkSNu-rCflBK1EYrQD22ldLvCf6ryE8AAAD___jMZLE). Clinton has denied all accusations regarding Epstein. Another document says that magician David Copperfield had dinner with Epstein and a few girls and ["did some magic tricks."](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyrCAUgOGnwQ4H4ay4BcVt7Pa2KR0WDnoSFAaIZt8-k9Sp_-af7-2xPCxFOtb_dkfTQlqsa3TiMnDgEhbovAmIElWHZtAClNYwqW4zLmjEJ2ihx5ueRjEqmBRYGIIAOU2hIyOFBDEIGMTtJqZ-eKqnuI_h7qV0AHcGAj21VPr3REfbMMRXOrH0Lu1dNFtruTL1j8mZyfm6rj6krwOv-tOZnHOK1MhVJmdvT_LcpZyxBMLouY0RV_TxxT0dBxaOuTakg5_kGu2V73Ylx1sh91G5S5-lcZ9c7Yrx-aIYqY6agVh3S_F3qP2l8x0AAP__Y51otg) Newsweek has printed a list of over 70 names names in the documents. [That can be found here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gwjGO7oEjjLmlfaWEYEiIMeYbYyn79Kqm3ulc6zdH5d5kvJsSQblezkq4-z8bWsNMsOXLAGRunPRGQakjLXqDqexxUc9e2WxQMnXXKSE-dACuswXHsYFhOTmITNAhAIQVK0XViaOWiFjGe_OgALOLIUJALNW_tI4dU7-TjO--0tTavTdT3Wp-FqTODicF0HEe7lvRhDCZK_FUYTImOz3z_g7zf6M3pWSqFxGMolYfE_StGbgp3-YdS4dnzZFYqfKOdTCTHYDIbP5_l-v9irs2m3fMIMYZy6hmK22pC_BrVv_L8BgAA__9WyGbE) More documents are expected to be released in the coming weeks. The people named aren't accused of wrongdoing, but they show the high level of clout Epstein courted before his arrest. He died an apparent suicide in prison.
## Bombs in Iran Kills 100 at Mass Gathering
Two explosions killed nearly 100 Iranians at a ceremony in Iran to commemorate Qassem Soleimani, an Iranian terrorist killed by a U.S. drone in 2020. Iran blamed unspecified "terrorists" for the blasts and vowed revenge. [See video here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL0SmzAQBp9GdMechDB2QZGGzmlTMod02JfRDyPJJn77jFOn_b5md3_d1ztJkPT4SZHntueVXJM3rxosGLvazs87s-Gh41lPaIdpstehe87kcNebHnYeJ-PRXnh0yJZ2fXXeMXYyGzQWNVqN44jXXm_DhrfLfvPGOGtvyiJ7abn0v7Ok9uQ9fPKbS-9y7ML8bO2oavihzKLMcp5nX_jVuNTv_11yCV6ZJYr3gYGpNmUWKZQgsheCwkcuDfjPEXKVnCAxFXi8qPgKLsdIyXOBmgNLpCQVWo4bUEry5lKpfOBrAKgBB2WWrsz-OCUEqZdJWXxEkvAPtv2v3N8AAAD__0kwceM) No group claimed responsibility for the bombings. A White House official in Washington said it appeared to be a type of attack carried out in the past by Islamic State militants. The Iran bombings come a day after Israel blew up an apartment building in Lebanon, killing a top Hamas leader and raising fears of a wider war. On Wednesday, the [Israeli military and Hezbollah in Lebanon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQxfGnMd2g8ccuULi4Dd3eNiUa4wEcGYxsZ1H26aNNnfac5qf_x2N6UIjhWP_TzrYuaaK5hidPEgwoM5nG24VZsW7Yyg6N7jrT62azHfleLsppzQrJsUOnexqwm5mWW89NsAqVQYlG4u2GfSuddjjcl8ErNRszCIPsQ025_UzhqBsv8Ts9Obdz2ptot1rPIvQ_oUahxuu62sxflXN5_-8l5eiFGvfgfWRgKlWoceOXSzHSBqFk4gh0nkwZSlgPinAk8FxCZihnZvKw0ovgogxvLKAE1EKNTbb-vEKModw7YXDdKcRfV_0r0k8AAAD__7OZaRI) both issued statements indicating no desire to expand the conflict.
## List: The Top 15 Jobs People Want to Quit
Many tech workers say they plan to find a new job, and healthcare workers aren't far behind, according to a [new list of the top 15 jobs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSozAMQL_GdGJkWUAoKK6hy7VXMgLk4IzBHHjD5O93svU2r3nNm_fvPtwlxLA9_sqqXfZpkCmHlw4WGIgHLubOq5K6QjvbILum4Zsrlm5s2css9kbWkxXnbeWctFRXs0qNYxE6QmK0yBarCm-lHd2Ibe3bmWhibg2jziGno3ymsOVFfXynlx7llNYidkvO-2ncH0O9of66rnLaxukjDfWE5Az1lj5gQ31eFJ5pPGHXtEeFNZ0ZLtky5AT_v0KGtCns8j7BMiMizClGOU4QeKsc5ZLXWBzdvF8hxnDWjWF8rBLiT07-7c13AAAA__8WqWN3) that employees say they plan to leave within the next six months. Those two fields, tech and healthcare, dominate Payscale's latest list of roles workers say they want to leave. In some cases, employees may simply want a better job in the same career, and in others, the career itself is the problem. Two-thirds of senior product managers say they're seeking a new job despite its median $144,000 salary. Nearly as many line cooks say the same, with a median annual pay of $32,200. [See the full list here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSozAMQL_GdGJkWUAoKK6hy7VXMgLk4IzBHHjD5O93svU2r3nNm_fvPtwlxLA9_sqqXfZpkCmHlw4WGIgHLubOq5K6QjvbILum4Zsrlm5s2css9kbWkxXnbeWctFRXs0qNYxE6QmK0yBarCm-lHd2Ibe3bmWhibg2jziGno3ymsOVFfXynlx7llNYidkvO-2ncH0O9of66rnLaxukjDfWE5Az1lj5gQ31eFJ5pPGHXtEeFNZ0ZLtky5AT_v0KGtCns8j7BMiMizClGOU4QeKsc5ZLXWBzdvF8hxnDWjWF8rBLiT07-7c13AAAA__8WqWN3)

Bombs in Iran Kills 100 at Mass Gathering Two explosions killed nearly 100 Iranians at a ceremony in Iran to commemorate Qassem Soleimani, an Iranian terrorist killed by a U.S. drone in 2020. Iran blamed unspecified "terrorists" for the blasts and vowed revenge. No group claimed responsibility for the bombings. A White House official in Washington said it appeared to be a type of attack carried out in the past by Islamic State militants. In some cases, employees may simply want a better job in the same career, and in others, the career itself is the problem. Two-thirds of senior product managers say they're seeking a new job despite its median $144,000 salary. Nearly as many line cooks say the same, with a median annual pay of $32,200. **BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media 's latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. Trump - 33%

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories."

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99b8e79e315d4cb5a21a7a189103cc23&_e=Do-djDoUlktX0_5b70dzHz64Jfp5ZRPilG-rCIcVfrAhvour6mUpsAGUXoFSb_FQeX7L0qgjPFnofdBd2J5t95KoPhzrSSgbWNFMtgpkMmvw9VbRTIOUSlxmehSonm5TxzJ__6fvboA0-InVldSKw08Har-9lPlxg_t72fNYLgnSs1zfSaP__CPZSUxyG5dHrLHe3DlUVA6sEpOUAQxuVX534WyKKsxz4BOuSttlQEjs4IJsOuVyo8OW6IZxyBvWqt8kSZm7bavlv51kfEWBPxyd1LVWdWfo-0YcedGz5_8AEx_UgRq7gmmyZMn4FO0z1sMxH4oMVFfFBZhJElcQOywo2U5xWrgJZKFu-EZEwFLJKoMyX308bKLPSMJoKcGLbNmY9oPx6TeqsnfWhrvgfg%3D%3D) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I'm "infecting the public with conspiracy," "one step away from Nazi propaganda," and "selling sinister lies."

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99b8e79e315d4cb5a21a7a189103cc23&_e=Do-djDoUlktX0_5b70dzHz64Jfp5ZRPilG-rCIcVfrAhvour6mUpsAGUXoFSb_FQeX7L0qgjPFnofdBd2J5t95KoPhzrSSgbWNFMtgpkMmvw9VbRTIOUSlxmehSonm5TxzJ__6fvboA0-InVldSKw08Har-9lPlxg_t72fNYLgnSs1zfSaP__CPZSUxyG5dHrLHe3DlUVA6sEpOUAQxuVX534WyKKsxz4BOuSttlQEjs4IJsOuVyo8OW6IZxyBvW34_NoddHDCKSFICllEqDm5RqchvnT_aJJJebcwpY6MBZV26rPxB1SXGV0L_BttzErIES8wmDRpHn-CUqG6ItY6HZRjVGfHjzw_AO8ZqL7nwZGtoOzFa9iLRdE6oFYho1P74GAw2vOj4KTAPWbDQfAw%3D%3D)

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don't let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we're bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you'll tune in for the TRUTH.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8df29e3d4aad4a2389e228811d3fa4fa&_e=HMuSMviYFJJT8HYYCH_48GllSgDAXE2KbHzg8ntaautHTTFLRCW3e0Wo1BVbBpgpTOCsrvbClVC5A78yQ4lpeysSHA7XiVLg3pXkbY7odZkB4b8t7nBCz6kZVbLlfsiS_fP3DM7ub_R4rv9PMwh3YMHBdxdoqnL9Qh4sCAiOMNQ1c7SnoUUhyE5-QFi_qu2dwSIspy7A83DXE4Yx56mM91JAusjJCuPyhVm2UThyRklWY75ftXmBd9SEqOFucGjMMo3Nk-VrTUj989TgJqk_hph9E_RzqNdLe56lTe1tpyE9VJn4QU37fRF63PGLD3LTpr4eLZOcBSbFGj_zh-HJV4iRU-GHGfop0wgY-k1_OWhJfu3X4SvqHAbPsz-v7WMP9FwIeSJSNLw-oP7KFSLP5w%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8df29e3d4aad4a2389e228811d3fa4fa&_e=HMuSMviYFJJT8HYYCH_48GllSgDAXE2KbHzg8ntaautHTTFLRCW3e0Wo1BVbBpgpTOCsrvbClVC5A78yQ4lpeysSHA7XiVLg3pXkbY7odZkB4b8t7nBCz6kZVbLlfsiS_fP3DM7ub_R4rv9PMwh3YMHBdxdoqnL9Qh4sCAiOMNQ1c7SnoUUhyE5-QFi_qu2dwSIspy7A83DXE4Yx56mM91JAusjJCuPyhVm2UThyRklG1bGBUASHF_wcG4aAQV5Cced2lPla3jwQGHLsphNVfdIwKzcPveMXpwbYTgVqUUrPYUw_DN0GhsA39RgsEcIXonPrgy8sQoh7QZgIskVD80HLqXJJXyGvY4-7mOiB6lPv2ZVl-oK3D5LMNG2x7b7QY_ucGAg_y7toLXa0IEl6UQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8df29e3d4aad4a2389e228811d3fa4fa&_e=HMuSMviYFJJT8HYYCH_48GllSgDAXE2KbHzg8ntaautHTTFLRCW3e0Wo1BVbBpgpTOCsrvbClVC5A78yQ4lpeysSHA7XiVLg3pXkbY7odZkB4b8t7nBCz6kZVbLlfsiS_fP3DM7ub_R4rv9PMwh3YMHBdxdoqnL9Qh4sCAiOMNQ1c7SnoUUhyE5-QFi_qu2dwSIspy7A83DXE4Yx56mM91JAusjJCuPyhVm2UThyRkkycqke_9d_70-pVC428DHoKZhjRKcF8kEH-6L0suyY96XSsQx3QsE5GKtWp1WVrfa6XMnAkDZ2bM6daQvYGCjS_mLrlgzADob0VfoKQd8vwZyy2C1i4oD3zpGH4k34J764I5ILkJqcyJnXZBGhDALwHeDayNMHMcK8oRdUo3hYpg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservatives Give

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe6f9804e0ddc2e3aa0861d1ea2ca8e9a94012cacc82a103b8f24e3a1d91470af4edb2ca7b1d6566d6ecf489ce3519e142c2d772caff3ec0393f87e8785a3f6a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe6f9804e0ddc2e3aa0861d1ea2ca8e9a94012cacc82a103b8f24e3a1d91470af4edb2ca7b1d6566d6ecf489ce3519e142c2d772caff3ec0393f87e8785a3f6a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d8e4e8d749741ecb1833fb35e54bfa2&_e=Szk6sH08-SrHxTs8eirTIgQM7MSSOsIC-44eUGB0Ao5woJqXcJqXofrY5waYlrwhkIP7tzPhylCnhqoDip54U6PbLnviK7tjeCjXV4NI-RTWdcSHf3vxbs6jHygqkXOZ2xaIyw3C8hjNpsBQAPEFBsuVPvKsPrAiTWFQIEG2u2pMEkCg4kJX8H3jVi1tTbcAOM2z3PxFLSVxa8ocGWb0BRAMjInhDza-548COYD9J3_efrJU0IEHiJnSrUCs0ZGHq1fn7MXFMTNih8zVZVoOrw3ISzKD9BxzBdg2i-v_aKdxggeugJyuHEDiqEeGv1JKS70u9tg4AMhJX9FEfwhs5c176ryL5XUoBb0jLeN41dbahw3VFiWt-j-4yDBGh7gnZ7cYIkA4ztVmUGAWup3dnA%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d8e4e8d749741ecb1833fb35e54bfa2&_e=Szk6sH08-SrHxTs8eirTIgQM7MSSOsIC-44eUGB0Ao5woJqXcJqXofrY5waYlrwhkIP7tzPhylCnhqoDip54U6PbLnviK7tjeCjXV4NI-RTWdcSHf3vxbs6jHygqkXOZ2xaIyw3C8hjNpsBQAPEFBsuVPvKsPrAiTWFQIEG2u2pMEkCg4kJX8H3jVi1tTbcAOM2z3PxFLSVxa8ocGWb0BRAMjInhDza-548COYD9J38TJX0ReKQ_LlqtILT6PJwjHZnvUQgflR2YeMtN4eCGjpest9xcDo24Apy4GCvCMxSSwrVxyo3QAbGa0SYQHTl4-iUjdX52OsCZckLySatRTJmuPByrQIxkFyQDn6ZLU9dm-JdbqmKU8CDRLUsnmVB58liQR2yczV-qYcpDKXym4g%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d8e4e8d749741ecb1833fb35e54bfa2&_e=Szk6sH08-SrHxTs8eirTIgQM7MSSOsIC-44eUGB0Ao5woJqXcJqXofrY5waYlrwhkIP7tzPhylCnhqoDip54U6PbLnviK7tjeCjXV4NI-RTWdcSHf3vxbs6jHygqkXOZ2xaIyw3C8hjNpsBQAPEFBsuVPvKsPrAiTWFQIEG2u2pMEkCg4kJX8H3jVi1tTbcAOM2z3PxFLSVxa8ocGWb0BRAMjInhDza-548COYD9J3_1pu6251qLDZZ_oeszQDqKTiUJb9ljxxcpyRXx5RR0bu8zevzPLuC15mAwJL0nEWYo6HOWeRKguvALnZ_mBC7KVRszdvBh2d2N90q-m3M5alL8z7Qa92sOfMdTI9jYQtaeAtntTHIEjcnWg0FhVrk-BTKuVByjLYIWMpC2NtUuZw%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution

These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong
# And Here’s Why>>

---
Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

“Am I worried about this? Absolutely not.”

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

[“Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years.”](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CF6hfFOtd7umP0WPyDBz5w~~/AARclAA~)

This looming dollar devaluation could potentially be a financial earthquake that devastates the economy, Wall Street, and your retirement savings.

That’s why [**you should read this 100% free, no-strings-attached guide while you still can.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qmjy4t5VNeSEG0-2tNj-dg~~/AARclAA~)

Thousands of insiders are already using [this legal loophole](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QhsuBEgsd5WKx-jQGxUgUw~~/AARclAA~) to take back control of their retirement.
