name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a02c51564b84b8ab6a0ea45f2069487&_e=i1jP31PvcUqA2WzAW0fUM_VK6jLloqc2CKWklpNqhfuItFdPneGLn7JI2auRYgNV6Kfm5bLgjb34BtMfaqF-iNq4SoBIRQV7dR86Are83qHPw5HPT1QgOKvYLYk3rZok4AGaXXvbLi7N81kLsTV-zJ8DNoSnnRs6VfWwrfw2aMPArSR4Z1Td9aKC9-dFgUNI-LBSZC3v4ubsgzrsgs-pBoAaOZhgbDaUtuOOQ4ENf-2whov4EzVrq68MSTcBRdbsbLo3zBgEUaHr-pBjBbAgenNswX2oL5QB2aMxje1Hp4xMBaYzyiBmfmbRpXj57JJ10TZO6M6d5je-FGR-G4zcc0DYCB7KvwNVgcNrwE0e_t5mehlBs_MKSXb_95e9fy18uv9CvZQHYMqR_AtCbKwDQa2KPo-JS-8L-XaOWeBDZ7g%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a02c51564b84b8ab6a0ea45f2069487&_e=i1jP31PvcUqA2WzAW0fUM_VK6jLloqc2CKWklpNqhfuItFdPneGLn7JI2auRYgNV6Kfm5bLgjb34BtMfaqF-iNq4SoBIRQV7dR86Are83qHPw5HPT1QgOKvYLYk3rZok4AGaXXvbLi7N81kLsTV-zJ8DNoSnnRs6VfWwrfw2aMPArSR4Z1Td9aKC9-dFgUNI-LBSZC3v4ubsgzrsgs-pBoAaOZhgbDaUtuOOQ4ENf-2whov4EzVrq68MSTcBRdbsY7Ig3OENfkc8ZKaBoxEZnI9qNwWQMIbPYg6CaDx7rAayyCvSI4ghrZQTlN3vsmzPWyPuUF0PJnlgvlKrnrv3b86jSYH_t6gxVSr66t_MDJ9SlWWK2RkTbxIW6mv_gLL4lBrlm0LS5-2rYkq5lmmlr6kHwN5Kksx6cpbKi6Msq4g%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a02c51564b84b8ab6a0ea45f2069487&_e=i1jP31PvcUqA2WzAW0fUM_VK6jLloqc2CKWklpNqhfuItFdPneGLn7JI2auRYgNV6Kfm5bLgjb34BtMfaqF-iNq4SoBIRQV7dR86Are83qHPw5HPT1QgOKvYLYk3rZok4AGaXXvbLi7N81kLsTV-zJ8DNoSnnRs6VfWwrfw2aMPArSR4Z1Td9aKC9-dFgUNI-LBSZC3v4ubsgzrsgs-pBoAaOZhgbDaUtuOOQ4ENf-2whov4EzVrq68MSTcBRdbsgUbeGxaQfioVFT85JQb-BVEScCk84yEwkwewk29_HL1Uc15jHs8S9x8ZeI5GrMrCiQQhrQvn9FlmUa7VnXYPdCv9TqsdQDEpbGCju20WOA7uDDepZdOMgOI0_JBOJV6BYnDGO5pd9XsScZufy10TS5siHhdOFjDWM1han46uE6s%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a02c51564b84b8ab6a0ea45f2069487&_e=i1jP31PvcUqA2WzAW0fUM_VK6jLloqc2CKWklpNqhfuItFdPneGLn7JI2auRYgNV6Kfm5bLgjb34BtMfaqF-iNq4SoBIRQV7dR86Are83qHPw5HPT1QgOKvYLYk3rZok4AGaXXvbLi7N81kLsTV-zJ8DNoSnnRs6VfWwrfw2aMPArSR4Z1Td9aKC9-dFgUNI-LBSZC3v4ubsgzrsgs-pBoAaOZhgbDaUtuOOQ4ENf-2whov4EzVrq68MSTcBRdbs56MUoMJmeQDu13Fjj-NGBYvWAg2aa5GqZ8VrNaW8sG4mQxZBt-bqashOH5j6kqyjAoGOUlDE2bZigyJ7pTfNuX6uzlnfnYx_UWold9zbM_guBEpIZW8El8ZTGpP7moOwIGfMrcAyQNq6kzTxtXVzaobVsD8GEx4n1ENnHqAW2bs%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a02c51564b84b8ab6a0ea45f2069487&_e=i1jP31PvcUqA2WzAW0fUM_VK6jLloqc2CKWklpNqhfuItFdPneGLn7JI2auRYgNV6Kfm5bLgjb34BtMfaqF-iNq4SoBIRQV7dR86Are83qHPw5HPT1QgOKvYLYk3rZok4AGaXXvbLi7N81kLsTV-zJ8DNoSnnRs6VfWwrfw2aMPArSR4Z1Td9aKC9-dFgUNI-LBSZC3v4ubsgzrsgs-pBoAaOZhgbDaUtuOOQ4ENf-2whov4EzVrq68MSTcBRdbsaAW5ry6iv6llmHCli9oiEo9lPUd2QavyondNNwekfAixzwE8mm1BzCaAtzbM3hONc9DiPuX4a0A9bZpdPknkCoklY9FwrhjsVLRnj0wepFyGWqgovgm3hQFes_E4tB6KbVGvtUIJr3PRLBn1iISCPekMcYXbbH2YY5MW3oyVEDI%3D)**

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: This is how we beat the MAGA anti-democracy movement
body:
The support we received from thousands of folks like you is nothing short of amazing.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V_kIijrlew_rypGacmDCw1djLl2NUoRedi89b9fYk0MJnSsYiBhDJultHXINMB453AQT7zOuOQExTQwsPrkLT1-RC3-Ocon2PgRUvMberRLNedR3uCKwcFb3jDl7sRm-hVJ9v-uysRn_3z3izD6UVFHRNo51NAuzJnNkJxdaM-eGarlIyfX3t3TUrcyZlccWpHX6Qjk3ICtv9qlMLjCmnA==&c=NcnEFBC9mi5ooH_bEUaFL5tOJLq11XSaJgROFdO6P6ASNG8UHvs-3Q==&ch=EqztiXO90pbn2pOLk4RKDwt48qpM5e4UM0MWYgl8ThyWOB4U098bhQ==)
---

Friend,
I just wanted to take a minute to say thank you--something that doesn't get said sincerely or often enough in the business of campaigns and politics.
But I truly mean it: the support this team got from thousands of folks like you from all over the country is nothing short of incredible, and encouraging. Our success sends a message to the Trump crony I am working to unseat that Americans everywhere are committing themselves to defeating their anti-democratic agenda.
With a successful first fundraising quarter under our belts, we are looking at the road ahead for this race feeling confident that we can run this race the way it should be run: putting people first, and fighting for what they need. No fake culture wars, no distractions, no nonsense.
[I am proud to have you on my side and I know that we can win, and flip the House back to Democratic control this year. If you can help my team kick off 2024 on the strongest footing possible, I appreciate anything you can give as we start this new year:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V_kIijrlew_rypGacmDCw1djLl2NUoRedi89b9fYk0MJnSsYiBhDJultHXINMB453AQT7zOuOQExTQwsPrkLT1-RC3-Ocon2PgRUvMberRLNedR3uCKwcFb3jDl7sRm-hVJ9v-uysRn_3z3izD6UVFHRNo51NAuzJnNkJxdaM-eGarlIyfX3t3TUrcyZlccWpHX6Qjk3ICtv9qlMLjCmnA==&c=NcnEFBC9mi5ooH_bEUaFL5tOJLq11XSaJgROFdO6P6ASNG8UHvs-3Q==&ch=EqztiXO90pbn2pOLk4RKDwt48qpM5e4UM0MWYgl8ThyWOB4U098bhQ==)

But I truly mean it: the support this team got from thousands of folks like you from all over the country is nothing short of incredible, and encouraging. Our success sends a message to the Trump crony I am working to unseat that Americans everywhere are committing themselves to defeating their anti-democratic agenda. subject: Crouch for Governor Campaign Releases “Conservative Fighter” Ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Crouch is leading the fight against China to protect Hoosiers

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/conservativefighter?e=8f9fef7158)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 4, 2025

MEDIA CONTACT
Robert Vane
Robert@veteranstrategies.com
Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch Releases “Conservative Fighter” Ads
Crouch is the only Republican candidate for governor who has acted against Communist China, pledges to axe Indiana’s individual income tax, and remain a courageous champion for unborn Hoosiers.
https://vimeo.com/899678221/cd4e31014b?share=copy&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Evansville, IN) - Lieutenant Governor and Republican gubernatorial candidate Suzanne Crouch’s new advertisements make it clear she is the only conservative fighting Communist China’s attempted Indiana land grabs, proposing to eliminate Hoosiers’ income tax, and casting a critical vote to protect the unborn.

Crouch’s new ads (here (https://vimeo.com/899678221/cd4e31014b?share=copy&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and here (https://vimeo.com/899679899/fffe98b3c2?share=copy&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ) make it clear she is the Republican candidate for governor with the strongest history of promoting and protecting Hoosier conservative values.

“As Governor, my administration will thoroughly vet foreign entities and governments attempting to monopolize our natural resources, safeguard our national security interests, and protect Indiana from hostile land grabs not in Hoosiers’ interests,” said Crouch.

One of Crouch’s achievements as lieutenant governor is her support for the Southern Indiana Sentinel Landscape (https://sentinellandscapes.org/landscapes/southern-indiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (SISL) project.

Located twenty miles south of Indianapolis, the Southern Indiana Sentinel Landscape protects national security by supporting military readiness at multiple military installations in Indiana and fostering partnerships to promote land conservation and sustainable land use.

The SISL faced an encroachment challenge when thousands of acres were proposed to be sold next to a military installation—until Suzanne Crouch intervened. Crouch led the fight to secure this land adjacent to NSA Crane Naval Base, a military site in southern Indiana, and enhance our national security.

"Additionally, and at my direction, the State Department of Agriculture is including in its land use study not only an audit of the economic impact of any lost land, but also a survey of who the purchasers may be and if they are countries or companies that are unfriendly to Indiana or the United States,” said Crouch.

Lt. Gov. Crouch supports the actions of Republican legislative leaders on this issue; during the last two sessions of the General Assembly, the state legislature passed:
* Senate Enrolled Act 388-2022, prohibiting foreign business entities from acquiring agricultural land for the purposes of crop farming or timber production.
* Senate Enrolled Act 477-2023, blocking China, Iran, North Korea, and Russia, countries deemed a threat to critical infrastructure from buying or leasing land next to military facilities.

To learn more about how Suzanne is the only conservative Republican fighting China, proposing an elimination of Indiana’s individual income tax, and casting the key votes to protect unborn Hoosiers, please visit her web site at www.crouchforindiana.com (https://crouchforindiana.com/protect-indiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
###

============================================================
Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch

body:
Asked whether we're on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.
| | | |
---|---|---
---
# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong
# And Here's Why>>

---
Asked whether we're on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

"Am I worried about this? Absolutely not."

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what's happening to the US Dollar is not something you should "keep an eye on"...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they're now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

["Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years."](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9279f0595bb34ae682d803be096adf0b&_e=1Q817dQ7jwWmmA24wT_QBfLq2VIWjVyX5X0DmvKFc4xcAK5pG4YJI908T8mc3m9Ll-f3wkQYKPbnOeIzcc7mO1GaG4CcDORcS1Vi3LgozJpAmxp4B8hIZnoPmtNqe3G2eHwS6uORYDOIlxjBDBKZqZEsXhsmXdmyJ3dRsnzDshF1Ni_o_iT8zuRaBCRcdjO8Nt_QjYfbl5_ihAZIGZ9noUO5mgpql4vVZKRlOHq3KsLV61NJg4HJB0IRNOP-Admp9538OJWOa5KmgaDTfEFcKOLegw_1dNsKXAnEFpACr7LM2HJ3L0FQUFQfn77uuolPioSopJowTqblwmCSIcSZk-5ROvwGYx_iDbR5ZCfwaIJeYBrpgIkR6oiHic-wyKU_M_jAiyERiIyQjRliGCQJfnIYIr_XT5F0X_mTzYBXCAVbEAYiA3m4BFaWyv7OCrB4bVxkNWu3FvB92yt65lR77WTlgHGQ5DQ-pLegUn_vFvdtCA1uBUbVvVEUWJuexygT)

This looming dollar devaluation could potentially be a financial earthquake that devastates the economy, Wall Street, and your retirement savings.

That's why [**you should read this 100% free, no-strings-attached guide while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9279f0595bb34ae682d803be096adf0b&_e=1Q817dQ7jwWmmA24wT_QBfLq2VIWjVyX5X0DmvKFc4xcAK5pG4YJI908T8mc3m9Ll-f3wkQYKPbnOeIzcc7mO1GaG4CcDORcS1Vi3LgozJpAmxp4B8hIZnoPmtNqe3G2eHwS6uORYDOIlxjBDBKZqZEsXhsmXdmyJ3dRsnzDshF1Ni_o_iT8zuRaBCRcdjO8Nt_QjYfbl5_ihAZIGZ9noUO5mgpql4vVZKRlOHq3KsLV61NJg4HJB0IRNOP-Admp9538OJWOa5KmgaDTfEFcKOLegw_1dNsKXAnEFpACr7LM2HJ3L0FQUFQfn77uuolPB6vsV6c2W3i0yKHVtXLh6r5b9KQu_o2rdnPjcXcmGyDbpsZGABKhaIwzMucZJnnHpCyOleUKkQpe-_or2hg4OjBuvORLZNdu8EK3zWUbfxAL7I0UVtxbC_bBhuRBh-8vzGwrSQebepwQr-Pf8VJ4TpQ4d79lI-Qxs0xvk526AEjMvUGrZkcpjc3DCK6qY7fR)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Honesty. Authenticity. Trust.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
These are the characteristics of RFK Jr.

|
---
| | | **These are the characteristics of RFK Jr.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=battle_1_4_24_email_1rs_2_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Robert F Kennedy Jr. rocked Arizona, and the Associated Press couldn’t help but report the news.
While we are pleased our campaign continues to garner great coverage, what we are most excited about are voters like you – _Americans who are going to pull the lever for RFK Jr_.
**Here are what a few of our supporters shared for the record (and you can read the entire post below):**
| _“I like that I can trust him. I think he’s honest.”_
---
_“And even if I don’t agree with him, I know that he came to his conclusions honestly. I can’t trust any of the other people.”_
_“I like that he talks to us like adults.”_
Trust. Honesty. Authenticity. These are the characteristics of RFK Jr.
These should be the characteristics of your next President.
[With your continued support, the MainStream Media and others will have no choice except to cover our campaign for the White House.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=battle_1_4_24_email_1rs_2_nd&n=2)
Together, we can heal the divide, restore a prosperous and healthy middle class, compete economically around the world, and protect our rights.
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=battle_1_4_24_email_1rs_2_nd&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=battle_1_4_24_email_1rs_2_nd&n=4)
**JONATHAN J. COOPER ASSOCIATED PRESS PHOENIX** | Some voted for Donald Trump, others for Joe Biden. A few had never wanted anything to do with politics before they heard Robert F. Kennedy Jr. on a podcast or YouTube video.
Lined up outside a Phoenix wedding hall tucked between a freeway, a railroad track and a U-Haul rental center, the hundreds of people who turned out Wednesday to hear Mr. Kennedy speak shared little in common ideologically. What united them was a deep-seated distrust — of the media, of corporations and especially of the government — and a belief that Mr. Kennedy is the only person in politics willing to tell them the truth.
“I like that he talks to us like adults,” said Gilbert Limon, a 48-year-old pharmacist from Phoenix. “He tells you the majority of what you need to know. Whereas I feel like [other politicians] just give you bits and pieces to try to fit their agenda. I’ve had enough of that.”
Voters are not enthusiastic about a Biden-Trump rematch, and alternatives like Mr. Kennedy or the No Labels third party movement, which would typically be long shots, see an opening. Mr. Kennedy’s appearance in a 2024 battleground state highlights how he could influence the election in ways that are tough to predict. Allies of both Mr. Trump and Mr. Biden have expressed concerns that Mr. Kennedy’s independent bid could pull votes from their candidate in next year’s expected general election rematch.
Candidates from outside the Republican and Democratic parties rarely make a splash, if they can make the ballot to begin with. But third-party candidates don’t usually carry a famous last name like Mr. Kennedy’s, or his existing network of supporters.
Mr. Kennedy made the stop in Phoenix as part of his laborious push to get access to the 2024 presidential ballot as an independent candidate, which he figures will require him to collect at least 1 million signatures across the country. Aides mingled in the crowd, filling up his petitions to qualify in Arizona.
Ballot access for independent and minor-party candidates is an expensive and complicated process, with each state setting its own rules. Campaigns usually hire people to collect signatures and enlist an army of lawyers to fight for ballot access.
American Values 2024, a super PAC supporting Mr. Kennedy, has pledged to spend $15 million to help him get on the ballot in 10 states. Mr. Kennedy secured a victory in Utah, where the lieutenant governor pushed back the deadline to qualify from January to March after Mr. Kennedy filed suit.
Mr. Kennedy is a member of one of the Democratic Party’s most famous families — his father was the attorney general for his uncle, President John F. Kennedy. But he’s more recently built closer ties to the far right, where his conspiratorial and isolationist views are at home.
Enriqueta Porras, a 52-year old physician from Phoenix, voted for Hillary Clinton in 2016 and Mr. Trump in 2020. She said she’s torn about the third-party conundrum. She’d like to vote for someone she believes in, like Mr. Kennedy, but also wants to make sure Mr. Biden loses and may vote strategically.
“I don’t want to be that person,” Ms. Porras said, “but I feel like there’s a lot at stake and that may just have to happen.”
One of the nation’s most prominent anti-vaccine activists, Mr. Kennedy has long had a loyal following of people who reject the scientific consensus that vaccines are safe and effective, and they form the backbone of his presidential campaign.
Among the dozen Kennedy supporters who spoke to The Associated Press in Phoenix, many share his view that corporations, especially drug companies, wield too much power.
Curt Eastin, a 65-year-old professional coach from Chandler, a Phoenix suburb, voted for Mr. Biden in 2020 but won’t again. If Mr. Kennedy weren’t running, he’d vote for Mr. Trump next year, he said.
“I like that I can trust him. I think he’s honest,” he said. “And even if I don’t agree with him, I know that he came to his conclusions honestly. I can’t trust any of the other people.”
Mr. Kennedy is keenly aware that his fans avoid the mainstream media. He said he’s drawing support from young people but struggling with people in his generation.
“The problem with the baby boomers, I think, is they get their news from MSNBC, Fox and CNN,” he told the crowd in Phoenix, which responded with boos. “Whereas young people are getting their news from podcasts and other alternative sources.”
Third party or independent candidates rarely do well in presidential contests. Even the most successful recent example, Ross Perot in 1992, didn’t win a single electoral vote despite winning 19% of the popular vote.
Sometimes, minor-party candidates will get enough votes that partisans will blame them for tipping the scales to elect the popular vote loser, like Ralph Nader in 2000 or Jill Stein in 2016, both Green Party candidates.
“One of the biggest reasons I like him is because of his stance on partisanship in our House and our Senate, and I like how he wants to try and reunite both of them,” said Michael Chacon, a 23-year-old student in Tempe who has never voted and still wasn’t sure whether he will in 2024. “I think that’s a really good idea. I think cooperation would go a long way.”

subject: Donald Trump's BIG LIES won't stop!

body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76434854/447521675/18334046?refcode=UTS_EN_14DO_240104_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzOThjNTkyLTAxYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=69E5ff1jjKmu-RJCWRBniUaUvmofec8XL3aip2q4QTs=)
**Peter — Donald Trump has consistently asserted that there was significant voter fraud in the states he lost during the 2016 and 2020 elections.** Intriguingly, even states with Republican leadership have invested millions in uncovering such fraud, only to come up empty-handed.
Your opinion is crucial in this unfolding narrative. Tell us what you think:

| Dear Peter, Happy New Year! We're kicking off 2024 strong by continuing to travel the state and bringing together women who stand for common sense! Our first three Women for Common Sense events in Morris, Ocean, and Somerset have been nothing short of sensational, and today we're excited to announce our next event! Get ready to mark your calendars because...
**Our first Luncheon of the new year is happening on Thursday, February 1st at 1PM in Mercer County at Leonardo's Italian Restaurant**(2021 US Highway 1, Lawrenceville, NJ 08646). We're lining up some extraordinary special guests, and of course, **Bill Spadea will be there!** Our last few events sold out, so **[click here to save your spot now.](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/be61af1b753c41385f14f6ec2cafbc9e/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzpLsWpLeJELEFIo8h-lQi7Yu6xiZ-O6tFZ0Kus58_zf8MwChzCVFJfhwozvnDligsRBKoKRVIykvnlu-mDOHWVALWYW66RT4w9fwB5jGbMnmFlCv0CD7XbCKozQ8bKI0NqTKtbnxn8fl_ONZJ0G0gXH8KcaLoPXVuFvwSXc4NSqFaUWZrg1_JlKtb9vHrp-1pIXCWdFcbC_YMld4YXKqpNtkTiGNK1cKZfl-RIz9yzg-ADJ1ZWk=)**

The Biden administration is suing Texas to prevent the state from
arresting migrants who flout U.S. immigration law to enter the state
illegally, the Department of Justice (DOJ) announced Wednesday. The
DOJ is making good on its threat to sue Texas over enforcing S.B. 4, a
new law signed in December 2023 that would permit local and state
authorities to arrest and prosecute

Harvard professor emeritus Alan Dershowitz said Wednesday the
unsealing of documents related to dead pedophile Jeffrey Epstein
disproved allegations against him. A federal judge unsealed documents
relating to the case against Epstein Wednesday evening. Epstein, who
had connections to many powerful people, including Prince Andrew,
committed suicide while awaiting trial after he was arrested in 2019

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4iSkC6P4Nie-FN9FI9_Uhw~~/AARclAA~/RgRneWXmP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTA0VwNzcGNCCmWUD7eWZfGdNhxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4iSkC6P4Nie-FN9FI9_Uhw~~/AARclAA~/RgRneWXmP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTA0VwNzcGNCCmWUD7eWZfGdNhxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4iSkC6P4Nie-FN9FI9_Uhw~~/AARclAA~/RgRneWXmP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTA0VwNzcGNCCmWUD7eWZfGdNhxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OEmkITWguxJfw9yhO6ptPg~~/AARclAA~/RgRneWXmP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWUD7eWZfGdNhxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GNH-U5tKymrU5-MHZJtLpA~~/AARclAA~/RgRneWXmP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpllA-3lmXxnTYcUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Al Franken
subject: If this is a joke… it’s not funny:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4684cdcf-d55f-4c1a-89e5-acdf8928f2db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I like to think I’ve got pretty thick skin, but I’m offended. [I’m so fired up that I’m going to ask you right at the top to help kick the jerk who’s pissing me off out of Congress. I’ll explain more below, but will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and Josh Riley’s campaign right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9c5e726-6594-4ebf-b102-3d47481f74fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde451bdc-83b9-44db-bb18-c8931300e48e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Marc Molinaro, the MAGA Republican representing NY-19 in Congress, voted TWICE to make Jim Jordan the Speaker of the House. When that didn’t work, he found the one guy even crazier than Jordan to actually give the job to. And if putting an anti-abortion extremist in charge of the House wasn’t bad enough, when confronted about supporting these nutsos, this is what Molinaro said: “[Upstate New Yorkers] don’t give a sh*t who the Speaker of the House is... Most of the people I represent wouldn’t know the Speaker of the House if he backed over them with a pickup truck.” Does he think we’re dumb? [I, for one, do give a sh*t who’s running our government... and I know you do, too. If you’re as pissed off as I am, I hope you’ll split a contribution between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action today to fire both Marc Molinaro AND Mike Johnson.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf742c490-d3bb-4fdd-aa36-e712f4e359e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [CHIP IN NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc167fb85-8926-496d-acca-71062ebf7157/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s clear Molinaro doesn’t think much of the people he represents. But you know who does care a hell of a lot about Upstate New Yorkers? My friend and former Senate counsel, Josh Riley. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb35f5aa-6b91-4679-a4fd-c0fe25b5d488/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(I swear I’m not actually this short... Josh is just REALLY tall.) Josh grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Endicott, NY. When the local factories closed, Josh saw his community struggle – but he worked to put himself through school and graduated from Harvard Law. In the Senate, Josh and I brought Republicans and Democrats together to actually get stuff done (yes, it really is possible)! The bills we worked on together expanded rights for survivors of domestic abuse and provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. It wasn’t easy, but Josh got them signed into law. Josh DID learn how to drive on a pickup truck, so maybe Molinaro was right about that. But he’s dead wrong if he thinks we’re too stupid to know or care that he’s voting to screw us over at every turn. [This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Josh isn’t going to get to Congress without our help. Please join me by splitting a contribution between Josh and Blue Amp Action right now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb228c0b6-2f14-4253-b149-0114610322df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77943728-5ec6-4ada-b89e-25c847ee5a42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, Al
P.S. I mean seriously, isn’t this guy such a jerk? [Give to Josh today!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fd748f9-eca5-4f9a-a76b-16765d192873/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

subject: Election year update>>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=6c2b3512c3fb4aada77bf535de4e6486&_e=5OLFZUAbaZNUTMVZsAeirsyOwu8RF_yPpC-0Ylq1nCpttC-ijBwgN857lHkH5x77_sJwdIBy2RCmvtaHZjc0547N8mCqpj67ecspunDfgns2iC2GcadmIs9VyB3l-3cCdwKePAlftwrvp9XrxERZps980xpuZfffGjKXMW3RnK6L4iWzc-pnoRwJr9Af4_nUcP7bd6d7otWpb7bCxFmdnB8In576zaqQxBDELG3vC6ijYZG6RcxH8kJEr2Qy7fFrQ2gw8ton-Hk-sdqLXR67NmLBxVM4Y7TP2WhFCKHjgCVeJWPvZOrgmME5gwJwn3IBIE5Uykv_0mc7V_WEYYdB1CHJqRC-t9RAzQSCZ-CQ4SyNe6QJR2Ck4xKfxBOD2ZWm)
---
| | Peter, This is it.

**We’re officially in an election year, and it’s time to start getting down to business.**

America can’t afford any more of Biden burdens and socialist Democrat control. **The only way to get our country back on track is to take back the U.S. Senate majority, and I won****’t rest until we succeed.**

The radical Left has done too much damage to America. They’ve put their careers and pockets before the people who voted for them.

Friend, 11 years ago, a gunman armed with an assault weapon killed 20 children and six faculty members at Sandy Hook Elementary School.
The Sandy Hook shooting was a moment of national reckoning. Americans knew then that something must be done to stop horrific shootings like this one from ever happening again. **But in the 11 years since then, the gun lobby has worked overtime to block the commonsense reforms that would have stopped future mass shootings.**

Sandy Hook, Orlando, Parkland, Uvalde, Buffalo — the list of communities devastated by assault weapons goes on and on. And it's long past time for Washington to finally listen to the majority of voters and BAN these weapons.
**Leaders like Kirsten Gillibrand are working tirelessly to protect communities from gun violence, but we all have the power to use our voice for change. That's why we're asking 5,000 people to sign our petition to support an assault weapons ban before midnight tonight. [Please, will you add your name now to keep these weapons of war away from schools, off our streets and out of our communities?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76441586/447536771/-135200433?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4698-su-nd&refcode=jtk4698-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE0ODY1Ny0wY2FiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKUXDryGJcuJ_WQ2rdLjtFc0Z4v-JG78IxeTOLAzPWE=&emci=94d2bde9-90a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ea148657-0cab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=7659029)**

Today, it feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shootings — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable.
**But this cycle _isn't_ endless. The next mass killing _isn't_ inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take _right now_ to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence.** And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms.
In 2022, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including Kirsten's legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. Kirsten won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but she needs grassroots Americans like you to stand with her.
**[So please, if you believe that we can win a future where communities are free from gun violence, will you add your name to support an assault weapons ban before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76441588/447536773/-135200433?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4698-su-nd&refcode=jtk4698-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE0ODY1Ny0wY2FiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKUXDryGJcuJ_WQ2rdLjtFc0Z4v-JG78IxeTOLAzPWE=&emci=94d2bde9-90a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ea148657-0cab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=7659029)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76441591/447536776/1575385346?code=jtk4698-su-nd&refcode=jtk4698-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE0ODY1Ny0wY2FiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKUXDryGJcuJ_WQ2rdLjtFc0Z4v-JG78IxeTOLAzPWE=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76441592/447536777/1575385346?code=jtk4698-su-nd&refcode=jtk4698-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE0ODY1Ny0wY2FiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKUXDryGJcuJ_WQ2rdLjtFc0Z4v-JG78IxeTOLAzPWE=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

That's why we're asking 5,000 people to sign our petition to support an assault weapons ban before midnight tonight. | | Today, it feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shootings — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable. But this cycle isn't endless. The next mass killing isn't inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take right now to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence. And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms. In 2022, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including Kirsten's legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. Kirsten won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but she needs grassroots Americans like you to stand with her. | | Thank you, Team Gillibrand | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=70d1affefb2a9c821c01fde14100a5562b9252a24ea6fa6a9796044ff8722118156b2ad4c96f9c8528213491765cea3df60656d058d92d998a01d1dbcaef66a6

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: re: Biden bypassed Congress to send Israel $150 million in weapons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We may have entered a new year, but the slaughter and starvation of
Palestinians in Gaza did not end in 2023, and according to Israeli Prime
Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, it will go on “for many more months.”

This comes at the very same time that President Biden simultaneously said
he wants Israel to “scale down” its military attacks on Gaza, while his
administration bypassed Congress for a second time to send Israel nearly
$150 million more in bombs and weapons to continue waging violence against
a civilian population.

The hypocrisy is astounding. The President of the United States is not
making genuine calls for peace and human rights when his administration is
paying for the weapons Israel is using to target refugee camps, hospitals,
residential buildings, and places of worship. In the words of Ilhan Omar,
it is morally indefensible.

What’s even worse is that this week, Israeli officials are hitting back at
Biden’s comments and making it clear that their intent is to clear Gaza of
its Palestinian inhabitants so that Israelis may live there — that’s
ethnic cleansing, plain and simple.

Progressive leaders like Ilhan, Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman,
and Summer Lee were the very first members of Congress to call for a
ceasefire, and they’re continuing to hold our government’s feet to the
fire as long as the Biden Administration funds the atrocities we’re
witnessing.

It’s just one of many reasons we can’t afford to lose their seats in the
U.S. House this year, and why we need your help right now:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240104.O8Gyx4&refcode=em20240104-32658&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32658%2E1203867%2EoFluRc ]Will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford to fuel
Justice Democrats’ work to re-elect our Squad incumbents and keep up the
fight for human rights for Palestinians?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240104.O8Gyx4&refcode=em20240104-32658&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=32658%2E1203867%2EoFluRc ]Contribute $3

We cannot give up on the Palestinian people. It’s up to us to ensure we
protect those in Congress with the moral clarity and courage to keep up
this critical fight.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=32658%2E1203867%2EoFluRc ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=32658%2E1203867%2EoFluRc ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240104-32658-footer&t=1023&refcode2=32658_1203867_oFluRc&akid=32658%2E1203867%2EoFluRc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=32658%2E1203867%2EoFluRc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: We need your help in 2024!
body:

| | |

|

| Dear Fellow American,

If you have already made a contribution to help Judicial Watch in 2024...thank you!
But if you haven't, I urge you to help us with [a tax-deductible gift today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66431&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2).
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66431&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We need _your_ support now to help us score _more_ victories for the rule of law so _we_ can continue to lead the national fight to keep our _elections honest_.

And we also need you to help us continue to fight in the courts to expose more evidence of Biden family corruption, expose the dangerous Biden border invasion, challenge the Biden administration's frightening conspiracy with Big Tech to censor you and other conservatives, and release documents that show the extent of the FBI's lies about its plans to target conservative Catholic Americans.

_These are critically important fights that no one else is waging as aggressively and effectively as Judicial Watch_.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66431&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We cannot trust politicians in Congress, _Republicans or Democrats_ , or liberal bureaucrats in the Biden administration to do the right thing _against_ corruption and _for_ the rule of law!

Thanks to our members, today we're clearly the most effective government watchdog in the country...but we need you to join with us now, in these critical early days of 2024.

We will be honored if you join the Judicial Watch team today...and we all wish you a very Happy New Year!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

subject: ICYMI: We Spoke on the Brian Nichols Show!
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Michael Nixon for Congress 2024]( "Paid For by Michael Nixon for Congress 2024")
body:
Addressing the Lack of Accountability from our Representatives! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2f7252b2ad72/ywzzqebcuo-12671765?e=cc1921084c)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=aa45af8476&e=cc1921084c)
---
| | Friend, All Americans, regardless of race, creed, and background, can agree that our elected representatives have moved farther away from their constituents, and into the swamp that is D.C. Which is why I enjoy speaking with community leaders, like Mr. Brian Nichols, on how 'We the People' have the power and ability to hold runaway representatives accountable. Bridging the gap between our differences has become a herculean task in recent years, as we have seen the rise of overt partisanship create unnecessary hostility and hate. Which is why, as GA-2's next congressman, I want to be the representative of all my constituents, whether they support me or not, to return to a time where we put all of our political energies into solving issues, not creating new headlines.

I cannot express enough thanks to our community, and to Mr. Nichols, for helping spread the message about our campaign to create a better, brighter future for Georgia. It’s your commitment to making a better future for our district, for our state and for our country, that we can spread the message of change for GA-2.
---
| For a Better, Brighter Future,
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=742db4f081&e=cc1921084c)

subject: Do you support Ruben Gallego’s run for Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
| [Do you support Ruben Gallego in his run for Senate in Arizona?
_Click here to let us know before midnight tonight._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76449973/447558558/230815393?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240104_1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTEwNTZmLTE0YWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i--UKwGI--B9lUNZoPdahrzl4MKr9-SsNAee70nvn0k=)
---

Peter – now that we’re officially in 2024, all eyes are on battleground states like Arizona where key Senate seats will be in play.

But here’s the twist: Arizona isn’t your normal race. Last year, Senator Kyrsten Sinema betrayed the Democratic party and is now a registered Independent. Because of this, Democrat Ruben Gallego stepped up to the plate and announced his candidacy for this seat.

_**This creates a 3-way race between Sinema, Gallego, and MAGA Republican Kari Lake.**_

Democrat Ruben Gallego serves in the House and has been a proven progressive leader, fighting for affordable health care, raising the minimum wage, and restoring abortion rights nationwide.

Meanwhile, Kyrsten Sinema votes with Republicans on key issues. At a time where there’s a 50/50 split in the Senate, we cannot let her continue to block progressive legislation!

_[With all this in mind, we’re asking 5,000 supporters to let us know where they stand on this race today>> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76449976/447558559/230815393?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240104_1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTEwNTZmLTE0YWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i--UKwGI--B9lUNZoPdahrzl4MKr9-SsNAee70nvn0k=)_

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Demand a higher minimum wage
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Groceries and Housing Cost More Than Ever, But Minimum Wage Is Still $7.25. Sign to demand a higher minimum wage >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te800fd0d-f237-48ee-a311-749349872b8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cdc0df1-dacd-406c-beaa-15667cb7ee6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Millions of hardworking people across the United States are struggling to make ends meet. From the grocery till, to the gas pump, to putting a roof over their family's heads, **workers are finding it harder and harder to afford to simply _live._** Minimum-wage workers in 22 states are getting a long-overdue raise in 2024, and this change will make a huge difference in their lives. But here's the problem: **In 20 states, the federal minimum wage will remain at a measly $7.25 an hour, unchanged since 2009, while the cost of living has skyrocketed.** That's why we're asking you to join us in demanding change. **[Sign this petition to support the Raise the Wage Act of 2023](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd6ea0b4-84f7-444c-8329-6bc8af140d18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), which aims to gradually increase the federal minimum wage to $17 an hour by 2028.** Imagine trying to provide for your family, pay rent, and buy groceries on just $7.25 an hour, especially with prices going up and up. **We are being crushed by rising inflation rates.** Costs ballooned by a whopping 8% in 2022, and remained well above a comfortable rate in 2023. **It's an impossible situation that is affecting millions -- many of whom are women, Black, and Hispanic. They deserve better. Their families deserve better.** This is our chance to make a real impact on the lives of millions of Americans who are working hard but still struggling to get by. **No one should feel like they can't afford to meet their most basic needs.** **Together, we must create a fairer and more just society where everyone has the opportunity to thrive.[Sign the petition today and let's raise the federal minimum wage for a better future for all!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4743e532-2661-486c-8de2-16d7b1cd922c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e164f1f-1d27-41a2-a079-88d252ddcc9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb557b703-98a2-460b-971c-64bc9b0ca81f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e201b18-9e06-4e92-b42f-875863909d33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a4086f8-9e4a-477b-9cd3-3c38afd7f19f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75af8e6c-8dc3-4baf-ac7f-10479fb3d6a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

Washington, District of Columbia

subject: Welcome to 2024! — message for dpwillis67@gmail.com
body:
I'm under the weather, but wanted to share a huge THANK YOU! | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fc61d5dabe&e=567664f14c)

We wanted to take a moment to express our gratitude to you, our amazing listeners and viewers, for making 2023 a fantastic year for the No Doubt About It podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti.

[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f6b5d1cf77&e=567664f14c)
In this abbreviated episode, we extend our heartfelt thanks for helping us reach our audience goals on YouTube and podcast downloads. Your support has been instrumental in our success, and we truly appreciate it.
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=18b71b61b9&e=567664f14c)
---
Unfortunately, Mark has been under the weather for almost a week, so we bring you a brief show where we discuss our plans for 2024, including diving into election year politics and keeping a close eye on the economy. We also recommend checking out Rob Reiner's new JFK Podcast.
We'll be back at full steam with a fresh, full-length episode on Monday, and we can't wait to continue the conversation with you.
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=74b2727c53&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
If you haven't already, please listen, like, and subscribe to the No Doubt About It podcast on your favorite platform and [subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=536c568c8c&e=567664f14c).

For those who want to further support the podcast, [visit our website](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=38c36bc571&e=567664f14c) where you can purchase gear and make financial donations.
Thank you again for being part of the No Doubt About It community. Here's to a fantastic 2024!
Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=85ead004b9&e=567664f14c)

name: American Defense News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhiu55erv8f4d25lt02g0olgmpe1hhkbus9n0j8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie8oj2cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8pki9s0653f5rfou33tiv15lkp9a2e3otam0hh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie8oj2cph2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8vkju3f6hff638i02l1plcph6ncd72p035rici0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie8oj2cph2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgtafrb9100r857bgtka48v91ia52a6t221ljj9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie8oj2cph2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z22jji1uu910ubjrqfmhnt2it0j4dsqhrmbcrhao_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie8oj2cph2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z90eem405v3pj3vm93qnj3bir0vb8bruhas56j1g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj2c5im6p3246h22sh2s8i6eo31cpie8oj2cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6rcku1uvp68di9nn9fsi16flkka0h63tkmi1td8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie8oj2cph2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd7dqf1a75kaitjdukpr17r5hak6ncfhnfne0sfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie8oj2cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq3q1r989gffrleankq1fcr2f4pf8oum6r70k0tg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie6or2chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn2uu2vrir97cm0p5115afudae8hfcf4o1l8thd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie6or2chh2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za2e80p3od2dopp1tpoo4n6l8p9i0sbip7fo3rng_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie6or2chh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4hagg9j1c79q2kqqta90msc8g2bla9rob1bbucg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie6or2chh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkg0moh6gg9lud4ndhk8fv9rihrevvgckerhde30_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie6or2chh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pro Life Update
---
