name: ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8hke9ovfbda6vhgvn5u9qkqa22raah23hr4f7ag_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie2o74cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3anmvvbvnntt8oarris4mogftqlmpn2p9476p20_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie2o74cth2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqdtiiq8f9te43mscbaufjvfa971bepqhvb12260_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie2o74cth2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvmdvp2e0j52v0cp2eh9bsci99s79qskv669bhjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie2o74cth2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zapiugul1f71gvi6gu34fjaaa6vpms19dcupo4tg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpie2o74cth2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

ICYMI News

name: Joe Teirab (R-MN)
subject: The guiding principle of my life
body:
| | |

| Peter,
Thank you for joining the team!
My name is Joe Teirab - in case you don't know me, let me take a minute to introduce myself and tell you why I'm running to Fire Angie Craig and Flip Minnesota's Second Congressional District in 2024... a mission that I know won't be possible without the help of folks like you!

| [](https://rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YUQ0M53Y_6h9hqYUuSf8imd1_s-Vc-ADxl0Rsm2i0uxraWZyALvcy7qn0Iew6rhRh8LGTl7n6h_IaJfOkom0TddHAjrlIhWM60ZEEggDOnIFn438vUvPWsiyxYhAxqTsyiH2lze2F365_OAr2MrMwSVRf_nRSpT5e8oPdFb7c1zfs-PgB_syU_T9WN8_xDL_cmem-_EwNr6n2NL2Pkame41Fl3EtXUAY8QwhI5mBKB6WY5EF-9nl4vH0OHC83pXC5iU_ORnvu4xLOsW7FlZBRgi1aIbEpu9yUAYewA47AXwe6UPOiUuG-1JfkMkti0z9JtzS0CueuTlHni-6UwOGMb0s2U9pCXGcb4WB9Et2RTKWA6xTS8jFKo7iSv1JczUsUtPwKLCdWhmQTrHOiR0zlw==&c=vE9ZWG5pmXUOZmOf7Iz1-nvalw3YzOh8J5p9YQpNAEs7ow3dSGvBig==&ch=UpaE7Qjc7loivcz0yevcRP9rulm5yPaKK5RXA2nprLKMlX5p4bS6QA==&ses=MvsuYrlspXhEYHyhNyFhSQPunNDIUlxR-qHwTPNkQIgBAP19zTS5KA==)

| Peter, service has been the guiding principle of my life. If there is one lesson that generations of my family have taught me, it's the value of service and giving back.
I also learned from a young age the value of hard work, and that the American Dream is not just a slogan, but a promise. As the son of a Sudanese immigrant, I grew up in rural southwest Minnesota but would work my way to Harvard Law School and eventually the United States Marine Corps.
I took the lessons of hard work and service with me everywhere I went. I'm passionate about my Christian faith, and was heavily involved in the campus Christian ministry at my college. I also held a leadership position at our campus Republican club.
Eventually, while at Harvard Law School, I made the decision to join the United States Marine Corps and served my country on active duty for over four years.
Most recently, I've been working as a prosecutor going after criminals here in Minnesota. It's made me see firsthand the sad and deadly results of failed, soft-on-crime leadership...
So that's why I'm making it my mission to bring about a change in leadership here in my home state.
I'm running for Congress to fight for safer communities, to put an end to Bidenomics that has made life unaffordable for too many families, to get our debt and deficit under control, and to ensure safety and prosperity for all Minnesotans.
If that's a mission you can get behind - then I would be grateful to have your support along the way.
Stay tuned for more updates from me and my team, and thank you again for joining us!
For Minnesota and America, Joe Teirab (R-MN)
---

body:

---
Do you remember all this, Fellow Conservative? **Last fall, following the horrifying, barbaric terrorist attack on Israel by Hamas, we exposed the truth about Colin Allred’s anti-Israel extremism and seeming support for terroristic hate.**
* We highlighted how he has met in the past with Students for Justice in Palestine, a group of _hate-fueled radicals_ who organized an anti-Israel rally on October 12th.

* We let voters know how he voted “NO” on the package passed in the House to help Israel fight back against the Hamas terrorists, and how in the past he’s voted against a measure to condemn the anti-Israel (BDS) movement.

* And we didn’t let him off the hook when he lashed out at a citizen report who asked him pointed questions regarding his support for Hamas – __this guy even threatened to CALL THE CAPITOL POLICE in a cowardly attempt to dodge accountability__ _!_

It’s the New Year, and Colin Allred STILL refuses to retract his support for Hamas.

It is disturbing and absolutely inexplicable. This guy is wrong for the Lone Star State, period.
**[**Help us continue to EXPOSE THE TRUTH and KEEP TEXAS RED this November >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Breaking the Narrative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
BREAKING: CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
**BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media’s latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. The latest American Research Group Inc. also has me polling at #2 amongst “probable” GOP primary voters in New Hampshire:

Trump – 33%
**Ramaswamy—18%**
DeSantis—14%
Christie—9%
Haley—8%
Undecided—16%
| [** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nUFC21BuK0H7pjz7x2Wpug~~/AARclAA~~)
---

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories.”

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nUFC21BuK0H7pjz7x2Wpug~~/AARclAA~~) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I’m “infecting the public with conspiracy,” “one step away from Nazi propaganda,” and “selling sinister lies.”

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nUFC21BuK0H7pjz7x2Wpug~~/AARclAA~~)
---

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don’t let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we’re bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you’ll tune in for the TRUTH.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nUFC21BuK0H7pjz7x2Wpug~~/AARclAA~~)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nUFC21BuK0H7pjz7x2Wpug~~/AARclAA~~)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nUFC21BuK0H7pjz7x2Wpug~~/AARclAA~~)

---|---|---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Restore Our Nation

Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. ~ | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

name: Team Tuberville Updates
subject: Delivering RESULTS [See Details Inside]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Coach got things done for the people of Alabama in 2023. See results inside >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/d24d7325b83f09873947229f28c3afba/6b4c277a5d15e522c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Coach has been honored to work on behalf of Alabamians like you last year. As a member of the Armed Services, Agriculture, Veteran's Affairs, and HELP Committees, he has strived to put the needs of our state first. Here's how Coach has made a difference for Alabama: *****Coach worked to strengthen our national defense. ** ✅ Fought the Biden administration's decision to move the SPACECOM Headquarters from Alabama to Colorado. ✅ Worked to get more federal government investment for Alabama's military bases. ✅ Introduced a bill to send $14.3 billion to our ally Israel after Hamas's October 7th terrorist attacks. *****Coach worked to protect our veterans.** ✅ Introduced a bill that would stop the VA from using its resources to assist illegal aliens instead of veterans. ✅ Championed legislation to expand VA healthcare for veterans and enable veterans to receive better access to private healthcare. ✅ Held VA employees accountable and cut red tape to make it easier for veterans to get jobs in the private sector. *****Coach supported Alabama's farmers, producers, and rural communities.** ✅ Held listening sessions to get Alabama farmers' feedback on the upcoming Farm Bill. ✅ Reintroduced several bills to support our agricultural industry and cut red tape. ✅ Worked to include funding for rural broadband expansion in the Farm Bill. *****Coach fought for border security.** ✅ Introduced and reintroduced multiple bills to secure the border, close loopholes in U.S. immigration law, and finish the border wall. ✅ Worked to address the fentanyl epidemic that's impacting every state, including Alabama. *****Coach supported students and parents. ** ✅ Introduced the CHOICE Act to allow low-income families to use federal funds for the school that best fits their needs. ✅ Fought to curb the rising costs of higher education that buries many college graduates in debt. *****Coach stood up for Alabama's best interests.** ✅ Helped bring over $90 million home to Alabama to improve our military bases, level up commercial navigation on Alabama's river systems, and fund local law enforcement. ✅ Opposed the Biden administration's burdensome regulations on the Gulf of Mexico energy production. As we begin 2024, there’s still more work to be done. We look forward to continuing to serve you this coming year. -Team Tuberville
---
|
---
_We're proud of Coach and our team's accomplishments in 2023 on behalf of Alabamians_ _and Americans like YOU. But there's still so much more work to do. Will you please pitch in a_ _generous donation to fuel our efforts in this pivotal election year?_
---

name: WARNING:
subject: Inslee BANS fossil-fueled appliances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R)
body:
| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d55c6d815ec46dd8a2688fa66ea3d83&_e=uHbBrM_rUZPnaBnPJbGQLUiJLGQScLjFBO0rhhQgTVCaK4tJCjL2cxGw1UjZ1JEEw7fz3je8qgWElxv3ma7tINA39ABPkZ1v_1fotcGvqI7jgCp-ezRSYfiQhvexHYSOcpI1EIvanIRP1z-ysuDK1NIgijQIJJdL7L829x4wasxqrngLfmoQEnBLN64a_JmmEarcrIrxhxfZ_riRctmo_CDpKzmXpd4udVt6UmVXltSmQzFAHKK9nE5kB_f4QF4h1YLn8g0n0Aekz83srZEs3KFAEb5JYD9eLzFVepjy15IAmauVSkTgw56H3davltXvO7JzK4wstLV21-eqhnwlwDG7h4HcX0ytQKPuntaNMlWfGQpdh6wJ1tt_4sZXsil1hY5KNKBSJkheDgUCmqo73H8tgx0l4ygstNR_H2oUav4%3D)
---
Friend, Team Reichert here.

While we're hard at work ensuring Dave Reichert becomes the next Governor of Washington, it's important for us to keep you updated on the latest news coming out of Inslee's office in Olympia.

The Inslee Administration has supported new building code amendments modeled after liberal California law that are going to **make it nearly impossible to install fossil-fueled appliances to homes and businesses in Washington.** **These changes could go into effect as soon as March 15, 2024.**

Inslee is using energy efficiency targets to make it harder and more expensive for builders to install fossil-fueled appliances in homes - _limiting YOUR choice of what appliances are best for your family and your budget._

We **NEED** to push back on this news and put a stop to the blatant government overreach coming out of Jay's office and directly into the homes of millions of Washingtonians.

**[Click here to show your support for fossil-fueled appliances in Washington homes.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d55c6d815ec46dd8a2688fa66ea3d83&_e=uHbBrM_rUZPnaBnPJbGQLUiJLGQScLjFBO0rhhQgTVCaK4tJCjL2cxGw1UjZ1JEEw7fz3je8qgWElxv3ma7tINA39ABPkZ1v_1fotcGvqI7jgCp-ezRSYfiQhvexHYSOcpI1EIvanIRP1z-ysuDK1NIgijQIJJdL7L829x4wasxqrngLfmoQEnBLN64a_JmmEarcrIrxhxfZ_riRctmo_CDpKzmXpd4udVt6UmVXltSmQzFAHKK9nE5kB_f4QF4h1YLn8g0n0Aekz83srZEs3KfNHjF0kHwFjmnyHHWEd94PHYgdHrVDGxK9M7dEIbUIN0bO3h1Kydx8NiHLPMyH5llvCsv6l8kiDlLNxVyDrjcLIUiNkZToaIswIB7zewJ3zORm1JZZb7ZnA0JJdDxVx1pIWmggOvGzeFfX4Mdz8Do%3D)**

Thank you,

Team Reichert

**__**___**Dave Reichert is Running to Change what's wrong, Fix what's broken, and Do what's right.
**_

| Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R)
P.O. Box 1994 Tacoma, WA 98401

body:
Hello - yesterday was a historic day.

| |

---
| | | Hello - yesterday was a historic day.

**60+ House Republicans flew down to Eagle Pass, Texas to expose the invasion at our southern border. **

We also made sure the American People knew Joe Biden and the open-border Democrats are REFUSING to pass our border security bill, which:

- Slashes illegal immigration
- Restarts construction of The Wall
- Ends catch-and-release
- Restores Title 42-like authority
- Staffs up Border Patrol
---
| | | [ENDORSE OUR BORDER SECURITY PLAN](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38602%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4V%2binLVVz6%2fBy2so4ONetQ&sysid=1 "ENDORSE OUR BORDER SECURITY PLAN")
---
We passed the strongest border security bill in American history MONTHS AGO and they’ve sat on their hands since. **[Please endorse our border plan and help us make the open-border Democrats PAY the ultimate political price for failing to secure our country.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38603%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qAzGZqYZUSuRn0uJ%2fJ6I0g&sysid=1 "Please endorse our border plan and help

secure our country.")**

For America,
House GOP

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: I was born under the Ethiopian sun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi for Congress
body:
I fought my way to the Promised Land and now I’m working to protect it.

| |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk70rkhfaq6mollbk0hd1qs95ssgpilnjoj7vb08_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g64o36c3h2bs)
---

I was born under the Ethiopian sun.

I was molded in the crucible of the Israel Defense Force.

I fought my way to the Promised Land.

And now I'm working to protect it.

Friend, my name is Mazi Melesa Pilip & I'm the GOP nominee for the biggest race in America - the NY-03 Special Election.

If you don't know me already, let me tell you a little about myself:

I'm an Ethiopian-born Jew who fled to Israel at the age of 12 to escape antisemitism.

At 18, I enlisted in the Israel Defense Force & joined the elite Paratrooper Brigade to defend freedom & Democracy from radical Islamic terrorists.

Following my service in the IDF, I legally immigrated to the US to pursue the American Dream.

**_Now, I 'm running for Congress to protect this great country from the Radical Left._**

But I have to be blunt with you - this Special Election was announced just days ago and we only have a few short weeks until voting begins. _So what happens now will decide everything._

If we're going to win this all-important race and prevent the Democrats from destroying our slim House Majority, we have to start this campaign strong.

**_[That 's why I've set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by the end of the day. Hitting this goal is our only chance of winning this race so I'm humbly asking for your help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zar70seabaffabcrkjqb3ds04vbl36921ep8b3vg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g64o36c3h2bs "That’s why I’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by the end of the day. Hitting this goal is our only chance of winning this race so I’m humbly asking for your help.")_**

This race will be won and lost at the grassroots level - and a $5 gift right now could be the difference between winning and losing. | | [**DONATE $5**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zva4djug8osi0irb0i1pag47k9kv9flo36tjlqo0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g64o36c3h2bs)| [**DONATE $10**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvcnsh065jo8fe4lmvncge4smfmue4idsovmde00_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g64o36c3h2bs)
---|---
[**DONATE $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqhc9r313qsdgavqqhap34bcultj4nsqf18licu0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g64o36c3h2bs)| [**DONATE $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbnsfcikavjl4h6nnj0sr9va83ugi7p92gogob3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g64o36c3h2bs)
---|---
So if this email fails, it's all over.

**__[Can I count on you to step up right now, Friend?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq6rp3dflhpim74igd2t8kalqoaisdan088lqelg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g64o36c3h2bs "Can I count on you to step up right now, Friend?")__**

To Victory,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Candidate - NY-03 Special Election

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Katie is the only candidate who does this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KATIE PORTER FOR SENATE]
body:
Derek, it's
Elizabeth Warren. When Katie Porter and I were studying consumer law, way
before either of us got into politics, we kept coming back to one central
question:

Why has the road to economic security gotten so steep and so rocky for
hardworking people in America?

Well, here was the answer: Washington was only working well for those with
money and power — for those who could hire armies of lobbyists and
lawyers. Corruption, pure and simple.

So we’ve been fighting back. Fighting to put our government on the side of
working people. Fighting to make sure government officials are making
decisions with only one factor in mind: the public interest. Not their own
pocketbooks. Not their special interest donors.

That fight brought us to elected office. That fight drives us to build
campaigns from the grassroots level on up. And now that Katie is running
to be California’s next U.S. senator (go Katie!), it’s notable that she’s
the only candidate in the race who doesn’t take money from corporate PACs,
federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Wall Street
banks.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240104-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_EWA_20240104_V1_F&refcode2=35864_3422442_Nrp9N7&akid=35864%2E3422442%2ENrp9N7 ]Neither do I. We both fundraise the same way: with grassroots support.
So, Derek, can
you please split a $5 contribution to support our campaigns
today? Katie’s in a competitive primary, and we’re relying on grassroots
support to keep up our fight for working families in the Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240104-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_EWA_20240104_V1_F&refcode2=35864_3422442_Nrp9N7&akid=35864%2E3422442%2ENrp9N7 ]Donate ›››

Katie and I have recently been working together in Washington to reign in
Big Banks — introducing a bill to reinstate guardrails against collapses
like the ones we saw in 2023.

We’re in this fight to get big money out of politics, root corruption out
of Washington, and make our government work for everyone — not just the
ultra-wealthy and well-connected. And there’s so much more we can get done
together.

I’m running for re-election to keep fighting for working people — and I
get goosebumps thinking about what it’d be like to do this work alongside
Katie in the Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240104-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_EWA_20240104_V1_F&refcode2=35864_3422442_Nrp9N7&akid=35864%2E3422442%2ENrp9N7 ]Can you split a donation of $5 or any amount between
Katie Porter’s campaign and our re-election? The polls are tight in
Katie’s race, so every donation, of any amount, truly makes a difference.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240104-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_EWA_20240104_V1_F&refcode2=35864_3422442_Nrp9N7&akid=35864%2E3422442%2ENrp9N7 ]Donate ›››

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[ ]Neither do I. We both fundraise the same way: with grassroots support. So, Derek, can you please split a $5 contribution to support our campaigns today? [ ]Donate ››› Katie and I have recently been working together in Washington to reign in Big Banks — introducing a bill to reinstate guardrails against collapses like the ones we saw in 2023. We’re in this fight to get big money out of politics, root corruption out of Washington, and make our government work for everyone — not just the ultra-wealthy and well-connected. And there’s so much more we can get done together. I’m running for re-election to keep fighting for working people — and I get goosebumps thinking about what it’d be like to do this work alongside Katie in the Senate. [ ]Can you split a donation of $5 or any amount between Katie Porter’s campaign and our re-election? The polls are tight in Katie’s race, so every donation, of any amount, truly makes a difference. [ ]Donate ››› Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

name: Joe Biden
subject: I am writing to ask you personally if you can contribute $1 to kick off our campaign in 2024.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Republicans are just over a week away from beginning to choose their nominee. | | |
---
Peter, Today, I’m reaching out to you personally to ask you to do something small for our campaign. But it’s something that will make a big difference. This is the first month of 2024, and Election Day is closer than you might think. Republicans will hold their first primary in just a little more than a week. The extreme MAGA Republicans seeking their party’s nomination are openly talking about banning abortion nationwide, ripping health care away from millions of people, and seeking revenge on their political opponents. **Not a joke, Peter. That’s who they are.** No matter who the Republican nominee is, we need to be ready. [**That’s why I’m reaching out today, Peter. We need more people like you to step up and make their first donation. Will you consider making your first $1 contribution to our campaign before the first Republican primary? clean_body: Republicans are just over a week away from beginning to choose their nominee. | | | Peter, Today, I’m reaching out to you personally to ask you to do something small for our campaign. But it’s something that will make a big difference. This is the first month of 2024, and Election Day is closer than you might think. Republicans will hold their first primary in just a little more than a week. The extreme MAGA Republicans seeking their party’s nomination are openly talking about banning abortion nationwide, ripping health care away from millions of people, and seeking revenge on their political opponents. Not a joke, Peter. That’s who they are. No matter who the Republican nominee is, we need to be ready. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Your support means the world to me, Peter. It’s the reason we’ve been able to bring down prescription drug costs, take historic action on climate change, and rebuild our bridges and roads across the country. But our work to defend our democracy and build our economy from the middle out is far from over. I know I am not alone in this fight. But it would mean a lot to me as we enter the heat of 2024 to know that you’re with me. You can use this link to contribute to our campaign: Thank you, Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: What CNN just said about our race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
#

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240104-1-tt&t=1&akid=994%2E135344%2E9_TDte)
We’re starting off the 2024 election year with some sobering news: CNN just updated their list of Senate seats most likely to flip in November – and Michigan is in the top ten. [**You can click here to read what they had to say about our race.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1930?t=2&akid=994%2E135344%2E9_TDte)**
With Joe Manchin announcing his retirement at the end of 2023, Democrats’ margin became even smaller. **And that means control of the U.S. Senate for the next two years will run right through Michigan, and our race.**
[**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help ensure we keep Michigan blue?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240104-1-tt&t=3&akid=994%2E135344%2E9_TDte)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240104-1-tt&t=4&akid=994%2E135344%2E9_TDte)**
We have just ten months until Election Day, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. CNN’s update is another proof point in what Michiganders have known: Michigan is as swingy as it gets, and we know that in a swing state, sometimes you swing. Despite Democrats’ success in 2022, we know that Michigan will go red under the right conditions.
This open Senate seat gives Republicans one of their best shots at flipping a seat and taking back control of the Senate.
With a presidential election on the ballot as well, this election cycle is especially susceptible to that pendulum: The public polling released so far shows that not only is our race currently neck-and-neck with a large portion of voters undecided, but a potential match-up between President Biden and former President Trump is a dead-heat. That means we have not only one, but two tough races to win here in Michigan next year.
But those key, strategic decisions – like when we go up on TV and launch digital ads, where and when we invest in satellite offices around Michigan, and how we can expand our ground game – are completely guided by our ability to raise money early in the election year. This is why Elissa always says that the most important time to donate is now: Your support now, early on in the year, helps us be strategic and intentional about how we’re reaching voters – and ensures we’re having the critical conversations as early as possible.
[**In a race this tight, every dollar truly makes the difference, which is why we’re asking: Will you donate any amount now to set our campaign up for success in this race?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240104-1-tt&t=5&akid=994%2E135344%2E9_TDte)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-jan24.OTW_eo&amount=3&refcode=em240104-1-tt&t=24&akid=994%2E135344%2E9_TDte)**

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The Hawley Family Business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
He’s made it his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide. Please let me explain:
#
Peter,
From overturning Roe to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s abused his power to do it. **Please let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42209?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42209?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs)**
**IN 2017:** Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court.
His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42209?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs)
**IN 2018:** While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an investment in his future.
So he became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**IN 2019:** Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge.
Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
**IN 2022:** A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.
**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42209?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs)
**APRIL 2023:** Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.
**This was the first time a judge has _ever_ unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections.**
Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication.
**AND NOW: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case (led by Hawley’s wife) is being reviewed by the Supreme Court.**
But this is hardly the first time that the Hawley family business has made it all the way to the Supreme Court:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42209?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs)
**This is what corruption looks like — and this year, we’re going to make Hawley own it.[So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42209?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42210?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42210?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42210?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42210?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42210?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42210?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42209?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs)
---
Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a _hint_ of campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court.
When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore Roe v. Wade. But I’ll also fight to end corruption like this by:
1. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to their campaigns.

2. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate relative.

**Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve.**
**[If you’re with me, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley today. Real people like you are the only folks I ever want to be accountable to in the U.S. Senate, so your support means the world to me.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42209?refcode=em20240104-4533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=4533%2E614464%2EppnqLs)**

clean_body: He’s made it his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide. Please let me explain: Peter, From overturning Roe to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s abused his power to do it. Please let me explain: IN 2017: Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court. His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is: IN 2018: While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an investment in his future. So he became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs. IN 2019: Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge. Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms. IN 2022: A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions. Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge. APRIL 2023: Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states. This was the first time a judge has ever unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections. Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication. AND NOW: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case (led by Hawley’s wife) is being reviewed by the Supreme Court. But this is hardly the first time that the Hawley family business has made it all the way to the Supreme Court: This is what corruption looks like — and this year, we’re going to make Hawley own it. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a hint of campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court. When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore Roe v. Wade. But I’ll also fight to end corruption like this by: 1. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to their campaigns. 2. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate relative. Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve. Thank you, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: It’s January — what does that mean?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We’ve officially entered a presidential election year.

This is when corporate PACs and shady special interest groups start
cutting massive campaign checks to GOP candidates in an effort to purchase
the results of the upcoming elections.

But we operate differently at Powered By People. This is when we start
ramping up our grassroots operation to register voters and ensure everyone
has a say in our democracy — not just powerful special interests.

To compete with Republicans’ campaign coffers, we need more volunteers to
join our people-powered movement. Will you join our Texting Team to help
us contact unregistered Democrats and get them registered to vote?

Sign up for a Texting Team Training!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60690?source=ema20240104-usa-237386&t=1001&akid=237386%2E444211%2EzNDDPN ]Thursday, Jan. 4 at 12:00PM CT
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60691?source=ema20240104-usa-237386&t=1002&akid=237386%2E444211%2EzNDDPN ]Monday, Jan. 8 at 12:00PM CT
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60692?source=ema20240104-usa-237386&t=1003&akid=237386%2E444211%2EzNDDPN ]Wednesday, Jan. 10 at 5:30PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240104-usa.jMbHoV&refcode=ema20240104-237386&t=1004&akid=237386%2E444211%2EzNDDPN ]If you can’t attend a training, please consider chipping in $3 today to
help us recruit more volunteers, reach more voters, and lay the groundwork
to win in November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240104-usa.jMbHoV&refcode=ema20240104-237386&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=237386%2E444211%2EzNDDPN ]DONATE $3

The big money fueling the GOP is powerful — but it’s nothing
compared to people power. We’ve already registered 250,000 new voters, and
we need to register hundreds of thousands more if we’re going to move the
needle in Texas.

Our volunteers and grassroots supporters fuel our work — so thank you for
all you do to support this cause.

Kate Roberts
Powered By People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=237386%2E444211%2EzNDDPN

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
clean_body: [1]Powered By People We’ve officially entered a presidential election year. This is when corporate PACs and shady special interest groups start cutting massive campaign checks to GOP candidates in an effort to purchase the results of the upcoming elections. But we operate differently at Powered By People. This is when we start ramping up our grassroots operation to register voters and ensure everyone has a say in our democracy — not just powerful special interests. To compete with Republicans’ campaign coffers, we need more volunteers to join our people-powered movement. Will you join our Texting Team to help us contact unregistered Democrats and get them registered to vote? Sign up for a Texting Team Training! [ ]Thursday, Jan. 4 at 12:00PM CT [ ]Monday, Jan. 8 at 12:00PM CT [ ]Wednesday, Jan. 10 at 5:30PM CT [ ]If you can’t attend a training, please consider chipping in $3 today to help us recruit more volunteers, reach more voters, and lay the groundwork to win in November. [ ]DONATE $3 The big money fueling the GOP is powerful — but it’s nothing compared to people power. We’ve already registered 250,000 new voters, and we need to register hundreds of thousands more if we’re going to move the needle in Texas. Our volunteers and grassroots supporters fuel our work — so thank you for all you do to support this cause. Kate Roberts Powered By People

name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: I'm in absolute disbelief
body:
| | | [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b228798f00bf493ab4518b47509e0611&_e=nihW65-XJev2wawim7o30EZ-4GfmjdU8IcJWl3BGDbM5OJryFp8m_1x-XsKzkuJRR6Ed8sP2cUfBcAB0ArGp1jUfz3b14YzlUgjsz4Vxyyot0yIrNm1lkPNnmPxESKzVb6ts4GKQ2JJhvuD5KRocWk3CvonAH0D1GlrC6ltFbSRwj0WnGW6cuANxVPlj7zD9ZWeRDFGK8RWzXLbmPYFteXm2XqRb41HT6SKWq7CPxVGmIPQhbgr5fV0P8Mtxpl0ld5xfNS4s9Gu5676yEvN4QgrohLZEW_VvZfjwJigk8KonAsJtIxaxZHfW1wj_CnDCsb8ea1XN3VIlQZscIqlQIXn2TihZEtJLlSbXmz0LLOSUf5Om-I_GXusqEgt3fR2lHUA5BmChjpCcetY8sCg2TA%3D%3D)
---
I'm in absolute disbelief- again. President Trump has been REMOVED from the Presidential ballot in Maine. I truly never thought I would see something so absolutely tyrannical happen in America. First it was Colorado, now Maine: It's clear that the Democrats will not stop until they've completely SILENCED our America-first movement. Friend, this is about more than just Colorado or Maine, or even President Trump. This is an OUTRIGHT ATTACK on free and fair elections in our country. I'm at a loss for words. But we CANNOT sit back and watch as the Left seeks to destroy our Democracy with baseless disqualifications. [President Trump needs our help now more than ever. Please stand with us today as we fight this HISTORIC INJUSTICE.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b228798f00bf493ab4518b47509e0611&_e=nihW65-XJev2wawim7o30EZ-4GfmjdU8IcJWl3BGDbM5OJryFp8m_1x-XsKzkuJRR6Ed8sP2cUfBcAB0ArGp1jUfz3b14YzlUgjsz4Vxyyot0yIrNm1lkPNnmPxESKzVb6ts4GKQ2JJhvuD5KRocWk3CvonAH0D1GlrC6ltFbSRwj0WnGW6cuANxVPlj7zD9ZWeRDFGK8RWzXLbmPYFteXm2XqRb41HT6SKWq7CPxVHyKdqr7HTInYkpbPA6oaTrbvVUrkUDrz1dRerPLtrGi5swcU_qNE55IftDZs8r_W7Nwt26omTWuQiDXbXwKe-bJWcgAq5ur-IGAGs04smc24PIMMb2c8XosyxH0hRqqR1cdBVuZdFWJzLlabt7lfhpB1q1xwj6YW-AtIcgfxztEA%3D%3D)

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: January 9th Special Elections, Pre-Session Coffee Hour, Free Fitness Class and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ab8e4d86f6841f989fde66b73017ed9&_e=YfLo9Zs8eKfohM93cH4ovnPR2jiUS0Se8wdiIzInjAVnjYd9SJ4xTMg5DskzpbQIlbE24cPkpPPpXlgmQyitF94MN9-ZwS4eoKMYbwbTpAM6QIHmNL2o4d-mOxkhUvZ0Uk77GbnzS0wl_xjSaYx2RrZELVcwl9pObx8glbbr3lJCQCYcehclq5UE8dBKITVqjCRCYt0MPIm_IGPHnHf4fMQF0QEIrR917e35mAfzKLARnATHRfFzWT1ckK8YUEOfNe-Hwb11BadqZXbuRMqBM-ibmArZz6XRU516C7_ab5PW_VnIBt5G_wIa5sFRDYcr7wzYD-EzPh12k2d4c0zHyAOQmgR_l3PrV9CGPCVvi6tI65MoJma_k-aLI6Bdc0LwNZsiPT487tKrwkR8iEYJXg%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ab8e4d86f6841f989fde66b73017ed9&_e=YfLo9Zs8eKfohM93cH4ovnPR2jiUS0Se8wdiIzInjAVnjYd9SJ4xTMg5DskzpbQIlbE24cPkpPPpXlgmQyitF94MN9-ZwS4eoKMYbwbTpAM6QIHmNL2o4d-mOxkhUvZ0Uk77GbnzS0wl_xjSaYx2RrZELVcwl9pObx8glbbr3lJCQCYcehclq5UE8dBKITVqjCRCYt0MPIm_IGPHnHf4fMQF0QEIrR917e35mAfzKLARnATHRfFzWT1ckK8YUEOf4xUqZ_5RPTjh67Dtmfkc2lbmxUidU9APCYMTGSiq_sI7xpQL7x-CDmDgY-F3yFGyBeBE1whMe9xnBj2lXfDu9wjxtDEGXhCYDGuCG7EaAO5JgZoZmCvFXf2D17hf7GQoqbf9tQ7vH88rdnKE_A12tA%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ab8e4d86f6841f989fde66b73017ed9&_e=YfLo9Zs8eKfohM93cH4ovnPR2jiUS0Se8wdiIzInjAVnjYd9SJ4xTMg5DskzpbQIlbE24cPkpPPpXlgmQyitF94MN9-ZwS4eoKMYbwbTpAM6QIHmNL2o4d-mOxkhUvZ0Uk77GbnzS0wl_xjSaYx2RrZELVcwl9pObx8glbbr3lJCQCYcehclq5UE8dBKITVqjCRCYt0MPIm_IGPHnHf4fMQF0QEIrR917e35mAfzKLARnATHRfFzWT1ckK8YUEOfKbJToMiNSb1SaBhBgmwDMQA_BfgTpg3NygmWfJDOcqk85hKPk1-pnLUFTQx1y6D5jV2I8VAArrnyM84xpMluTXJ7U2WGn6ORdoVirPjnOjdJxD-q6xhQJjXFHNl01EMpgM3u-isbIK6Zxdqq6vw_qg%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ab8e4d86f6841f989fde66b73017ed9&_e=YfLo9Zs8eKfohM93cH4ovnPR2jiUS0Se8wdiIzInjAVnjYd9SJ4xTMg5DskzpbQIlbE24cPkpPPpXlgmQyitF94MN9-ZwS4eoKMYbwbTpAM6QIHmNL2o4d-mOxkhUvZ0Uk77GbnzS0wl_xjSaYx2RrZELVcwl9pObx8glbbr3lJCQCYcehclq5UE8dBKITVqjCRCYt0MPIm_IGPHnHf4fMQF0QEIrR917e35mAfzKLARnATHRfFzWT1ckK8YUEOf_PM_jjU_EntD7YSUDAuj-hhSoACHqk_Yv463g3LhT5Y-H3FxrHIPfCOUPEzOqw9O_fzr6607KO-WZAYrLCp-xadC3X_pVTe7oVVjVzx-vXjIOwaPHSEoq6lJvsnJPFPjmu770oo8aDnn0TUyLiQHmQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ab8e4d86f6841f989fde66b73017ed9&_e=YfLo9Zs8eKfohM93cH4ovnPR2jiUS0Se8wdiIzInjAVnjYd9SJ4xTMg5DskzpbQIlbE24cPkpPPpXlgmQyitF94MN9-ZwS4eoKMYbwbTpAM6QIHmNL2o4d-mOxkhUvZ0Uk77GbnzS0wl_xjSaYx2RrZELVcwl9pObx8glbbr3lJCQCYcehclq5UE8dBKITVqjCRCYt0MPIm_IGPHnHf4fMQF0QEIrR917e35mAfzKLARnATHRfFzWT1ckK8YUEOfmw0Rc-E7bClp9fcphYtzFDJ8tA4-T1TR9m_kvTdbwfyqKQmxnn0-9hEsnCFZ9s9g13MieZe5etaXyCC_OSG2cYanP8OeS7LePMqt_EKKDPj-Hd4LJyODaWwuw4inajpbpqfQtJG5Kqyon0yM1sLKEA%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Dr. Wolf von Laer
subject: Is the U.S. the next Argentina?
body:
As more of our volunteers graduate and have a greater influence on the world, we are starting to see the dividends of that investment.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhu289v4rto5n4tejgve3lj7225najq432mh911o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

Friend,

Looking for a way to really change the world for a few bucks? Giving to Students For Liberty (SFL) is one of the best long-term investments you can make for freedom.

We educate, develop, and empower young people to advance the cause of liberty in the United States and around the world. As more of our volunteers graduate and have a greater influence on the world, we are starting to see the dividends of that investment.

**Argentina 's President, Javier Milei, is the perfect example!**

Over the past decade, SFL nurtured young Argentine leaders who share Milei's values of liberty and a desire to make a difference in their country. Milei, a strong proponent of capitalism, free markets, and (extremely) limited government, is involved in SFL's events in Argentina as both a speaker and an attendee and is simply a natural consequence of SFL's grassroots efforts.

Students For Liberty was the secret behind Javier Milei's success, and with your support, we can create more "Meleis" in the United States and around the world.

As CEO of Students For Liberty, my plan is to train the next generation of pro-liberty leaders who will make a difference for decades. I set a goal to raise $50,000 online before the end of the year to make this plan a reality.

[Please send an urgent donation of $10, $35, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to show your support.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd21e5k2bs6hiqb0kaptmim8s39gc0jhs9689kr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $10 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt618h941ld4468pqa95k5u80bo5a4knuohm8l0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $35 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc63inalsr53mgofcr337o374k74udm7lrbh6hbo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $50 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpo3ohjl6p5qvpe1iadrqrl4rhvffkikkkkou0m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $100 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zapedo9vtfsf37fau0n9ch91pbnp47qd924i9eko_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $250 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zroocj7r5mtksj2ub3uemmpq16hpru7desfruq48_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $500 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcfjhuon6jcsf2if11kv474nl0frqkl7a2vlkoa8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4rbk1helscrbg1tailcdsma4cd2jaqb63vtv55g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp9jja1rdbm14n8flqt10arobeane3ksu00vdf9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

I don't want you to believe Students For Liberty is only focused outside of the United States. Our largest presence is students right here in the U.S.

**One of our alumni even served on President Trump 's council of economic advisors. **

SFL is creating the future leaders this country so desperately needs! Here's how -

Students For Liberty recruits pro-liberty students on college campuses. We identify students who can help build up an organization on their local campus.

These student leaders help us host conferences in the regions. SFL is a student-led organization. We empower them to take on leadership roles and gain experience they won't receive anywhere else.

**As students and alumni go out into the world, they take the skills and lessons they learned and use them to make the world a freer place for you and me.**

This is not an immediate return. I'm asking you to invest in the long-term personal growth and specialization of our future leaders and empower them to make a greater impact for liberty in the future.
**_Please click any button below to donate today_.**

[Donate $10 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt9l5vbsekljadl0qm4jvb8orn1e0neovf4tf4m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $35 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7cns9re9am6dcd7n6oa3qn0qi3lt4lc8b7mc198_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $50 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5q7agmjf3uonles53dhgt0ec6phc2nsv9qb7jt0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $100 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zssonj9qojvtn8cqoh0vnrosifo2qapg6s88drgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $250 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9n35lpt7m68r42jj1rs5ph9d5uufs7h7si61g10_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $500 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z53k4a8d6mcm41tngqf2hlbjgc5mhp8o0mscgef8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs145qfi8q1h66kgqhu7b8oo9i7t4p8s67h28th8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcmatphiqi09blcui1kd584tiaofa29n7ctvsgi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

Students For Liberty isn't interested in short-term wins that can be reversed just as quickly. We're working to make a permanent change and bring about a culture of freedom.

We are equipping today's student activists with the skills and knowledge they will need to be tomorrow's freedom fighters.

_No other pro-liberty student organization is investing in the future like we are_.

**Will you invest in our mission to educate, develop, and empower the next generation of liberty leaders?** [Please click here to chip in any amount to help me reach my $50,000 goal before the end of the year. >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4qdv76vc9ouiq3m4hutd1pts0h0aj078pos2tv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z39eokgqf11lpk0vpv9lgh6k3olgq8fpimti1fp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6co72clh2bs)

Thank you,

Dr. Wolf von Laer
Chief Executive Officer
Students For Liberty

_Students For Liberty is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to Students For Liberty are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution._

name: America First War Room
subject: Economist Harry Dent, Warren Buffet See Huge 2024 Crash Coming. Steps You Can Take Now!
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kLFSwzAMhp9G2ZqTZTVOBg8tPTNwx8DCMbqOQ8zZJHUSQt-eayiskv5P3_02jTF0Vw3qCER9aCcgAnkAosvbmvLykZ4ed6O97i7Vc9rflvQARPN19P-Xd0jpkw3xNlWnotWya5ELr4VClrWq67rotW2dJLTssGHssHGddewEkzqLquFzETQhMQrkW46p7JRwpBqrrBSCWQDj9qe0yefgrJjm1eY8DKl0Qyqi7ud5nDYxA2TWPJSfi4t-mX5jbkhA5q4MZL6AzP778vqyyJwrkGYrQZ722fd4OOYi63ZcQ4xhqhQwvv9RfgIAAP__05xfhQ)

# Economist Harry Dent Predicts 2024 Will Bring 'Biggest Crash of Our Lifetime'. Warren Buffett Sells Off $28.7 Billion in Stock. Expects Market to Plummet.
* * *
**"Buffett says it's been an 'incredible period' for the economy
but that's coming to an end"** -Fortune Magazine May 2023
* * *
My friend, Yes, you read that correctly! Legendary investor and billionaire **Warren Buffett has sold off $28.7 Billion in stocks** in the first three quarters of 2023, according to SEC filings. Economists interpret this as the**sounding of the alarm bells for the U.S. economy.** In fact, Economist Harry Dent Just predicted that 2024 will bring 'biggest crash of our lifetime'. He says the S&P will nosedive by 86%. Warren Buffett is considered to be **one of the greatest investors of all time**. He is also the 5th richest person in the world, he is truely the investor to model. Steve H. Hanke, a professor of applied economics at Johns Hopkins University who served on **President Ronald Reagan's Council of Economic Advisers** , told Newsweek this is a crucial sign "that a recession is right around the corner." **How is Buffett predicting the Crash of 2024?** "The money supply of the United States, broadly measured [M2], started contracting in July 2022 and has been falling like a stone," Hanke said. "Since last year, the U.S. money supply has contracted by 3.3 percent."**__** According to Hanke, there have been only four periods in U.S. history—in 1920-21, 1929-33, 1937-38, and 1948-49—in which the money supply has had significant contractions. "**Each of those four periods was followed by a serious recession** ," he said. "The current monetary contraction is clearly going to lead to precisely what monetary contractions always lead to: a recession."**__** Yahoo Finance says U.S. ** _markets drop 32% on average during recessions._** Recent Money.com** __** surveys show ** _economists see at least a 60% chance of a recession in the next 12 months_**. CNN News says "the US economy is still showing signs of a slowdown." name: American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8u2i5iophk171hekb1fdeso251k0if0nso7odoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6aor0cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsmf81si19kopkcvlrmc3f0bpciqi5bfrpcelr50_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6aor0cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrd6kdg0bqdh7bu3ofsn7d3fh3oosushf504mna0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5g6aor0cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
