The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=232712737bf84e3abbe8f3ee3b6830cd&_e=ZwLS_J9NbGmvpyUx2MswfmaQfxYD1syivi_IISyqmj_6z1oHeqJLCRlTtHnuWnegCFnJXGwVE9e_rQXpvXqV8mt9CgvvSdRdOPcPWhp4sh7zkQ7Q8vXbuaQgEAc2yXLxqk6YAuQqSaDuWfyaSf0uaQydNda7ZIlCAYcS-RL0KWDC-9tmlqqrNyy4wII_wSXRwTujGKGDCZy5JSvzSBcq6EYu79awy7YvaDVD3KevMj4r-igDOOsIVyZvmUOxZ-k6j8O4xT6ssqvs8gIAPx0a9igqOyQ3o3ULo8QK0edWALziFvCC1FfGsAqQqTTDx1u3mBrKiJlUaHK7zeVItd1ZvecO2vnYK-eK48wLRBd9J-ywovTJDucV54cMlhiVQ9HLAh0iG5HY8YI7onRE262miA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=232712737bf84e3abbe8f3ee3b6830cd&_e=ZwLS_J9NbGmvpyUx2MswfmaQfxYD1syivi_IISyqmj_6z1oHeqJLCRlTtHnuWnegCFnJXGwVE9e_rQXpvXqV8mt9CgvvSdRdOPcPWhp4sh7zkQ7Q8vXbuaQgEAc2yXLxqk6YAuQqSaDuWfyaSf0uaQydNda7ZIlCAYcS-RL0KWDC-9tmlqqrNyy4wII_wSXRwTujGKGDCZy5JSvzSBcq6EYu79awy7YvaDVD3KevMj7o3hGmNZLHUy0aUMww9m2TPhu1uxyL22Obv5LUB3B0HuwBIm9f7VGOy3jdU2Z13BaUHDeKoyqRWI46pV3RBtAFFG9yD1fOknuO26qBsIdSvXITeSdCWcjig5Hq7NvOpCehzRldZX7ja_25opKrEAGntLuZX174FbFl2-3DMzplyQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=232712737bf84e3abbe8f3ee3b6830cd&_e=ZwLS_J9NbGmvpyUx2MswfmaQfxYD1syivi_IISyqmj_6z1oHeqJLCRlTtHnuWnegCFnJXGwVE9e_rQXpvXqV8mt9CgvvSdRdOPcPWhp4sh7zkQ7Q8vXbuaQgEAc2yXLxqk6YAuQqSaDuWfyaSf0uaQydNda7ZIlCAYcS-RL0KWDC-9tmlqqrNyy4wII_wSXRwTujGKGDCZy5JSvzSBcq6EYu79awy7YvaDVD3KevMj6qVEp48cWRa5DQLhh6Xb8DJhvxm-mZN-FJPgy3GIhsDsnEcjbovgTSWc_5KVpT2UdlhSFkWSYaOAh1VhyBYsVZQDs9JhQ3il2Av6gRq0ysgzdXLPorYGC8LVS8UlR7IgfiCZ7Udq4morKQDGKmQ5yaWLUSkAdSQOXgaKmWbuA9hA%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **** |

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: NEW YEAR! NEW WINS! Dom Jones' Environmental Vision Soars with Yet Another GAME CHANGING Endorsement! 🌟🌏 #ClickForChange
body:
Dom Jones Rocks Another Game-Changing Endorsement for a Greener Tomorrow 🚀🌍
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.domjones.org/so/d6OpLEEqG/c?w=4RbXom5rAg5hskE-aoJ9uraDsdPqbv1BT2jc_ta9-tQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG9tam9uZXMub3JnL3NvL2Q2T3BMRUVxRz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjUxYmIxNzQ0LTJhOTMtNDMwYy04YzQ3LTA4MDY4MDZkZDFjMiJ9)_**

| |
### HAPPY NEW YEAR!
### WELCOME TO OUR YEAR OF
### SUCCESS & POWERFUL ENERGY!
### Dom Jones for Assembly 2024
---
| |
---
| |
# A Momentous Endorsement for Dom Jones Campaign!
---
| |
# We are thrilled to announce a significant endorsement for the Dom Jones Campaign for California State Assembly in 2024!
---
| | The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fundhas officially endorsed Dom Jones as a candidate for California State Assembly District 72.This endorsement holds incredible meaning due to Dom Jones' unwavering dedication and commitment to environmental sustainability.
---
| |
# [What is The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund?](https://www.domjones.org/so/d6OpLEEqG/c?w=Az5BPa8zw6X1EpznjZ8E0qqUPIV1s8_mRxClVjZJmE0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9jZW50ZXJhY3Rpb25mdW5kLm9yZyIsInIiOiI4MjRmYjdlYi01NzZmLTQwZjktYmU3Ni02ODFmNzA1Mzk5OWUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)
---
| | [](https://www.domjones.org/so/d6OpLEEqG/c?w=MTxrk_YPAg5-MNPctYC02uY7cXyqpOH6UOzhMgXwNs8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9jZW50ZXJhY3Rpb25mdW5kLm9yZyIsInIiOiJjYzViZGFiYi02MzNmLTRhYjgtOGRlYy1jODc3YmFhZGIyN2QiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)
---
| | The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund is an organization that strives to strengthen our core environmental laws and support lawmakers from all political parties who believe in creating a healthier environment for future generations.
---
| |
# Why is this endorsement significant?
---
| | This endorsement is a testament to Dom Jones' long-standing advocacy for environmental sustainability and her commitment to effecting positive change. With the support of The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund, the Dom Jones Campaign for California State Assembly becomes even stronger in its mission to enact legislation that protects our natural resources and promotes sustainability. Additionally, this endorsement firmly aligns with our future Assemblywoman being a candidate of all no matter what political party anyone identifies with. For, The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund, holds all leaders accountable and is not partisan rather seeks to protect our environment, no matter what. Dom knows that the enviornment is not partisan and hence, this endorsement speaks to how Dom crosses the political divide to do what she does best: UNITE US ALL.
---
| |
# Join us in celebrating this achievement!
---
| | We invite you to join us in celebrating this momentous endorsement. Together, we can make a difference in creating a brighter and greener future for California. Stay tuned for upcoming events and opportunities to get involved in the campaign!
---
| |
# WHAT IS UPCOMING?!
---
| |
---
| | | [**I WOULD LIKE INFO ON HOW TO ATTEND**](https://www.domjones.org/so/d6OpLEEqG/c?w=BteN6Q4BBPGL3uYLNm2IMEl6GuFRc7gBfzICp1uw-YU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy53aXguY29tL2MyMTY2NmY3LWQ2ZTEtNGM4Yi1iMmU4LTg3ZGIzMjdiNmEzYTpjM2E3YzI5My1iZWI4LTRlYmQtOTc4Zi0wNjE5NDdiODI3MWIiLCJyIjoiM2Q5OTJmYjktMzA3OS00MTI4LTg1NDUtYzA4ZTlmZjA5NzQyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNTFiYjE3NDQtMmE5My00MzBjLThjNDctMDgwNjgwNmRkMWMyIn0)

subject: ☕ 🍽️ ...and other ways to get involved!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harbick for Oregon ID 23118
body:
We’re working to set up weekly coffee events or dinners in the homes and businesses of our supporters throughout all of House District 12. | | | | | [](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=4daf63206f&e=3362c31595)
---
Peter,
It’s officially 2024. Election year: a new year of possibilities. This year I will continue to fight for conservative values and, once elected, will do so from Salem. **This is the year that you and your hard work will put me in office!**
The only way to ensure a victory in 2024 is to reach more voters—voters like your family, your friends, your community. Voters live in your neighborhoods, go to your churches, and work out at your gyms. I need to gain their ear and I need your help to do it.
We’re working to set up weekly coffee events or dinners in the homes and businesses of our supporters throughout all of House District 12. We need volunteers who are able to host these events and to invite members of their community to meet and talk with me about the issues, my goals, and how they can get involved.
_**You**_**are my most indispensable tool to reach voters.** Would you be willing to help? [Click here to sign up and a member of my team will be in touch!](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=5b5759bf78&e=3362c31595)
I can’t wait to see what this new year holds for House District 12. Together, we’ll make it victorious.
Wishing you and yours a happy new year,
Darin Harbick
|

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=576ccc1e08f14e74a8d1f1d8c4e39ad3&_e=MD2_OIArBbREic-dlHSRmi-tLI7AXa0Zl_KcbQMKzrqCEnwTzv6xMOeyceqf4q9-9KXvCQJhs0qmIitWcLbENobet_npzYE8Wlutt7dGVvUog6f3y2_c9N59k5xTVj2smFX0xiuDCO9TLE09iIqQUBn0eyg_zE_HXBbBnAP-JCEl1urUck30881WksEU37RKgsGQQQoltCNPIRSlWHv7wO2pIYuFq-yIrRMdIfm0AIMui4d48J5KBeLXUSqTVVv0hlM6ALC0qqs2WgNcY0xz4z7emABgHu34J0KCHy25OpuwSNkjW-y52svju7zW2jp-XcTaW0-jCXL_pvBrj7BTjHnZ-OrpfDuBeGlYS7f4YREIdNij9T4DZ2kyoYpHMYKMeWhJh1wAppU1rldi_M8pEg%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=576ccc1e08f14e74a8d1f1d8c4e39ad3&_e=MD2_OIArBbREic-dlHSRmi-tLI7AXa0Zl_KcbQMKzrqCEnwTzv6xMOeyceqf4q9-9KXvCQJhs0qmIitWcLbENobet_npzYE8Wlutt7dGVvUog6f3y2_c9N59k5xTVj2smFX0xiuDCO9TLE09iIqQUBn0eyg_zE_HXBbBnAP-JCEl1urUck30881WksEU37RKgsGQQQoltCNPIRSlWHv7wO2pIYuFq-yIrRMdIfm0AIMui4d48J5KBeLXUSqTVVv0u7QlDW2wIx6LEMMykUDEp8ooQY3RS-mrTZA2b9HOIIbxMTdSINazyFnMcMqrW2GRk2RaEFUWTRZivEnfgaOEd3MImjhWsLzWS4m0mI1hHFCIgBXanWqnOnRNNBlxr9g28iIzVh1QWpiz2C-Qx0jaQw%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=576ccc1e08f14e74a8d1f1d8c4e39ad3&_e=MD2_OIArBbREic-dlHSRmi-tLI7AXa0Zl_KcbQMKzrqCEnwTzv6xMOeyceqf4q9-9KXvCQJhs0qmIitWcLbENobet_npzYE8Wlutt7dGVvUog6f3y2_c9N59k5xTVj2smFX0xiuDCO9TLE09iIqQUBn0eyg_zE_HXBbBnAP-JCEl1urUck30881WksEU37RKgsGQQQoltCNPIRSlWHv7wO2pIYuFq-yIrRMdIfm0AIMui4d48J5KBeLXUSqTVVv0x6-4mS9D12Uo8pp9PT9b6dQn5MPaEl1Zf5jKXKzAq-OlKOgKV0jcHYltzZcoMuL8363Qe6W9Su8OdHfT-VHrgXHbNxUDecQC3bwPfJJn-GvzX2NFwyNLjAhBph_iacLFORvBjPsLhLNqq85H-LrrKA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=576ccc1e08f14e74a8d1f1d8c4e39ad3&_e=MD2_OIArBbREic-dlHSRmi-tLI7AXa0Zl_KcbQMKzrqCEnwTzv6xMOeyceqf4q9-9KXvCQJhs0qmIitWcLbENobet_npzYE8Wlutt7dGVvUog6f3y2_c9N59k5xTVj2smFX0xiuDCO9TLE09iIqQUBn0eyg_zE_HXBbBnAP-JCEl1urUck30881WksEU37RKgsGQQQoltCNPIRSlWHv7wO2pIYuFq-yIrRMdIfm0AIMui4d48J5KBeLXUSqTVVv0ALsg6UkM1pokm6kBCK3o3J2eRpy1SWE9uhb5ARVoebgAvBjyuSIpRkfwlgvho8cZVUH2q7i1r3fz5MzH81EJBzihJ0EdKmDu5HC7mIDnJqb3EaF1GzBV4unaBK5VAULpp2TJQTUfmDH69wGtyp1Gag%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=576ccc1e08f14e74a8d1f1d8c4e39ad3&_e=MD2_OIArBbREic-dlHSRmi-tLI7AXa0Zl_KcbQMKzrqCEnwTzv6xMOeyceqf4q9-9KXvCQJhs0qmIitWcLbENobet_npzYE8Wlutt7dGVvUog6f3y2_c9N59k5xTVj2smFX0xiuDCO9TLE09iIqQUBn0eyg_zE_HXBbBnAP-JCEl1urUck30881WksEU37RKgsGQQQoltCNPIRSlWHv7wO2pIYuFq-yIrRMdIfm0AIMui4d48J5KBeLXUSqTVVv0gQoLQ1cBUTOeLV-cwxa66JfaGsd64U_fXKFO-3hfYQHMjPpKqvIg27U_FzOw5nMPoYzsm76BFREBHkJnFh9FMFs3hcIjeCSubG1RVzbdk5ISWJDOjw7WHW_Y0YoeGGcYcVjkTX-PNWPwvwYw42XmTQ%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=576ccc1e08f14e74a8d1f1d8c4e39ad3&_t=OBT_q9_-fUPC1I3wqxspVlEf6SlptVX0LmjUdECvfwMjYVCMAl0Kvr80LugdNuj4umCtWcYgB1FpQQabBxx8hd6XIO1WXZN2Gq4mOifaOvY%3D)

body:
| | | | Your Support is Vital | [](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-13-22-16-34334bb127-2m2264a7a5)
---
**Dear Fellow Patriots,** The threat is real, and it's on our doorstep.

**U.S. Customs and Border Patrol just released a chilling report – over 18 individuals on the FBI's terror watch list were apprehended last month at our southern border**.

That brings the total to 169 terrorists this year alone, surpassing the combined numbers of the past six years.

In a startling admission, Biden's own Department of Homeland Security acknowledged the infiltration of individuals with terrorism connections, exploiting established travel routes and "permissive environments" to gain access to the United States.

**_[The truth is undeniable – Biden's open-border policy is providing a gateway for terrorists to invade our nation](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-13-22-16-34334bb127-2m2264a7a5)_**.

As violence erupts overseas, with Hamas continuing its aggression in Israel and orders from Al-Qaeda and ISIS to increase attacks on Jews and Americans, the need for immediate action is critical.

_We can no longer turn a blind eye to this invasion. It's time to put an end to Biden's open-door policies and safeguard our people and our homeland._

_The time to act is now, before it's too late._

[**I make you this promise – I will not relent in the fight against Biden's open-door policy. I will tirelessly work to secure our borders, protect our country, and, most importantly, protect you**](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-13-22-16-34334bb127-2m2264a7a5).
**
Join me in this crucial cause to secure our border. Your support is vital.**

[**HELP ME SECURE OUR BORDER**](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-13-22-16-34334bb127-2m2264a7a5)

**For Our People,**

**For Freedom,**

Dr. Paul Gosar

name: Ro Khanna
subject: We must create A.I. safeguards for workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

America is embracing the new frontier of the digital age: artificial intelligence. The A.I. revolution will bring tremendous wealth and benefits to our economy. But it also brings new risks and challenges that have to be addressed. We have to center the dignity and economic security of the working class to increase economic opportunity for all Americans.

I’ve stood with truck drivers in California to support A.B. 316, a bill that would require a human driver on board a self-driving truck over 10,000 pounds. And I joined WGA and SAG-AFTRA on the picket line to fight for fair contracts that included A.I. guardrails related to compensation and credits.

READ: The Advent of A.I. Doesn’t Have to Mean the Death of Labor [https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/04/opinion/artificial-intelligence-truckers-writers.html]

https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/04/opinion/artificial-intelligence-truckers-writers.html [https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/04/opinion/artificial-intelligence-truckers-writers.html]

We’ve been here before. In the 1990s and 2000s, the internet revolution created trillions of dollars in wealth for small pockets of the country while hollowing out the working class and exacerbating wealth inequality.

I believe the A.I. revolution can help revitalize the American Dream and the working class, but it will take the federal government, industry leaders, and labor leaders working together to ensure every American in every corner of the country has the opportunity to benefit.

Sign the petition: Protect workers in the new digital age. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ai-worker-protections-petition?contactdata=S/UdNSX9ge4Zn5vKL4z6t6IM5dUBDCgpZ2VHSm0Assn1/tywvVj1Yg2aDQMQTJ1fUCoc41TJyP1e6jwXC5cUVxPkQnM+w8YMUwR/eDpkhATGdMwNFrMWnWtVFetphTmrYHDE5xkIKjNztW6dc13EAQ==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ai-worker-protections-petition?contactdata=S/UdNSX9ge4Zn5vKL4z6t6IM5dUBDCgpZ2VHSm0Assn1/tywvVj1Yg2aDQMQTJ1fUCoc41TJyP1e6jwXC5cUVxPkQnM+w8YMUwR/eDpkhATGdMwNFrMWnWtVFetphTmrYHDE5xkIKjNztW6dc13EAQ==]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20240104-ai-worker-protections]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/cIVR7XfUT02sRbeEdob-Og2?unsubscribedata=DUeyQ6lPolzTiymZH7RHywt44THGt1JwwKAENIjgNR9rlwL0%2FW4r3Kyd3%2BX4yVprMkiC9FOdYhADo2I4qrcUrwh5p0xtV1imKIruGLejjmuTowXXStPOBqx0DUKENLlFopFJ%2FfQ8PX%2BydoOeTmLIFfxI83W4lwaYwNYmy%2FedY%2B3sivJuFeqxbcBK7Q8HZ9C31NZKFJxnkNVhLDOyjB8B%2BJLTQjRwSFbrJEeb%2B2s3VPCLvZDI2Uiw8r9ya2EP1aU0JXxcr4UOSHDLu1X%2BrIDMGZGqcoD0g0iRBMLy8eBK3Fj%2B0vAFrmez%2BhGrQtvBuQdIqXsOIpThzOIh7v2vaeU4WcSZ95GvdBa8CdcQZnJPUrQaVi92b%2FJxXDxFXpZiIHFsKfRNIQp13FPGt2zmBa6B80rxCKkSy00WIo0kizkGvfqYtTjIvNDMpP5TS8lxjjti .

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: NPP announces 2024 voter registration goals!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
Big Goals for a Big Election Year
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/2024%20goal.png]
The New Pennsylvania Project has big goals for 2024 -- chief among them collecting 60,000 voter registration forms from across the Commonwealth! We know the stakes of the 2024 election are incredibly high and know the best way for us to combat the looming existential threat we face is by doing what we do best -- registering new voters in Pennsylvania.
But we can't do it alone. Here are two ways you can help us reach new voters in 2024.
1) Donate to the New Pennsylvania Project so we have the infrastructure needed to reach our 2024 goal. Every dollar you donate helps us hire/train new staff and expand into new areas of Pennsylvania to be with the historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth we center in our work
Click Here To Donate [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2]
2) Make sure you'e following us on Facebook, Instagram, and X/Twitter so you're up-to-date on all our events and activities happening in your area. We share a ton of helpful information and news-you-can-use so when you see something you know will resonate with your community, help spread the word by sharing our content!
https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject/ [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject/] https://twitter.com/newpennsylvania [https://twitter.com/newpennsylvania] https://www.instagram.com/newpennsylvania/ [https://www.instagram.com/newpennsylvania/]
NPP In The News
Pennsylvanians Can’t Afford To Sit Out In 2024 [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2023/12/pennsylvanians-cant-afford-to-sit-out-in-2024/]
(Bucks County Beacon)
Voters in the Commonwealth showed this year that they wouldn’t stand for big-money donors distorting our state courts. Well, it’s time to do the same for our federal courts.
Upcoming Events
Harrisburg
What : "We Won't Forget!" January 6th Commemoration and Condemnation Rally
When : Saturday, January 6 from 2-3PM
Where : Capitol Steps (501 N 3rd St, Harrisburg, PA 17101)
Details : We'll be joining our friends from the PA 10th District Network for a peaceful rally of remembrance that will highlight the rights we have lost since January 6, 2021, the rights needing protection, and the laws that need to be enforced to protect those rights.
For additional details and to RSVP, click here [https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/595689/] .
---
Philly
What : Reflective Democracy -- an event hosted by affiliated organization New PA Project Education Fund
When : Wednesday, Jan. 10th, 6:30-8pm
Where : Teamsters Local 623 (4369 Richmond Street, Philadelphia, PA 19135)
Details : An interactive presentation and discussion around how we achieve a more representative democracy that reflects all the people of Pennsylvania -- come have your voice heard! Includes free food, free parking, and is free to attend.
For additional details and to RSVP, click here [https://forms.gle/ekJQsCGxBWbXWdy38] .
---
Lancaster
What : Women Empowerment Day 2024
When : Saturday, January 13 from 1-4PM
Where : 515 Hershey Ave, Lancaster, PA 17603
Details : We'll be speaking at Lancaster's Women Empowerment Day event that will serve as a tribute to Martin Luther King, Jr. and feature vendors, food, performers, and is free to attend! For additional details, see the flyer below:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2436.jpg]
News You Can Use
Amid heated national debate, two Pa. mayors are asking immigrants to help reinvigorate their cities [https://www.pennlive.com/news/2024/01/amid-heated-national-debate-two-pa-mayors-are-asking-immigrants-to-help-reinvigorate-their-cities.html]
(Penn Live)
Unlike his colleagues in some larger U.S. cities, a Pennsylvania mayor is welcoming immigrants with open arms. And he’s not the only one. Erie Mayor Joe Schember said on National Public Radio’s Morning Edition on Wednesday that attracting immigrants was part of his vision when first elected seven years ago.
In 2024, Shapiro faces calls for billions for schools, a presidential election and wary lawmakers [https://apnews.com/article/josh-shapiro-governor-pennsylvania-legislature-election-43b40f06f88320bf4e26b12fe08f4c76]
(Associated Press)
In 2024, Democratic Gov. Josh Shapiro could face a more complicated sophomore year in charge of Pennsylvania after his first year brought a highway collapse, a budget stalemate and friction with allies and adversaries as he navigated the battleground state’s political divides.
No Pressure, But Bucks County Democrats Tap Jim Prokopiak To Save The Party’s Majority In Pennsylvania’s State House [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2023/12/no-pressure-but-bucks-county-democrats-tap-jim-prokopiak-to-save-the-partys-majority-in-pennsylvanias-state-house/]
(Bucks County Beacon)
Jim Prokopiak secured the endorsement of the Bucks County Democratic Committee last week in his bid for the state representative seat in the 140th House District. The seat, recently vacated by John Galloway, who resigned after being elected magisterial district judge for Falls Township in November, will trigger a special election February 13 that holds heightened significance if Democrats aim to retain the majority in the Pennsylvania state house.
Think Automatic Voter Registration Favors Dems? Think Again. [https://www.politicspa.com/think-automatic-voter-registration-favors-dems-think-again/130159/]
(Politics PA)
Since September 19, there have been 32,857 new automatic voter registrations in the Commonwealth, according to the Department of State. And the leader in the clubhouse is – other.
Beaver County now has more registered Republicans than Democrats [https://www.timesonline.com/story/news/politics/2023/12/20/beaver-county-now-has-more-registered-republicans-than-democrats/71971249007/]
(Beaver County Times)
Pennsylvania Department of State data shows that among Beaver County’s 111,725 registered voters, 48,170 are registered Republicans and 48,079 are registered Democrats – a difference of 91 registrations. That’s 43.1% Republican voters, 43% Democratic voters and 13.9% third party or unaffiliated voters.
**Note from NPP : With your support we hope to have a presence in Beaver County this year to help sway these numbers **
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.

for
Chester/Delaware
Counties

*

for

*

(Lehigh

and

Part-Time:
Education
&

in
the
Lehigh

and
Delaware/Chester

(
via
c3
organization
New

Project
Education

)
[https://newpaprojecteducationfund.org/index.php/eea/]
To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/] .
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We're excited to accomplish some big things together in 2024!
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP
2024 PA ELECTION DATES:
Primary Election: April 23, 2024
Last day to register to vote: April 8, 2024
Last day to request mail-in ballot: April 16, 2024
General Election: November 5, 2024
Last day to register to vote: October 21, 2024
Last day to request mail-in ballot: October 29, 2024
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]
The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible.
https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject] https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania [https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania] https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project [https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project] https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania [https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania]
Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
New Pennsylvania Project
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please
unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/hv49NkLeaEqRKBF0Enr9lA2?unsubscribedata=tijKszEp91oC45agBI1IqRy3PgdOcD9etFgMgTPq%2BUdPA3Gql782rtJ0T87MzC52A29Qe1MYKE2E83x9syMcfE40Z80fvqBD0%2BWZEFgMwqqahZtp5dfhrDgf0XkxKvPDk4VMjAP%2FjO2sKXEUjr5UPyHdtIKVSzp0DPgxq6ereTuJfBX5VVoWkYHc5TU4ih3QqUDAIZ%2B4kiWSg6eyPbS6c7AJrutl2fY5%2B4mgPa3dTrQsoJBUzf0fNYhUR6kF81QvrJPSFbUp9ZafSPmyhEIvyd2vzwp2Y66ctdL%2B0bQdPlppfIF4%2FysKvklhCAr2gPn%2BJEv2xp9SWxIKsCJ8TKGVzdsIdZhdCsb7H49q3VuvwyazlECb1%2B%2FxXGjB%2B7WmYjSEF8nvk%2BNcl6IWB%2BGXbNNZunmS4lnulj9ZHT94vLqRbTs%3D .

And he’s not the only one. Erie Mayor Joe Schember said on National Public Radio’s Morning Edition on Wednesday that attracting immigrants was part of his vision when first elected seven years ago. In 2024, Shapiro faces calls for billions for schools, a presidential election and wary lawmakers [] (Associated Press) In 2024, Democratic Gov. Josh Shapiro could face a more complicated sophomore year in charge of Pennsylvania after his first year brought a highway collapse, a budget stalemate and friction with allies and adversaries as he navigated the battleground state’s political divides. No Pressure, But Bucks County Democrats Tap Jim Prokopiak To Save The Party’s Majority In Pennsylvania’s State House [] (Bucks County Beacon) Jim Prokopiak secured the endorsement of the Bucks County Democratic Committee last week in his bid for the state representative seat in the 140th House District. The seat, recently vacated by John Galloway, who resigned after being elected magisterial district judge for Falls Township in November, will trigger a special election February 13 that holds heightened significance if Democrats aim to retain the majority in the Pennsylvania state house. Think Automatic Voter Registration Favors Dems? Think Again. [] (Politics PA) Since September 19, there have been 32,857 new automatic voter registrations in the Commonwealth, according to the Department of State. And the leader in the clubhouse is – other. Beaver County now has more registered Republicans than Democrats [] (Beaver County Times) Pennsylvania Department of State data shows that among Beaver County’s 111,725 registered voters, 48,170 are registered Republicans and 48,079 are registered Democrats – a difference of 91 registrations. That’s 43.1% Republican voters, 43% Democratic voters and 13.9% third party or unaffiliated voters. Note from NPP : With your support we hope to have a presence in Beaver County this year to help sway these numbers We're Hiring! The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate. Regional Organizing Director for Chester/Delaware Counties Regional Organizing Director for Bucks County Office Manager Community Engagement Associate (Lehigh Valley and Delaware/Chester Counties) * Part-Time: Education & Engagement Associate in the Lehigh Valley and Delaware/Chester Counties ( via c3 organization New PA Project Education Fund ) [] To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [] . Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We're excited to accomplish some big things together in 2024! In solidarity, #TeamNPP 2024 PA ELECTION DATES: Primary Election: April 23, 2024 Last day to register to vote: April 8, 2024 Last day to request mail-in ballot: April 16, 2024 General Election: November 5, 2024 Last day to register to vote: October 21, 2024 Last day to request mail-in ballot: October 29, 2024 We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We know why we’re on their list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Summer and I are unafraid to stand for justice, humanity, and peace — and our opposition will spend big against us.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240104-3353-footer&t=1&akid=3353%2E420207%2EVMjtAq)
Peter,
My friend and colleague Congresswoman Summer Lee and I are set to face major challenges this year, and we need your support now more than ever.
**AIPAC, funded by massive Republican megadonors, is set to spend $100 million this year against campaigns like ours**. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. Summer and I need to start the year strong to hold back this onslaught.
Let’s be clear about what is happening here. AIPAC, which endorsed over 100 Republican members of Congress who defended the January 6 insurrection, routinely targets Black and Brown members of Congress with primary challenges. **So, it is no surprise that Summer and I are on their target list this year.**
But we won’t back down. Summer and I are unafraid to stand for justice, humanity, and peace in Washington — and our opposition is scared.**Simply put: we are being targeted because we are effective in changing the status quo.**
**Peter, it's imperative that we work together to fight back against the $100 million dollar smear campaign they’re planning against our movement — and the way we start this year will determine the scope and scale of our plans to fight back.**[**Can we count on you to split a contribution of any amount between our campaigns today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240104-summer-lee-split.Bup--I&refcode=em20240104-3353&t=2&akid=3353%2E420207%2EVMjtAq)
**Summer and I have chosen to prioritize people over corporate interests. And our commitment to equal rights, freedoms, and peace has made some powerful people _very_ uncomfortable.**
The same Republican billionaires who bribed Supreme Court justices are now threatening our campaigns and the movement we’ve worked so hard to sustain. **Now more than ever, we need a swell of support from the grassroots to fight back against this no-holds-barred conservative attack.**
**Let's finish this year with a strong message: We stand together, unwavering in our pursuit of a just and equitable society. [Please consider splitting a contribution of any amount between our two campaigns today and help us protect our progress in 2024 and beyond.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240104-summer-lee-split.Bup--I&refcode=em20240104-3353&t=3&akid=3353%2E420207%2EVMjtAq)**
Your support means everything to us, and together, we can and we will overcome the odds.
In solidarity,

Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240104-3353-footer&t=4&refcode2=3353_420207_VMjtAq&akid=3353%2E420207%2EVMjtAq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=3353%2E420207%2EVMjtAq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3353%2E420207%2EVMjtAq)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: The most important race in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, the most important race happening in 2024 isn't just the race for the White House. It's the race for Senate control.
The future of everything we care about – from health care and voting rights to abortion rights – will depend on who holds the Senate majority after the election. That's why I'm writing to you today.
With the retirement of Sen. Joe Manchin, we could hold every single seat we have and still lose Senate control. That's why it's so imperative that we help Colin Allred defeat Ted Cruz in Texas.
Polls are showing these two neck and neck, and Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable GOP senator in the country. We can win this race, but the GOP knows it too – they're preparing to pour millions of dollars into Texas to lie about Colin's record and try to stop us.
Friend, if we can match the GOP's millions, we can win in Texas and virtually guarantee our Senate majority. But if Colin misses his fundraising goals, we'll lose the best chance we have to secure Senate control. Please, I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $25 or more between Colin Allred and Serve America to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz and protect our Democratic Senate majority?! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you.
Chuck
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57e43ebf12974fca845c26f328d670bc&_e=ZDmJF8sR3VFVchfwIhB6AMSNPwoaBjD9WRfYTJgje-EntxxvJZsx3GvNI4LOAaM0woiy9uUgY86wpaI8N5tJK9DIq_-Yf5RivDzAWJFrjuTkr4VxIWsVVKW-4Jagnq6oVyvtHoyBNXQZI-7mzz9_CC0cV4AU8pfFKxCX7_7NbmjKM6uTIM5btAANOxRm2bduENq9v73C9Y1Y0wPKo65nR7dfq5Q5uSG47rmp_j9fK5WTEkyx1h_2GMvfRybn9nI6sPWew0HCf4PDQkwbaX4xTk2hvD92gMmiT35OZW1b8DDeX-oeZizH4qBNN9cS2qOzuAo_btcaI59aPffKXKetdM4gOs3FLOxGgl5bkNxWtVc9xwD_930Kdof2S-ctcW1n)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57e43ebf12974fca845c26f328d670bc&_e=ZDmJF8sR3VFVchfwIhB6AMSNPwoaBjD9WRfYTJgje-EntxxvJZsx3GvNI4LOAaM0woiy9uUgY86wpaI8N5tJK9DIq_-Yf5RivDzAWJFrjuTkr4VxIWsVVKW-4Jagnq6oVyvtHoyBNXQZI-7mzz9_CC0cV4AU8pfFKxCX7_7NbmjKM6uTIM5btAANOxRm2bduENq9v73C9Y1Y0wPKo65nR7dfq5Q5uSG47rmp_j9fK5X4mrwtrm0Qg-z7SXr2YNx0_IdWISCcA57qO-n89Be3391OjrPaXJAxR9h3leJ6OcsM_z0xOi2dc6dvJr0Y4PZ1pZyEv7e1u3hYfRePjdRuvIuDRV4c_LQz6Qu_aogCmlXp3pn6GkNwukvai1dX4d6Y)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

name: Ro Khanna
subject: The advent of A.I. doesn't have to mean the death of labor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

America is embracing the new frontier of the digital age: artificial intelligence. The A.I. revolution will bring tremendous wealth and benefits to our economy. But it also brings new risks and challenges that have to be addressed. We have to center the dignity and economic security of the working class to increase economic opportunity for all Americans.

I’ve stood with truck drivers in California to support A.B. 316, a bill that would require a human driver on board a self-driving truck over 10,000 pounds. And I joined WGA and SAG-AFTRA on the picket line to fight for fair contracts that included A.I. guardrails related to compensation and credits.

READ: The Advent of A.I. Doesn’t Have to Mean the Death of Labor [https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/04/opinion/artificial-intelligence-truckers-writers.html]

https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/04/opinion/artificial-intelligence-truckers-writers.html [https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/04/opinion/artificial-intelligence-truckers-writers.html]

We’ve been here before. In the 1990s and 2000s, the internet revolution created trillions of dollars in wealth for small pockets of the country while hollowing out the working class and exacerbating wealth inequality.

I believe the A.I. revolution can help revitalize the American Dream and the working class, but it will take the federal government, industry leaders, and labor leaders working together to ensure every American in every corner of the country has the opportunity to benefit.

Sign the petition: Protect workers in the new digital age. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ai-worker-protections-petition?contactdata=G9vLbdwITgL85zHng19y5x+7tu6GEPX9wdL+imK3D56a6zEdljvuLSCSib8XgtZLr8FRPJ/4DrQdxF25t2YhdWsWlrMJN8W1jnbyIQMRBM7SeNc3NxSoFpxYLoL+w3wUtpt0pZoCeoTvKkGI9xIYZA==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ai-worker-protections-petition?contactdata=G9vLbdwITgL85zHng19y5x+7tu6GEPX9wdL+imK3D56a6zEdljvuLSCSib8XgtZLr8FRPJ/4DrQdxF25t2YhdWsWlrMJN8W1jnbyIQMRBM7SeNc3NxSoFpxYLoL+w3wUtpt0pZoCeoTvKkGI9xIYZA==]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

clean_body: [] Friend, America is embracing the new frontier of the digital age: artificial intelligence. The A.I. revolution will bring tremendous wealth and benefits to our economy. But it also brings new risks and challenges that have to be addressed. We have to center the dignity and economic security of the working class to increase economic opportunity for all Americans. I’ve stood with truck drivers in California to support A.B. 316, a bill that would require a human driver on board a self-driving truck over 10,000 pounds. And I joined WGA and SAG-AFTRA on the picket line to fight for fair contracts that included A.I. guardrails related to compensation and credits. READ: The Advent of A.I. Doesn’t Have to Mean the Death of Labor [] [] We’ve been here before. In the 1990s and 2000s, the internet revolution created trillions of dollars in wealth for small pockets of the country while hollowing out the working class and exacerbating wealth inequality. I believe the A.I. revolution can help revitalize the American Dream and the working class, but it will take the federal government, industry leaders, and labor leaders working together to ensure every American in every corner of the country has the opportunity to benefit. Sign the petition: Protect workers in the new digital age. [==] Sign the Petition [==] Thank you for your activism and all that you do. _**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=adcae69efdff4abd83f0da2c37ed235b&_e=AS85f_6vv8SlHXyCvQb31tHWXd5h-rQxJuCJ-T-A6G1kerCJ5bPNJXX3OQLECGudcDZ6iNjO2rW_My8IZMFdiJ1-IREaUXmaj3dtfIVGdHZ2xBUq7cg_YHKinJ1kqWcx_YqkecJLqobIZERwzt4VVjZqWCtoFqL0HY1scjkQPSQ6ATF4h_B210IvlFE3V5Xcwg04CXaXkul3FWQe9ICNuRbtVL070a-CWWLCeyR_sgdXbDZHtu_dRDDmhvF0DA4r1k8gk4IQug6rVU7DAMlKXbXs96S5vmC9X25pLDJJUSK8yWCzaCyr-9n3a-7_iBxSe2YviYmCnLYZkJezwE5TkEiYmX66OF2AiKwwnu2XtiDXGTiEs8wQ3GEgDGAfxR5oferMDabkI72VQoYGg2HHhZwmPXCiAgbow41PTCJc6KXrtJTIrI_YlvZd9Sfw9JoT)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=adcae69efdff4abd83f0da2c37ed235b&_e=AS85f_6vv8SlHXyCvQb31tHWXd5h-rQxJuCJ-T-A6G1kerCJ5bPNJXX3OQLECGudcDZ6iNjO2rW_My8IZMFdiJ1-IREaUXmaj3dtfIVGdHZ2xBUq7cg_YHKinJ1kqWcx_YqkecJLqobIZERwzt4VVjZqWCtoFqL0HY1scjkQPSQ6ATF4h_B210IvlFE3V5Xcwg04CXaXkul3FWQe9ICNuRbtVL070a-CWWLCeyR_sgdXbDZHtu_dRDDmhvF0DA4r1k8gk4IQug6rVU7DAMlKXbXs96S5vmC9X25pLDJJUSIqBJIV--4IQkRCoXsPq4Z9jnYq0NXqXqRNuHGQLVjuJ-yNRP7xYK_fxv08ArRMdSwXtKnBtTC1lqiY-McID00ySUHWDtY1opo4mSlGelAezfz02yPt9DWG3DAGVU-IEx_y3GXAWAkpxzKoqwi2psNE)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Hi Peter!
Welcome to 2024!
This is the year that we’re going to flip AZ-06 blue and take back control of the House. Kirsten is out on the campaign trail talking to voters every day. But we also want to hear directly from you.
To start 2024 on the right note, we put together a survey where you can tell us what issues matter to you. Will you fill it out now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/YL79tF7tN0SjRQ13IujDHw2]

Fill out our 2024 Issue Survey to let us know the priorities you want to see Kirsten focus on in 2024 >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/YL79tF7tN0SjRQ13IujDHw2]

subject: eggs & stiff joints
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Hi Friend,

Brace yourself... because you may
end up throwing out a lot of the food in your fridge after you
finish reading today's email.

You see, Maryland physician Dr.
Brian Paris says many so-called "health foods" are actually the
cause of sore, stiff joints that make you feel miserable.

"If you're in constant, chronic,
excruciating agony and don't feel well, it has to do with what
you're eating... and just as important... what you're not eating
but should eat," says Dr. Paris.

Dr. Paris found certain foods
marketed as being healthy…

...actually contain a toxic
nutrient your immune system sees as the enemy.

So, every time you take a bite of
one of these foods... your immune system unleashes its "army" to
attack this nutrient.

And since this nutrient enters
your bloodstream once it's digested... your immune system starts
attacking even healthy tissue and organs... causing burning in
your joints and muscles.

Dr. Paris explains, "Most of my
patients assume their joint issues are a normal part of the aging
process. They have no idea eating the wrong foods can cause joint

clean_body: Please read the following message from our sponsor. Hi Friend, Brace yourself... because you may end up throwing out a lot of the food in your fridge after you finish reading today's email. You see, Maryland physician Dr. Brian Paris says many so-called "health foods" are actually the cause of sore, stiff joints that make you feel miserable. "If you're in constant, chronic, excruciating agony and don't feel well, it has to do with what you're eating... and just as important... what you're not eating but should eat," says Dr. Paris. Dr. Paris found certain foods marketed as being healthy… ...actually contain a toxic nutrient your immune system sees as the enemy. So, every time you take a bite of one of these foods... your immune system unleashes its "army" to attack this nutrient. And since this nutrient enters your bloodstream once it's digested... your immune system starts attacking even healthy tissue and organs... causing burning in your joints and muscles. Dr. Paris explains, "Most of my patients assume their joint issues are a normal part of the aging process. They have no idea eating the wrong foods can cause joint problems." The good news is... this problem is EASY to fix. "You don't have to completely change your diet. Just eliminating these 5 foods from your diet - including a certain kind of vegetable - will do wonders to your life," he says. In his entire 20-year career as a doctor, Dr. Paris has found eliminating these 5 foods to be the most powerful drug-free defense against joint problems. So far, he's helped thousands of people at his private clinic... including some very famous celebrities and NFL athletes. Now, he's put his list of the 5 worst foods (and every other trick he's learned in 20 years) into a free video available to the public.. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=XMwTyYjlUXC6IpHnwGkZrnJYArsL%2B5gbCovL0WuVsNsSTy%2FxsEwJlsWi4SpSmvslP4E2Lk4kjlCs0E%2B0I8iy2gJxHZ23crrpw5FA56QJ2vkuAUn5tBwtO%2BXJbSPFvzsYqBgRRIR%2FfOUtYHeDC7WOe1cb8pME29dgwLtpPKzzhLduBHRRDILH45SdOOE2Xga%2F1e%2BC%2Bqbsn7exIekqgHVZrwsUw%2FpEmO4ZqRVSdMDgf5gJTiUSzoFmSHlIjiIpIkiedgltUp%2F1KYYygGVQfPBFnmv%2FBDUz7iRrHULtVsfkYuA%2B5%2FPRjNuuaCfNEGC%2BdNvktrilc9tY0hmWoSE3iTWAOaAR1jOFa7VY0NFJyXMcq0BuzHl0RwNwEIKPn16fo4GP7%2Fz%2FxDhUYCMFb%2F1BM8g1PGKSVmqV4ZmzGZ7vBCFF7rqqtq0KRS6uLEfl1MVUnpGA .

Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.
In the midst of this hectic campaign, it’s easy to lose sight of why this race really matters.
But over the holiday season, I had a chance to sit and reflect with my family on why I’m running and what I hope to accomplish.
I hope you’ll read the rest of my message below, but if you’re short on time, I’d be grateful if you could rush in $5 or more to help me defeat Ted Cruz in this election and bring real leadership back to Texas. Can I count on you? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Peter, this race is all about the kind of state we want to call home.
I want to live in a state that bans guns rather than books from our kids’ classrooms.
I want to live in a state where working class families can afford health care.
I want to live in a state that doesn’t tell women what to do with their bodies.
I want to live in a state that doesn’t blame every poor immigrant kid with a dream for every problem under the sun.
If that’s the kind of state you want to live in too, Peter, I know it can be frustrating to see what our so-called Republican leaders are doing in Austin and Washington.
But it’s time we turn our frustration into action.
If you want to make a better Texas, then this campaign is for you
And if you’re ready to join the fight, then I have just one simple request: Will you rush in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare? Every cent you give goes toward defeating the most extreme Republican in Washington — so no one can sit on the sidelines. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

Thank you,
—Roland

If you want to make a better Texas, then this campaign is for you And if you’re ready to join the fight, then I have just one simple request: Will you rush in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare? Every cent you give goes toward defeating the most extreme Republican in Washington — so no one can sit on the sidelines. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m running for Congress to restore the Michigan Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Experts say this race is a pure tossup after Democratic Rep. Dan Kildee announced his retirement, so I’m going to need your help from the very beginning to build a winning campaign.

| Peter, my name is Kristen McDonald Rivet. I’m a Michigan state Senator, lifelong advocate for kids and families, and proud mom of 6.**And today, I’m launching my campaign for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District.**

Experts say this race is a _pure tossup_ after Democratic Rep. Dan Kildee announced his retirement, so I’m going to need your help from the very beginning to build a winning campaign. [_**I’ll explain more about why I decided to run for Congress, but if you’re already with me, I hope you’ll split a contribution between my campaign and Fight for Progress to get this campaign off the ground:**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76471891/447608442/-1631398496?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3Yzg1OTFlLTJlYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=d1ptCu8erqdDfhGA7ckcbMs-JZtwVqGWcdWyiMjAloA=)
---
| [Donate >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76471892/447608443/-1631398496?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3Yzg1OTFlLTJlYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=d1ptCu8erqdDfhGA7ckcbMs-JZtwVqGWcdWyiMjAloA=)
---
**I’m running to restore what I call _The Michigan Dream_** : that if you work hard, you can own a home, pay your bills, put a little away for retirement, and maybe drive your family to Disney World every now and then.

I know this dream firsthand. Growing up in Portland, my dad worked construction, often clocking in 70 to 80 hours a week. When the construction season slowed down, and it got cold, he worked snow removal to make ends meet. Like many people in this district, he showered at the end of his work day, not before it. Dad wasn’t afraid to get calluses on his hands through a tough day’s work. Thanks to him and my mom, my sisters and I were the first in our family to go to college, and I have been working to uplift families like ours ever since.

**Unfortunately, today, the Michigan Dream has become out of reach for too many Michiganders.** Combine that with extremists making us less safe by trying to take away the right to abortion and refusing to address the epidemic of gun violence, and it’s clear that we need to send real leaders to D.C. who we can trust to solve problems our community faces.

I have spent my adult life fighting to make it just a little easier for working families, like the one I grew up in, to achieve the Michigan Dream. Throughout my career and now in the state Senate, I’ve helped improve employment and educational opportunities for children across our state, pass historic tax cuts for working families, and enact public policy that’s helped level the playing field.

**I’m running for Congress because I am ready to help give hardworking families across the Great Lakes Bay Region the tools to succeed.**

**But I can’t get there on my own. This is going to be one of the most competitive House races in the country – one that will determine whether or not Democrats take back the House.[_I’m counting on supporters like you to power this campaign from day one. So Peter, will you split a contribution today between my campaign and Fight for Progress to launch my campaign for Congress?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76471893/447608444/-1631398496?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3Yzg1OTFlLTJlYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=d1ptCu8erqdDfhGA7ckcbMs-JZtwVqGWcdWyiMjAloA=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The next step is universal health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We need to codify Roe. Protect abortion access. Ensure access to contraception and reproductive health care. And ultimately, we need to pass universal health care.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4961%2E5257348%2Eozdb5t)
Derek, can I share a quick story with you?
Back when I was a California state senator — before the _Affordable Care Act_ — patients were even more subject to the whims of their insurance companies.
The insurance companies could deny the medical care that patients needed, leaving them to decide whether to assume astronomical health care costs themselves or forgo the care their doctors had deemed medically necessary.
During this time, I had a conversation with a woman whose husband had been diagnosed with cancer. Although the couple was aware of a treatment that was showing promise in curing his specific cancer, their health insurance company was unwilling to cover the treatment and would only offer palliative care. The insurance company felt that the treatment was not medically necessary, a conclusion that is far easier to reach when you are not the one dying. It took an intervention by my office to convince the HMO otherwise and get him the life-saving care he needed.
We had to put a stop to this practice. So I authored a California patient bill of rights to provide patients recourse when their health insurers denied them the care they needed.
That bill passed the state legislature and was signed into law. It’s still the law today.
In the time since, I’ve worked to secure millions in federal funding to improve and expand health care across my district — from telehealth services to mental health, to upgraded facilities, and investments for first responder services assisting with mental health and substance abuse care.
I worked to help pass the _Inflation Reduction Act_ to cap the cost of expensive prescription drugs to $35 per month for seniors on Medicare.
**But there’s still work to do.** We need to expand Medi-Cal to cover low-income children and families, expecting mothers, and people with disabilities to provide free or low-cost quality health care.
We have a maternal mortality crisis in this country that’s been exacerbated by the _Dobbs_ decision striking down _Roe v. Wade_ and draconian abortion bans at the state level.
We need to codify _Roe_. Protect abortion access. Ensure access to contraception and reproductive health care. **And ultimately, we need to pass universal health care.**
[**If you’re ready to continue the fight with me until every single American is covered with quality, affordable health insurance, add your name to my petition as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Medicare for All Act._**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20240104-patient-bill-of-rights.moftHf&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4961%2E5257348%2Eozdb5t)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20240104-patient-bill-of-rights.moftHf&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4961%2E5257348%2Eozdb5t)
---
From the patient bill of rights we passed all those years ago, to the _Affordable Care Act_ , to the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , and our current fight for universal health care, this has been central to my service.
I won’t give up until everyone in this country, no matter what their income, can visit a doctor and receive the medical care they need when they need it.
That’s what I’m fighting for.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3421?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4961%2E5257348%2Eozdb5t)

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

body:
We need your help because Kari Lake is building a nationwide team of her own.
#

Nearly 20,000 of Ruben’s supporters have personally endorsed his campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona. Can you join them and add your name today?
**Supporter:** Peter

Now that we’re in the Election Year, it is absolutely mission critical that Ruben Gallego has the support of a huge team behind him.
We need your help because Kari Lake is building a nationwide team of her own — MAGA loyalists, billionaires, special interest groups, and establishment DC Republicans are lining up against us.
Defeating Ruben is their top priority, because they know that winning in Arizona is their best chance at flipping the Senate to Republican control.
So we need more people to personally endorse Ruben and help us fight back. Nearly 20,000 people have signed on to show their support for Ruben, and we need to cross 20,000 signatures by the end of the month.
That’s why we’re reaching out to you, because we haven’t seen you on the list of people who have personally endorsed Ruben.
[**Will you add your name and personally endorse this campaign to defeat Kari Lake? Show Ruben that he can count on you to fight by his side and win in November.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_jan24/?source=em240104-1-30&refcode2=1649.734936.finq-8&akid=1649%2E734936%2Efinq-8)
Simple acts like this can make a huge difference in the long run. Add your name and join the list of Ruben’s top supporters today.

Team Gallego

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: California Teachers Association & National Education Association Endorse Dave Min in CA-47
body:
Former UCI Law Professor And Only Candidate With Children Attending Public Schools Is The Choice For Teachers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/50bdd287c715/california-teachers-association-national-education-association-endorse-dave-min-in-ca-15667992?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** January 4, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**California Teachers Association & National Education Association
Endorse Dave Min in CA-47**
_Former UCI Law Professor And Only Candidate With Children Attending
Public Schools Is The Choice For Teachers_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, Dave Min is announcing the support of the nation’s largest labor union, the National Education Association, as well as their state-affiliate, the California Teachers Association, in his campaign for Congressional District 47. This marks a clean sweep for State Senator Min in backing from public educators, as he has received sole endorsements from all of the major organizations representing teachers, school staff, and the other workers who keep our public schools running. Earlier this year, he announced the endorsements of the American Federation of Teachers, the other major national teachers union, and also from the California School Employees Association, which represents school staff.

**“Dave Min has been a long time champion of public education,”** said California Teachers Association President David Goldberg.**“A product of California public schools himself, and the only candidate in this race who sends his kids to public schools, Dave understands the crucial role that good public education plays in providing the basic foundations for the American Dream. Dave has been an incredible advocate for students, teachers, and school staff in his role as State Senator, and we are thrilled to continue our relationship with Dave Min in Washington, DC.” **

NEA is the largest labor union in the United States, with affiliate organizations in every state and in more than 14,000 communities across the United States. They bring the expertise, drive, and dedication of 3 million educators and allies to advancing justice and excellence in public education. Founded in 1863, CTA represents 310,000 members who support and nurture students in classrooms every day, preparing them to be the leaders of tomorrow. CTA is the largest statewide affiliate of the National Education Association.

This announcement continues State Senator Dave Min’s incredible momentum, as he has racked up a slew of major endorsements in the past few months, including from the California Democratic Party, Equality CA, the Southern California Armenian Democrats, NeverAgain CA, AFT, PORAC, UFCW, IBEW, OCEA, NUHW, the Laborers, the Carpenters, and a host of others. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions. Min received early endorsements from Rep. Katie Porter, the outgoing incumbent, as well as from Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the California Federation of Teachers, and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=232fdafd14&e=7017cc100e). ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/about?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=5dc0fe55f6) [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=5dc0fe55f6) [update subscription preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=5dc0fe55f6)
Dave Min For Senate * PO Box 5959 * Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

---
