name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I’m running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76472785/447612170/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240104_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiNTA3M2EwLTMxYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JW7S_mxIpzPwHy8bpVrzwaOs5Hr0UGIjHHkXeLh0eA0=)
Peter, it's Debbie Mucarsel-Powell.
I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. **She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.**
_**And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it.**_
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
[_**So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $3 between Upset the Setup and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76472786/447612171/1453885363?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240104_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiNTA3M2EwLTMxYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JW7S_mxIpzPwHy8bpVrzwaOs5Hr0UGIjHHkXeLh0eA0=)

clean_body: = Peter, it's Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why. I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life. We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet. My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America. And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it. Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably. With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side. subject: Fishy Fergie Checks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Make sure you are equipped to stay up to date with news coming from the WAGOP. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=687795d7c2&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Washington Republicans,

\- Have you heard about **Bob Ferguson's** "fishy Fergie check" blunder?

\- Or, about **Jay Inslee's** dismissal of reality when it comes to his cap-and-trade carbon tax scheme?

\- Or, about **Sec. of State Steve Hobbs** contracting with a UK based AI firm to monitor the free speech of high-profile Republicans on social media?

One-party rule in Olympia has created a long series of blunders and abuses by our state government, and the stories are growing.
---
| [Follow WAGOP on Facebook](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=872d3fb055&e=6a281f566d "Follow WAGOP on Facebook")
---
| [Follow WAGOP on Twitter](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c2111a05f1&e=6a281f566d "Follow WAGOP on Twitter")
---
| ["Subscribe" (free) to the WAGOP YouTube channel](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c4a42587e0&e=6a281f566d ""Subscribe" \(free\) to the WAGOP YouTube channel")
---
| Next Monday, the **2024 legislative session** will begin in Olympia. Democrats will have the same playbook of tax-and-spend working people's paychecks, restrict individual freedoms, and consolidate power within the state government.

There is no limit to how radical Democrats in Olympia will be in their policy-making. **There are critical and tough fights ahead** for us over the next couple of months.

**But there are also some great positives to keep an eye on.** The Sec. of State's office has 40 days, starting from December 29, 2023, to **officially certify the six commonsense initiatives**. Democrats are already in panic mode over what to do with these initiatives once they are certified for the legislature.

**We have also already received a small victory** for our communication pushback efforts by stopping some Democrat pre-filed bills. In one bill, Democrats wanted to make it a $10,000 fine, plus jail time, for using gas-powered leaf-blowers and lawn-mowers - that will be the smallest of our concerns moving forward.

It will take all of us working together, working in coordination, to **successfully lobby Olympia and raise awareness to voters across our state**. Our WAGOP team and I will be providing constant legislative updates through our communication platforms that include: emails, weekly YouTube live videos on Tuesdays, with daily posts occurring on our social media accounts like Facebook and Twitter.

Please make sure to**click on the red buttons** below and follow @WAGOP on all of these platforms to stay informed, stay involved, and help us spread the word.
---
| [Follow WAGOP on Facebook](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=115bdb5283&e=6a281f566d "Follow WAGOP on Facebook")

---
| Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party

subject: Exciting news… we’re expecting!
body:
We’re so happy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76473115/447613399/1806278338?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiY2UzMTAtMzNhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tH0VcXCxxLbdL0y8EkY-dsKp6jCyEGgMaQFWhDsW4ZM=) | Hi Peter, it’s Pam, Josh’s wife. Josh and I are so thrilled to share our exciting news with you all: we are expecting our second daughter in March 2024! **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76473116/447613400/794912532?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiY2UzMTAtMzNhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tH0VcXCxxLbdL0y8EkY-dsKp6jCyEGgMaQFWhDsW4ZM=&emci=ef6e2fad-2cab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=60bce310-33ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=6455652)** We are currently in panic mode as we prepare as best we can for what it’ll be like to have two-under-two. We’d welcome any and all advice from fellow parents out there. What is the best piece of parenting advice you’ve ever received? → **[Let us know!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76473117/447613401/794912532?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiY2UzMTAtMzNhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tH0VcXCxxLbdL0y8EkY-dsKp6jCyEGgMaQFWhDsW4ZM=&emci=ef6e2fad-2cab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=60bce310-33ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=6455652)** For both Josh and I, becoming parents has only deepened our commitment to public service. I am incredibly proud of Josh for waking up every day and fighting the good fight in Congress, doing everything he can to ensure the voices of California’s Central Valley are heard. I’m also extremely concerned about the direction our country is headed, and especially worried about what might happen if we don’t take back a majority in Congress. We cringe at the extremist abortion bans being forced on women across the US today, and wonder whether our daughters will grow up in a world with less rights than we had. It’s a scary thought, and I’m so glad Josh is working hard to fight back. As we welcome our new daughter into the world, please know how grateful Josh and I are for your support. We’re going to have our hands full next year, and it means the world to have you on our team. Warmly,
Pam Harder
---
* * *

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: NY-11 is in danger

In the last 18 months, we helped to register 30,000 Pennsylvanians to vote.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76473434/447614665/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_240104resolution_N_NP_90DO_7_NG_TestB_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwY2FmYTcxLTMzYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eynbT0rCGjN-2AGO0msNffpVHKARvIjOc7_4JwvEo-k=)
| Team,

Our New Year’s resolution in 2024 is to register even more Pennsylvanians to vote and turn them out to cast their ballots 🗳️.

In the last 18 months, we helped to register 30,000 Pennsylvanians to vote.

This calendar year, **we have set the aspirational goal of collecting 60,000 voter registration forms.**

This will be critical because PA has major elections on the horizon, including presidential, congressional, every single seat in the PA House, half the PA Senate, statewide row offices, and more.

But here’s the thing: we won’t be able to hit this goal without early funding.

[**Early funding is the key to sustaining our work year-round and ensuring we are able to reach our voter registration and mobilization goals. clean_body: In the last 18 months, we helped to register 30,000 Pennsylvanians to vote. = | Team, Our New Year’s resolution in 2024 is to register even more Pennsylvanians to vote and turn them out to cast their ballots 🗳️. In the last 18 months, we helped to register 30,000 Pennsylvanians to vote. This calendar year, we have set the aspirational goal of collecting 60,000 voter registration forms. This will be critical because PA has major elections on the horizon, including presidential, congressional, every single seat in the PA House, half the PA Senate, statewide row offices, and more. But here’s the thing: we won’t be able to hit this goal without early funding. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = We have work to do. We must register, educate, and activate voters across our state, but we cannot do this alone. Thank you, Team NPP The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. clean_body: Putting [1] on hold for you. . . | | | Friend, We’ve placed the FINAL PRODUCTION ORDER of 2,500 Official Trump 2024 Calendars. Once they’re gone, they’re gone! While many patriots have already reserved a calendar in this final batch, 971 of the calendars have YET to be reserved. Because you’re a top supporter, I’m giving YOU priority access to claim [1] of the remaining 971 in this final-batch order. But I can only keep it on hold for you for 24 hours, so please let me know as soon as possible! | | I have to say, Friend... I’m very happy with the final product. While I was selecting the 12 photos for the calendar, I also got to look back at many of the fun and exciting moments we had when I was your President. Times were much better back then, weren’t they, Friend? But do not fear: 2024 will be the year we win back the White House – and you can follow along on our election-year journey with your very own Official Trump 2024 Calendar. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Abigail Spanberger

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I can assure you — we feel your support for this campaign, and I’m lucky to have you along for the ride as we inch closer to 2025!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76474242/447617616/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-01-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmMyZGYyYjMtMzRhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fABvJmI8Mw7JjmrkCOS2rlYyO3cSQ6cEeNjwEpRPxbE=)

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you sincerely for all your support over the past year.

**The end of December marked one of our most crucial deadlines, as it sets the tone for this race. Thanks to the community this campaign has behind it, we’re in a strong position as we turn the corner into 2024.**

My team and I are so grateful for your support of our campaign’s message: working to improve the lives of all Virginians, supporting our schools, keeping our communities safe, defending democracy in the face of those who seek to dismantle it, and protecting our fundamental rights.

I can assure you — we feel your support for this campaign, and I’m lucky to have you along for the ride as we inch closer to 2025!

Thank you so much!
Abigail

When I first decided to run for Congress, my mentor and former law professor Elizabeth Warren told me, **" If you're doing this right, you will learn something new every day." **
It's true. Whether it's something new about my community, or policy, or politics, I am always learning. It's a critical part of the job that is often overlooked.
But I've always been someone who loved both reading and learning. In 2017, as a newbie candidate, I attended a small grassroots fundraiser hosted by some younger voters in the district. As we discussed what I was running on and how I would lead, they asked why I knew so much about so many topics. The answer is simple--I read a lot!
While Congress has offered me the opportunity to learn from some real experts in all sorts of fields, I've always relied on good journalism to teach me and push me to think about things differently. I start by reading the news on my phone _before_ doing the social media scroll.
In my government office, I send around a weekly list of articles that I call "Katie Porter Wants You to Read." It's a list of news articles that I find meaningful for getting or keeping perspective on our work.
Today, I'm sharing a few standouts from last year's long list of **" Katie Porter Wants You to Read" **articles. These are a few topics that may not have made the headlines or the push alerts on your phone, but they're all pieces that offer a valuable perspective or insight into the lives and problems of Americans.
* New York Times: _**[Who Gets the Water in California? Whoever Gets There First](https://substack.com/redirect/8cab909b-a4f3-456c-ab38-52dbd72d9fc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **_By Raymond Zhong and Mira Rojanasakul.

* NBC: _**[Patients at private-equity-owned hospitals get more infections and fall more often, says a new study by Harvard researchers.](https://substack.com/redirect/b4ed90cf-c337-41c0-8ff3-8d74d454397a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ By Gretchen Morgenson.

* SacBee: _**[California forces migrant farmworker students to move every year.'We need to survive'](https://substack.com/redirect/f296ec5b-04f4-497b-baea-594152ad8bcd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. By Mathew Miranda and Lindsey Holden.

* LA Times:_**[If Democrats want support from California's most Latino county, they'll have to earn it](https://substack.com/redirect/0312c16e-61a5-441e-a20f-6c644b7cd706?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_[.](https://substack.com/redirect/0312c16e-61a5-441e-a20f-6c644b7cd706?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) By Jean Guerrero.

* New York Times: _**[New Medicare Rule Aims to Take Back $4.7 Billion From Insurers](https://substack.com/redirect/e31cfc79-4e9a-491b-83af-969c365c9b1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **_By Reed Abelson and Margot Sanger-Katz.

* NPR: _**[MIT, Yale, and other elite colleges are finally reaching out to rural students](https://substack.com/redirect/ef7c7260-6ec8-4a85-93a3-f19dbb24f0d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** _By Elissa Nadworny and Jon Marcus.

* LA Times: _**[California workers who cut countertops are dying of an incurable disease](https://substack.com/redirect/849189d9-4241-4dfe-8135-fc810446ab9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/849189d9-4241-4dfe-8135-fc810446ab9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** By Emily Alpert Reyes and Cindy Carcamo.

* New York Times: _**[Alone and Exploited, Migrant Children Work Brutal Jobs Across the U.S](https://substack.com/redirect/52d06830-40d3-48cf-bbfb-90e09a7c937b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. _By Hannah Dreier.

* Washington Post: _**[A rural post office was told to prioritize Amazon packages. Chaos ensued.](https://substack.com/redirect/5423bb8e-2134-4b76-9297-faed661c80b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ By Caroline O'Donovan and Jacob Bogage.

* LA Times collection of articles: _**[Why does Los Angeles have so much homelessness?](https://substack.com/redirect/8625a203-3ef3-4a3f-bec3-e4d6b4049f7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ By Noah Bierman.

* SF Chronicle: _**[Here are 16 new laws Californians must start following in 2024](https://substack.com/redirect/a14ee50c-c341-4335-bbbf-2b6a3494292e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**_**** By Sara Libby and Sophia Bollag.

I hope you find at least one of these worth the read. And if you're thinking of 2024 goals--consider making it a point to support quality journalism, especially your local newspapers.
Thanks for learning with me!
Katie Porter

clean_body: Today, I'm sharing a few standouts from last year's long list of "Katie Porter Wants You to Read" articles. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | ---|---|--- Today, I'm sharing a few standouts from last year's long list of "Katie Porter Wants You to Read" articles. | | | Jan 4 | | | | | | | | | | | | When I first decided to run for Congress, my mentor and former law professor Elizabeth Warren told me, " If you're doing this right, you will learn something new every day." It's true. Whether it's something new about my community, or policy, or politics, I am always learning. It's a critical part of the job that is often overlooked. But I've always been someone who loved both reading and learning. In 2017, as a newbie candidate, I attended a small grassroots fundraiser hosted by some younger voters in the district. As we discussed what I was running on and how I would lead, they asked why I knew so much about so many topics. The answer is simple--I read a lot! While Congress has offered me the opportunity to learn from some real experts in all sorts of fields, I've always relied on good journalism to teach me and push me to think about things differently. I start by reading the news on my phone before doing the social media scroll. In my government office, I send around a weekly list of articles that I call "Katie Porter Wants You to Read." It's a list of news articles that I find meaningful for getting or keeping perspective on our work. Today, I'm sharing a few standouts from last year's long list of " Katie Porter Wants You to Read" articles. These are a few topics that may not have made the headlines or the push alerts on your phone, but they're all pieces that offer a valuable perspective or insight into the lives and problems of Americans. New York Times: . By Raymond Zhong and Mira Rojanasakul. NBC: By Gretchen Morgenson. SacBee: . By Mathew Miranda and Lindsey Holden. LA Times: By Jean Guerrero. New York Times: . By Reed Abelson and Margot Sanger-Katz. NPR: . By Elissa Nadworny and Jon Marcus. LA Times: By Emily Alpert Reyes and Cindy Carcamo. New York Times: . By Hannah Dreier. Washington Post: By Caroline O'Donovan and Jacob Bogage. LA Times collection of articles: By Noah Bierman. SF Chronicle: .**** By Sara Libby and Sophia Bollag. I hope you find at least one of these worth the read. And if you're thinking of 2024 goals--consider making it a point to support quality journalism, especially your local newspapers. Thanks for learning with me! Katie Porter | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Katie Porter Katie Porter for Senate, PO Box 5176 Irvine, CA 92616, Email us: info@katieporter.com ? ?

| | _**Peter, all eyes are on Georgia right now.**_

As 2024 officially begins, election analysts, pundits, politicians, and political strategists across the US and around the world are keeping their eyes on just six states across America: Michigan, Wisconsin, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Arizona, _**and Georgia.**_

They all know that these six states will determine who wins in November, **and they’ll be paying close attention to every piece of information they can get about who’s ahead in Georgia.**

Every time a poll comes out, an article is written, and fundraising numbers become public, experts will try to interpret who is taking the lead. [**_We want to make sure they’re saying that Democrats have just as strong of a shot of winning Georgia in 2024 as we had in 2020, 2021, and 2022, so pitch in today to show the world that we WILL win Georgia and the White House this November._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76474848/447619665/710125701?refcode=20240104.1_PSU_1C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk5YjcwZC0zNmFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PceePLWVvw-U123YFbad3W9H-P37Y_P38d8udsAVVXw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Dear Friend,

Liberal billionaire George Soros is targeting South Texas. The Texas Voice reported he recently donated _**$100,000**_ to the Cameron County Democratic Party, composing almost their entire budget this fall.

Soros sees the conservative shift happening in the Rio Grande Valley as Democrats switch parties and more Republicans are running - and winning - up and down the ballot.
[>> DEFEND TEXAS FROM SOROS! >>](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f07c8e8d6697431b86a93670efb3a5b9&_e=AXZgKoazJd54LbvxhbJNdZc8GPrnNyfV9cYTuAJ3WlEQOeddvwk9LvNejd-Riwr2OVR03D7YiHBhkl51gNENDSay8xLBX03_86uz3O6U6Qr0Jlv9f7H4zSyAmojVRoMCemHSEkks2GycPcWZX8Iq2vSMBnyjJQKHvSQj3DTfXXq-VIE0HRcHT79ZlnhfnimZlt7yDpAF_73YZKpbMizkhJzDoI_TaeQGi5HSavlc1V7k6aM3KDhXflrPMAy03ydG6EuRGT3wuc2wdGMJEIhUIqqmRoy6-qDfSHKl8ypeFEDjT8aqh__1RobMIOuzBGhsA_cRtRaxb4vWMTD0uYttJUnSrW5LUd1BecVKsvfqdFhRTcrPa92FopPHbHdnf6-c)
George Soros has spent **MILLIONS** trying to turn Texas blue. Soros and his fellow liberal elites are relentlessly focused on imposing their radical, progressive policies on Texas. _**And as we enter election year 2024, the stakes could not be higher!**_

**Friend, we rely on your support to fight the Soros billionaire machine.[Will you step up and make a small donation today to Keep Texas Red?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f07c8e8d6697431b86a93670efb3a5b9&_e=AXZgKoazJd54LbvxhbJNdZc8GPrnNyfV9cYTuAJ3WlEQOeddvwk9LvNejd-Riwr2OVR03D7YiHBhkl51gNENDSay8xLBX03_86uz3O6U6Qr0Jlv9f7H4zSyAmojVRoMCemHSEkks2GycPcWZX8Iq2vSMBnyjJQKHvSQj3DTfXXq-VIE0HRcHT79ZlnhfnimZlt7yDpAF_73YZKpbMizkhGOc05HtA3HaPVM71A3CzdF_ETJCltujMWSdzbydaCsKnZS2VwVCa31wb1wEthXLRqh3OR1wcf_r1T2GhbYy_-rMmjg52DZU1u5R0OXGFSuhlSxcmezXAA_iOeF-ZQuo85FYiu2AinLOLeabH6JdGszxDmdrjqhB1PrDQ1sLgNC1)**

Texas is a beacon for liberty, law and order, economic prosperity, and personal responsibility. That's why we are the envy of the nation. This success is not pure luck - it's a product of unwavering Republican leadership, hard work, and enduring Texas values.

_**[So, please, I am humbly asking you today to contribute $25, $50, $100, or any amount you can to protect our borders, Texas freedoms, and communities against a Radical Liberal takeover!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f07c8e8d6697431b86a93670efb3a5b9&_e=AXZgKoazJd54LbvxhbJNdZc8GPrnNyfV9cYTuAJ3WlEQOeddvwk9LvNejd-Riwr2OVR03D7YiHBhkl51gNENDSay8xLBX03_86uz3O6U6Qr0Jlv9f7H4zSyAmojVRoMCemHSEkks2GycPcWZX8Iq2vSMBnyjJQKHvSQj3DTfXXq-VIE0HRcHT79ZlnhfnimZlt7yDpAF_73YZKpbMizkhGe1aPgicE3X0lC3MHiH4Wote-_2dZEUQ8PZn1LpZOnJosPcVCHtnCUJCZ7--2v4ovvjOCD_jxMpcSRNH5G6eN5StMBqH_FW1oVKrKHfsndNLxLDUDKhyeeOK-N_6bKCqVUXKjoiPekGjv_1bZffbBKTc8nPc8QlJANKjskAaZN7)**_

subject: There’s nothing Christian about this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tchenko for Texas
body:
These are human beings, not political pawns | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cc7011122c60/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12671718?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
Peter,
Greg Abbott thinks that people struggling are there for him to use as political pawns.
**There’s nothing Christian about that.**
As it says in Leviticus 19:33-34 – _“When a foreigner resides among you in your land, do not mistreat them. The foreigner residing among you must be treated as your native-born. Love them as yourself, for you were foreigners in Egypt. I am the LORD your God.”_
Greg Abbott, Ted Cruz and a whole lot of other supposed Christians would do well to re-read their Bible.
Putting people fleeing poverty and violence onto planes and sending them off into the night with nothing but the clothes on their back... _well that’s not in line with my values._
✅ We need comprehensive immigration reform✅ We need to strengthen our border❌ We need to remember that these are real people, NOT political pawns
I’m running for the US Senate because I know that there’s A New Way Forward.
[**If you agree, kick in $20.24 or more today and let’s fix our immigration system while also showing these so-called Christians that there’s a better way to run Texas.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=31317c1719&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Thank you,Thierry

Putting people fleeing poverty and violence onto planes and sending them off into the night with nothing but the clothes on their back... well that’s not in line with my values. ✅ We need comprehensive immigration reform✅ We need to strengthen our border❌ We need to remember that these are real people, NOT political pawns I’m running for the US Senate because I know that there’s A New Way Forward. Thank you,Thierry | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Tchenko For Texas. All rights reserved.

**I was born under the Ethiopian sun.

I was molded in the crucible of the Israel Defense Force.

I fought my way to the Promised Land.

And now I'm working to protect it.

Friend, my name is Mazi Melesa Pilip & I'm the GOP nominee for the biggest race in America - the NY-03 Special Election.

If you don't know me already, let me tell you a little about myself:

I'm an Ethiopian-born Jew who fled to Israel at the age of 12 to escape antisemitism.

At 18, I enlisted in the Israel Defense Force & joined the elite Paratrooper Brigade to defend freedom & Democracy from radical Islamic terrorists.

Following my service in the IDF, I legally immigrated to the US to pursue the American Dream.**

**_Now, I 'm running for Congress to protect this great country from the Radical Left._**

**But I have to be blunt with you - this Special Election was announced just days ago and we only have a few short weeks until voting begins. _So what happens now will decide everything._

If we're going to win this all-important race and prevent the Democrats from destroying our slim House Majority, we have to start this campaign strong.

_[That 's why I've set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by the end of the day. name: Steve Simon
subject: Working to overturn this ruling...
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76475327/447621502/1806191707?amount=15&refcode=ss_em_fr_7DO_240104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzNjZmM5NWYtMzlhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fqoqzrZZLVc7dKFUfusMb3QocCNqCnrq8ZfpSEUDAZE=) I want to express my deepest gratitude for your incredible support over the past year. Your commitment to our cause is truly heartening and essential to the work we do. Now, I want to let you know about an urgent matter that demands our collective action. **Recently, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit (in which Minnesota is located) issued a ruling that could severely undermine the Voting Rights Act.** This decision limits the ability of private citizens and civil rights groups to sue under a crucial section of the Act, Section 2, which addresses racially discriminatory voting practices. **This is an alarming setback for voting rights.** I am leading a vital effort to rally other states to challenge and overturn this ruling. I have already initiated conversations with several Secretaries of State who share our concerns, and our legal team has drafted and submitted legal memoranda to kick-start the process. We need your continued support to ensure the strength of our advocacy. By standing together, we can safeguard the principles of fairness and equality in our democracy. [**With presidential primary voting starting in just a couple of weeks, your support this year is more critical than ever. That’s why I need 100 people to join as 2024 founding members of my campaign this week. Please contribute now to help us in this urgent fight. Every dollar counts, and your support will make a real difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76475328/447621505/1806191707?amount=20&refcode2=33cfc95f-39ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&refcode=ss_em_fr_7DO_240104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzNjZmM5NWYtMzlhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fqoqzrZZLVc7dKFUfusMb3QocCNqCnrq8ZfpSEUDAZE=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: | = I want to express my deepest gratitude for your incredible support over the past year. Your commitment to our cause is truly heartening and essential to the work we do. Now, I want to let you know about an urgent matter that demands our collective action. Recently, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit (in which Minnesota is located) issued a ruling that could severely undermine the Voting Rights Act. This decision limits the ability of private citizens and civil rights groups to sue under a crucial section of the Act, Section 2, which addresses racially discriminatory voting practices. This is an alarming setback for voting rights. I am leading a vital effort to rally other states to challenge and overturn this ruling. I have already initiated conversations with several Secretaries of State who share our concerns, and our legal team has drafted and submitted legal memoranda to kick-start the process. We need your continued support to ensure the strength of our advocacy. By standing together, we can safeguard the principles of fairness and equality in our democracy. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | **= | = | = | = | = | = Thank you again for being an integral part of our movement. Together, we can overcome these challenges and protect the integrity of our democracy. Steve | = | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. name: Yolanda Bejarano
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76475645/447622520/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZjMWE2YjQtM2FhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VXnAwPGxSmhbEw5XlObZEL19jUTT9e_SytbHNvGmxEw=)
---
Team, I hope the early days of 2024 are treating you well. The new year brings new obstacles, new challenges, and new opportunities to uplift working families and marginalized communities across Arizona and fight for the representation that we deserve. We’re officially in an election year, which means that we’ll need all hands on deck for the next 306 days as we connect with every corner of Arizona to re-elect President Biden, protect and enshrine access to abortion, and flip this state Blue. [**So before I dive in, I have to ask: Will you make your first contribution of 2024 to help us mobilize Maricopa county and flip this state blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76475646/447622521/801587201?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZjMWE2YjQtM2FhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VXnAwPGxSmhbEw5XlObZEL19jUTT9e_SytbHNvGmxEw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76475647/447622522/801587201?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZjMWE2YjQtM2FhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VXnAwPGxSmhbEw5XlObZEL19jUTT9e_SytbHNvGmxEw=)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $28.23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76475648/447622523/801587201?express_lane=true&amount=28.23&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZjMWE2YjQtM2FhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VXnAwPGxSmhbEw5XlObZEL19jUTT9e_SytbHNvGmxEw=)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76475649/447622524/801587201?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZjMWE2YjQtM2FhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VXnAwPGxSmhbEw5XlObZEL19jUTT9e_SytbHNvGmxEw=)
---
The fights in Arizona will determine the outcome of the election in November, and the margins in every county could not be any closer. Don’t believe me? Check this out for yourself:
| **"Arizona again to play outsized role in 2024 presidential and Senate races"**
_— AZCentral, January 1, 2023_
* * *
"The control of the presidency, the control of the United States Senate, the control of the United States House of Representatives ... that all is going to be decided, potentially, by a margin of just 10,000 votes in Arizona,"
---
In 2020, we elected President Biden by fewer than 11,000 votes — and that’s the result of our organizers’ hard, year-round work of engaging with communities and meeting folks where they’re at.
147 Republicans in Congress voted to silence the will of Arizona voters last election. Members of Arizona’s GOP even falsely called themselves “electors” and illegally declared that Donald Trump had won Arizona. The Big Lie has disrupted Arizona’s politics and triggered a violent insurrection at our nation’s Capitol, but I truly believe our democracy is stronger than any efforts to corrupt it.
**Republicans tried and failed to steal the White House — who knows what new lows they’ll stoop to in 2024. **
Every leading Republican candidate is continuing to parrot the Big Lie conspiracy theory to align themselves with the MAGA movement and put Donald Trump back in the White House.
Republican control of all three branches of government means more tax breaks for the wealthy and at the expense of our dwindling middle class, and no action on the climate crisis, continued lies and conspiracy theories, all putting our democracy in danger. **Team, we can’t let that happen.**
Democrats have invested in our nation’s infrastructure, lowered prescription healthcare costs, and President Biden has created more jobs faster than any previous president in our nation’s history. This message is a winning one and we have to make sure every voter knows how hard Democrats are fighting for them.
[**So please, if you’re able, make your first contribution of 2024 to help us invest in every county over the next 306 days.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76475650/447622525/801587201?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZjMWE2YjQtM2FhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VXnAwPGxSmhbEw5XlObZEL19jUTT9e_SytbHNvGmxEw=)

clean_body: | = Team, I hope the early days of 2024 are treating you well. The new year brings new obstacles, new challenges, and new opportunities to uplift working families and marginalized communities across Arizona and fight for the representation that we deserve. We’re officially in an election year, which means that we’ll need all hands on deck for the next 306 days as we connect with every corner of Arizona to re-elect President Biden, protect and enshrine access to abortion, and flip this state Blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = The fights in Arizona will determine the outcome of the election in November, and the margins in every county could not be any closer. Don’t believe me? Check this out for yourself: | "Arizona again to play outsized role in 2024 presidential and Senate races" — AZCentral, January 1, 2023 "The control of the presidency, the control of the United States Senate, the control of the United States House of Representatives ... that all is going to be decided, potentially, by a margin of just 10,000 votes in Arizona," In 2020, we elected President Biden by fewer than 11,000 votes — and that’s the result of our organizers’ hard, year-round work of engaging with communities and meeting folks where they’re at. 147 Republicans in Congress voted to silence the will of Arizona voters last election. Members of Arizona’s GOP even falsely called themselves “electors” and illegally declared that Donald Trump had won Arizona. The Big Lie has disrupted Arizona’s politics and triggered a violent insurrection at our nation’s Capitol, but I truly believe our democracy is stronger than any efforts to corrupt it. Republicans tried and failed to steal the White House — who knows what new lows they’ll stoop to in 2024. Every leading Republican candidate is continuing to parrot the Big Lie conspiracy theory to align themselves with the MAGA movement and put Donald Trump back in the White House. Republican control of all three branches of government means more tax breaks for the wealthy and at the expense of our dwindling middle class, and no action on the climate crisis, continued lies and conspiracy theories, all putting our democracy in danger. Team, we can’t let that happen. Democrats have invested in our nation’s infrastructure, lowered prescription healthcare costs, and President Biden has created more jobs faster than any previous president in our nation’s history. This message is a winning one and we have to make sure every voter knows how hard Democrats are fighting for them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you for your support throughout 2023, and happy new year! — Yolanda Bejarano, Chair = Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

---
| Contact:info@robforpa.com
---
# Rob Bresnahan Announces Major Fundraising Haul and Key Endorsements To Cap Off 2023

_Bresnahan begins 2024 with nearly $600,000 cash on hand and key endorsements from local and national leaders including U.S. Speaker of the House Mike Johnson._
**Pittston, PA** \- Today, Rob Bresnahan announced his fundraising total of $650,000 for the fourth quarter. Rob enters January with nearly $600,000 cash on hand, in a strong position to take on incumbent Matt Cartwright.
Further, Rob Bresnahan announced additional endorsements to add on to his already impressive list of first quarter endorsements. The full endorsement list from the past three months is below:
U.S. Speaker of the House Mike Johnson (R-LA)Majority Leader Steve Scalise (R-LA)Majority Whip Tom Emmer (R-MN)Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik (R-NY)Deputy Whip Guy Reschenthaler (R-PA)Congressman Dan Meuser (R-PA)Congressman John Joyce (R-PA)Congressman Lloyd Smucker (R-PA)PA Representative Aaron Kaufer (R-Luzerne)PA Representative Alec Ryncavage (R-Luzerne)Lackawanna County Commissioner Chris ChermakLuzerne County Council Member John LombardoWest Pittston Mayor Angelo AlfanoWyoming Borough Mayor Joseph Dominick
**Rob Bresnahan added the following comment in announcing this news:** “I am extremely overwhelmed and grateful for the outpouring of support for my campaign. Since announcing my campaign in November, I have heard the same message from the people of the 8th District over and over again: they are tired of the same old promises that politicians continue to fail us on. We are going to take back this seat and bring new leadership to Northeast Pennsylvania this year!"
**Background on Rob Bresnahan:** Rob is a Luzerne County native, who has spent his professional life building his family business, giving back to the community, and revitalizing Northeastern Pennsylvania. At the age of 19, Rob joined the ranks of his grandfather’s electrical business as CFO to make sure the company survived the financial crisis of 2008. A few years later, Rob took over as CEO and grew the electrical contracting business from less than 50 employees to more than 150, providing family-sustaining, union careers across the region. Aside from the family business, Rob has reinvested in Northeastern Pennsylvania by revitalizing buildings in historic downtown communities, supporting local entrepreneurs, and serving his community through more than a dozen local charities and nonprofits.
**Background on the District:** Pennsylvania’s 8th District is comprised of Lackawanna, Luzerne (partial), Monroe (partial), Pike, and Wayne Counties, forming the Northeast corner of Pennsylvania. The district is rated as an R+3 with President Trump winning it in both 2016 and 2020. Both parties have identified this district as one of the most important in the nation for control of the House of Representatives in 2024.
**Rob’s full biography can be viewed here:**[**www.robforpa.com**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=92c248055b&e=131e83a3c2)

Aside from the family business, Rob has reinvested in Northeastern Pennsylvania by revitalizing buildings in historic downtown communities, supporting local entrepreneurs, and serving his community through more than a dozen local charities and nonprofits. Background on the District: Pennsylvania’s 8th District is comprised of Lackawanna, Luzerne (partial), Monroe (partial), Pike, and Wayne Counties, forming the Northeast corner of Pennsylvania. The district is rated as an R+3 with President Trump winning it in both 2016 and 2020. Both parties have identified this district as one of the most important in the nation for control of the House of Representatives in 2024. Rob’s full biography can be viewed here: | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | [Paid for by Rob for PA]() | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Rob for PA. All rights reserved.

name: Team Grothman
subject: The worst it's ever been.
body:
It's time we fix it. | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=f206a0c889bb4f779fc8dd35129de9ed&_e=XAMWCbn3RiMEaXf_N9Mj-DZh_wLgScN3u_OSukDIm_gMevMeGFLQvqhZ96PeTg1e-6l4UXt5AVR2B5_YQ66KPzYPIp_UPa_bnR3dwGcNsuX7AkpLvb4My_Zgwjr94wbu7ABQ9quVCiY6V0DLWcYm6O_2g9W72FwgISTfPd2legWegbaQSxeJqX_sQF9fC7j98IeQI26EPsOzS8I0LfLON4kH_lu4k_BIDy-l4z2vh0R0TUjC1x8q99uwoI_I0h9U)
---
Big news from the border, my friend. Glenn joined Speaker Johnson and other Republicans as they visited our southern border to see the results of Biden's disastrous border policies.
---
|
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=f206a0c889bb4f779fc8dd35129de9ed&_e=XAMWCbn3RiMEaXf_N9Mj-DZh_wLgScN3u_OSukDIm_gMevMeGFLQvqhZ96PeTg1e-6l4UXt5AVR2B5_YQ66KP_pdzF-JvqnBgeju5TlkcNdXv8VkOObxxbWImV_k_1XJ6NbGR-z-f_eB5h8Yz6H47nOa6fVQL-c8zDy6YJGDqjFcTzivh5HddX3RRfMnyakNQ6l-gOna0HIPtSwff2BozXfy76pPmtUlhCt5fwJtzklQNzukCmZNko7VFGKTzPNS)
---
|
---
_After getting a firsthand look, Glenn says that the crisis on the southern border has**NEVER** been worse. _ Just last month there were 300,000 confirmed encounters by border patrol agents...for context, that's more than six times the population of the City of Fond du Lac!

**[Glenn is helping lead the fight to secure our border. Will you chip in now to help his fight?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=f206a0c889bb4f779fc8dd35129de9ed&_e=XAMWCbn3RiMEaXf_N9Mj-DZh_wLgScN3u_OSukDIm_gMevMeGFLQvqhZ96PeTg1e-6l4UXt5AVR2B5_YQ66KP2_y5k3OZvkY42DRhjUHRGbLDaOVJLh9OnYx5jkDntIhy1ohCsBZ_tc-MxVS6pR55Nazc8pyRmuFh1cXAheZ6aAm6SxlacIXdzzA9CvMdzV6435g8OZOi6lULx2fvMIRrXbNHmi7XAbQ71Jk0aNYcdxxx4Iru5iEKhGJj1up1VVW)**

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Restoring integrity in Washington starts here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter, I’m disheartened by the chaos and self-interest that has gripped the House of Representatives. This Congress is on track to be one of the most unproductive in modern history.

The actions of the Republican majority do not reflect the values we strive to uphold as Americans. Under their leadership, petty infighting is more important than serving the American people.

Turning a blind eye to the epidemic of gun violence; Threatening to enact a national abortion ban; Denying healthcare access to those most in need; Grinding our government to a halt: **This is not leadership. It is playing games with the lives of millions of Americans. Texans deserve better. Our nation deserves better.**

This election, we must retake the House majority and get our country back on track. We must defend every Democratic seat, **including right here in TX-32.**

I’m running for Congress because our community deserves a representative with integrity, empathy, and a commitment to service. I am ready to go to Washington and fight for the people – _fight to empower Texans to thrive._

**[So today I ask for your help. Will you chip in today to help us keep TX-32 blue and retake the House clean_body: | | Peter, I’m disheartened by the chaos and self-interest that has gripped the House of Representatives. This Congress is on track to be one of the most unproductive in modern history. The actions of the Republican majority do not reflect the values we strive to uphold as Americans. Under their leadership, petty infighting is more important than serving the American people. Turning a blind eye to the epidemic of gun violence; Threatening to enact a national abortion ban; Denying healthcare access to those most in need; Grinding our government to a halt: This is not leadership. It is playing games with the lives of millions of Americans. Texans deserve better. Our nation deserves better. This election, we must retake the House majority and get our country back on track. We must defend every Democratic seat, including right here in TX-32. I’m running for Congress because our community deserves a representative with integrity, empathy, and a commitment to service. I am ready to go to Washington and fight for the people – fight to empower Texans to thrive. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Onward, Dr. Brian Williams = = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. body:
| What I learned as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1814%2E35263%2EhcuBbe)
I know my "why," Peter. Growing up as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, my family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age. **These values have informed my "why" – why I ran to serve in the Senate in the first place and why I'm running for reelection so I can continue fighting for working families like mine.** But to be honest, as I face my toughest race yet, I can't win without your help today. Right now, polling shows me 2 points down, and **a shady MAGA billionaire recently donated $2 MILLION to help my GOP opponent defeat me**. If I'm going to fight back, pull ahead, and keep Nevada blue, I need your urgent grassroots support. [**So please, will you rush $10 or more right now, split between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin****, to help me defend this battleground seat, protect our Democratic majority, and keep fighting to make a real difference for you and your family?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=tbe-em-rosen.kd-WGj&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1814%2E35263%2EhcuBbe) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jacky Rosen and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-rosen.ol7LOA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240104_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1814%2E35263%2EhcuBbe)

name: Team DeSantis
subject: You know it and we know it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5f2394d85dc663c756e4d7f474554aabfdbf6bf14ae0284195279bebc043a29ed610c17f0087f0e34ad58089e00a9610b4847820c3eaa97cc1fd4f5b41866188a8ceaf394363c8893c5023fd37189a85

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0ef80af56820224641f5582dbbb55f7a1b31a32a95ed98d994b130d37e038ea5f66f7b0429fc7e44a4f702aab6b8f0b8ee6a3059f45a68f7f80e710e49f4eae1

Hey friend,

Ron DeSantis knows it.

You know it.

And everyone at our town hall knows it.

Our border is in shambles and illegal immigration is at an all-time high. This is a crisis and an invasion.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0ef80af56820224641f5582dbbb55f7a1b31a32a95ed98d994b130d37e038ea5f66f7b0429fc7e44a4f702aab6b8f0b8ee6a3059f45a68f7f80e710e49f4eae1

Ron DeSantis knows the problem; he knows how to fix it. We can get this done. But we need your support to be in a position to do something.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0ef80af56820224641f5582dbbb55f7a1b31a32a95ed98d994b130d37e038ea5f66f7b0429fc7e44a4f702aab6b8f0b8ee6a3059f45a68f7f80e710e49f4eae1
HELP RON DESANTIS REACH HIS CRITICAL DAILY FUNDRAISING GOAL

It is not enough to talk about the problem; it's time to fix it. No excuses. According to Ron DeSantis:

"I've heard, as a Republican, talk about this southern border for years, and years, and years. I will finally be the president to bring this issue to a conclusion. We will shut the border down. We will build a border wall. We will end mass migration into this country, and we will hold the Mexican drug cartels accountable for the carnage they have unleashed on the American people."

Joe Biden has repeatedly downplayed the crisis and Kamala Harris has all but ignored it as our “border czar.”

Ron DeSantis is ready to take action and put his plan in motion. He is the only one we can trust to actually fix this outright invasion that is crippling our country.

Thank you,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0ef80af56820224641f5582dbbb55f7a1b31a32a95ed98d994b130d37e038ea5f66f7b0429fc7e44a4f702aab6b8f0b8ee6a3059f45a68f7f80e710e49f4eae1

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0ef80af5682022469ad52b73d6ec73626431558fd4ba28e610dddeb569331955fbf9e39ad8511f0a539bbd4c26ec5347c3831459519ee30abd9e4692ceac5234
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0ef80af56820224641f5582dbbb55f7a1b31a32a95ed98d994b130d37e038ea5f66f7b0429fc7e44a4f702aab6b8f0b8ee6a3059f45a68f7f80e710e49f4eae1

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0ef80af56820224641f5582dbbb55f7a1b31a32a95ed98d994b130d37e038ea5f66f7b0429fc7e44a4f702aab6b8f0b8ee6a3059f45a68f7f80e710e49f4eae1

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Biden’s Border Crisis impacts every community. And it’s affecting us here in Wisconsin.

clean_body: Joe Biden’s border crisis impacts every state and community in our country. | Friend, Under Joe Biden’s administration, more than 300,000 illegal immigrants crossed our southern border in December alone. And well over 350 more migrants arrived at the Rockford airport at the end of December. Rockford is only 20 miles south of Beloit, Wisconsin. Biden’s Border Crisis impacts every community. And it’s affecting us here in Wisconsin. I’ve been pushing since day one of Biden’s presidency to achieve common sense reforms that secure our border, end the abuse of the asylum process, and prevent fentanyl from flowing into our communities. But I need your help to continue pushing forward and secure the border with dark money groups spending MILLIONS to oust me from Congress this November. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

name: Fix Ballot Measure 110
subject: Join me. Fix Measure 110.

body:
Ballot Measure 110 has been a disaster for Oregon. It’s making our biggest problems even worse – drug addiction and overdoses, homelessness, crime, and mental health. | | |
---
| | Dear Friend: [Ballot Measure 110 has been a disaster for Oregon](http://links.fixballotmeasure110.com/u/click?_t=11db6588cabe4b84ad60732fb9c9603e&_m=1b9fb97f64cb49b5abcc4b0b3b833949&_e=oCHV-kjia4PFcUiFYiOmMl7ali5VfbN5CcC-N6N7Xl1HmynxJRRy8d4iVxTNKjceE6j_QzRQBwG9yjgFwgw5OQzCnZksCtUBMbkXFISzqzJF5-zcdsl7ny8Iw4IQgu-Ikmo4XvWtQiP58Kps-EdJghLo_0lyVY_YC3hvzHqu8nqzGHNFtM5JU4IrB_Hw8OxwN7FQNWnVAYcS-SItsWlIkeG5iYG-Bx3MUAMLG8fpPAD4s7HGbxBkLeCIUYlbBBLVSy1dBBs-zSE5HntuomVeFumO3eH4qmdBAa0mUjqO4j0xUn22xXjFYv7EQYliMCsI). It’s making our biggest problems even worse – drug addiction and overdoses, homelessness, crime, and mental health. BM 110 decriminalized deadly drugs like fentanyl, meth, and heroin. And now Oregonians are paying the terrible price. Right now, I am working to fix BM 110 and I am asking you to join me in this important cause. All I need is for you to [sign up ](http://links.fixballotmeasure110.com/u/click?_t=11db6588cabe4b84ad60732fb9c9603e&_m=1b9fb97f64cb49b5abcc4b0b3b833949&_e=oCHV-kjia4PFcUiFYiOmMl7ali5VfbN5CcC-N6N7Xl1HmynxJRRy8d4iVxTNKjceE6j_QzRQBwG9yjgFwgw5OQzCnZksCtUBMbkXFISzqzJF5-zcdsl7ny8Iw4IQgu-Ikmo4XvWtQiP58Kps-EdJghLo_0lyVY_YC3hvzHqu8no18uBA6GoluipbnxRnFz8kmaYavfnX2JrJ_us6gVmlWnLDp9KXKEg-4YElrWCFcdd2EyFAZsH7Khb7s2GnYXe-L8-HIZJJzxvN3x7DTKcQk3LkqMnYgrtNA5MaDcx6232NwbTb9A7gyUbb9jzKg49g)to stay informed.

We’re pushing the legislature to act in February. If they don’t do their job, we will let the people fix BM 110 through a ballot measure in November 2024. Our proposal makes possession of deadly drugs a crime again, replaces voluntary with mandatory drug treatment as an alternative to jail, cracks down on drug dealers and public drug use and maintains dedicated funding for drug treatment.

clean_body: Ballot Measure 110 has been a disaster for Oregon. It’s making our biggest problems even worse – drug addiction and overdoses, homelessness, crime, and mental health. | | | | | Dear Friend: . It’s making our biggest problems even worse – drug addiction and overdoses, homelessness, crime, and mental health. BM 110 decriminalized deadly drugs like fentanyl, meth, and heroin. And now Oregonians are paying the terrible price. Right now, I am working to fix BM 110 and I am asking you to join me in this important cause. All I need is for you to stay informed. name: BREAKING BORDER NEWS [From House GOP]
subject: Five pressing updates about the border invasion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Please listen carefully

| |

---
| | | Please listen carefully -

_We 're rushing to you with five urgent updates about the border invasion:_
** Update #1 ** Under Joe Biden, Border Patrol encountered 300,000+ illegal immigrants in a single month - an all-time record.

** Update #2 ** Biden's Justice Department threatened legal action to BLOCK a new border security law passed by Texas Republicans.

** Update #3 **The White House just asked the Supreme Court to allow federal agents to CUT DOWN razor wire at our border.

** Update #4 ** Speaker Johnson and 60+ House Republicans JUST flew to Eagle Pass, Texas to bring national attention to the crisis.

** Update #5 ** House Republicans PASSED the strongest border security bill in history.
Never before in our history has there been a more important time to secure our border once and for all. Since Joe Biden and the open-border Democrats refuse to do it - we're taking matters into our own hands.

Dear Peter,

Liberal billionaire George Soros is targeting South Texas. The Texas Voice reported he recently donated _**$100,000**_ to the Cameron County Democratic Party, composing almost their entire budget this fall.

Soros sees the conservative shift happening in the Rio Grande Valley as Democrats switch parties and more Republicans are running - and winning - up and down the ballot.

Dave is a battle-tested leader who will fight to secure the border, restore our economy, stand up to China, and support law and order once he gets to the Senate. The Democrats are fighting hard to take away my Senate seat, but they will stop at NOTHING to defend their vulnerable incumbents like Senator Bob Casey in Pennsylvania. Don't forget, Friend, Democrats only control the Senate by ONE SEAT. Can I count on you today? I hope you agree that we can't leave this upcoming election to chance and choose to take action today. Thank you, Senator Ted Cruz Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 23537 PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

clean_body: | | | Democrat Derek Marshall has secured another union endorsement in his campaign to defeat MAGA Rep. Jay Obernolte. Teamsters Local 1932 joins IBEW Locals 47 & 477, LiUNA, and the California Labor Federation in our fight to hold union-busting corporations accountable and give workers their fair share. Teamsters Local 1932 represents over 14,000 employees, including workers in the public sector, healthcare, and cannabis. Across America, workers are rising up, organizing their workplaces and demanding better wages. But MAGA Rep. Jay Obernolte voted NO on the PRO Act, holding a dismal 9% lifetime rating from the AFL-CIO. Help replace Obernolte with a worker’s champion - Democrat and organizer Derek Marshall. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Always looking for the union label, Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. subject: We will not forget January 6th

body:
We’d like you to join us and do a small thing.
#
Derek,
January 6th was one of the darkest days in our nation’s history. There was a peaceful transfer of power after every presidential election — every four years — until 2021.
Trump caused that. End of story.
But worse could come if we don’t stop him from normalizing this level of political instability, disinformation, and violence.
We’d like you to join us and do a small thing.
**[If you chip in $3 or more to this link, we will send you this sticker for free.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-em-jan24-j6-sticker?refcode=em240104-1-30&refcode2=22769_3013755__haa2H&akid=22769%2E3013755%2E_haa2H)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-em-jan24-j6-sticker?refcode=em240104-1-30&refcode2=22769_3013755__haa2H&akid=22769%2E3013755%2E_haa2H)
**[Or, if you chip in $25 or more to this link, we will send you this yard sign for free.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-em-jan24-j6-yard-sign?refcode=em240104-1-30&refcode2=22769_3013755__haa2H&akid=22769%2E3013755%2E_haa2H)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-em-jan24-j6-yard-sign?refcode=em240104-1-30&refcode2=22769_3013755__haa2H&akid=22769%2E3013755%2E_haa2H)
Trump and the GOP are making a brazen attempt to sweep the attack on January 6th under the rug. We refuse to let that happen.
So if you are ready to add your voice to this national conversation, please chip in and get your sticker or yard sign.
| [GET YOUR STICKER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-em-jan24-j6-sticker?refcode=em240104-1-30&refcode2=22769_3013755__haa2H&akid=22769%2E3013755%2E_haa2H)

name: Letitia James
subject: I need your input here, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
You were in the top 5% of my supporters during my campaign last year. That’s why I’ve selected you to participate in my exclusive 2023 focus group.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76478323/447632726/-1997846893?code=jtk1308-su-nd&refcode=jtk1308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFkYzhlYS00NGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yz_OC62nW_6P0XoH9NuzPgrttBqRPvfjZsW9CeMSaN4=)
---
**Peter, you were in the top 5% of my supporters last year. That’s why I’ve selected you to participate in my exclusive 2024 focus group. **
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76478325/447632728/-671119670?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1308-su-nd&refcode=jtk1308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFkYzhlYS00NGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yz_OC62nW_6P0XoH9NuzPgrttBqRPvfjZsW9CeMSaN4=&emci=01b79ec8-91a2-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=ee1dc8ea-44ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25369504)
---
I’m counting on your response because when I made history and became New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _always_ let the people’s voice guide my work. As someone who grew up without a platform to speak out against the things that directly affected my neighborhood, I knew that I _never_ wanted to let another New Yorker feel as powerless as I once did.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize next year – **but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group.**** **
| | **FOCUS GROUP RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com FOCUS GROUP PARTICIPATION ID: 128810098 **PARTICIPATED IN FOCUS GROUP?: **NO DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.
---
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76478327/447632730/-671119670?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1308-su-nd&refcode=jtk1308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFkYzhlYS00NGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yz_OC62nW_6P0XoH9NuzPgrttBqRPvfjZsW9CeMSaN4=&emci=01b79ec8-91a2-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=ee1dc8ea-44ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25369504)
---
**This focus group is only open until midnight tonight, and I need another 384 fearless fighters to respond in order to reach statistical significance. ****[_Please, will you participate in my focus group now so I know what’s most important to the people I represent? It’ll only take a moment of your time._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76478329/447632732/-671119670?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1308-su-nd&refcode=jtk1308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFkYzhlYS00NGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yz_OC62nW_6P0XoH9NuzPgrttBqRPvfjZsW9CeMSaN4=&emci=01b79ec8-91a2-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=ee1dc8ea-44ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25369504)**

Together, we made ___real_ progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 and 2023 – but we can’t afford to let that momentum falter in 2024. Because this January, _millions_ of Americans are entering the year without the right to an abortion, _millions_ of parents are entering the year without confidence that their children will be safe at school, and _millions_ of LGBTQ+ individuals are entering the year fearing for their safety.

Peter, with the chambers of Congress divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun safety reforms will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to continue the fight for justice and progress.

**But before I solidify my plans for the year ahead, I need to know what you think. Please: [_Will you accept my personal invitation to participate in my exclusive focus group? Click here to access your personalized link:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76478331/447632734/-671119670?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1308-su-nd&refcode=jtk1308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFkYzhlYS00NGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yz_OC62nW_6P0XoH9NuzPgrttBqRPvfjZsW9CeMSaN4=&emci=01b79ec8-91a2-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=ee1dc8ea-44ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76478333/447632736/-671119670?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1308-su-nd&refcode=jtk1308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFkYzhlYS00NGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yz_OC62nW_6P0XoH9NuzPgrttBqRPvfjZsW9CeMSaN4=&emci=01b79ec8-91a2-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=ee1dc8ea-44ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25369504)

Letitia

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: Are you coming?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by April Newland for National Committeewoman
body:
Our big party is February 8 on STT.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/62381ee959d9/re-hey-9339221?e=d30db4cde8)
Friend,

After you cast your vote in next month's Virgin Islands Republican caucus, please join your fellow Republicans at a big Election Night Party.

The Election Night Party will be at the Buoy Haus Beach Resort on St. Thomas. That's the old Morningstar hotel at Frenchman's Reef.

Doors open at 6:30 p.m. with the first results expected around 8 p.m. There is no charge to attend.

The first 50 people who RSVP and confirm their attendance will receive free tickets for drinks and food. Just reply to this email and let me know if you're coming. I'll put you on the list.

Former RNC Chairman Michael Steele, an NBC/MSNBC analyst, is coming down to do coverage in a live broadcast from the Election Night Party. He will also be joined by journalists from The Washington Post and National Review. We also anticipate the winning presidential candidate to make remarks in-person or live remotely.

You won't want to miss the Election Night Party given our status as the third-overall Republican primary or caucus in 2024.

If one candidate wins Iowa, New Hampshire and the Virgin Islands then the race is over. Conversely, if it's a split decision in Iowa and New Hampshire then all eyes turn to the Virgin Islands. Either way, we will be the center of the political universe on February 8.

For our Republicans on St. Croix, I know several people are planning on taking the ferry or flying over. I'm happy to connect people if you let me know.

Just tell if you're coming and I'll save your spot. Again, there's no charge.

-- Gordon Ackley
Republican Chairman

name: Dean Team
subject: Vivek’s Repulsive Views on Texas Abortion Case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean 24
body:
https://www.dean24.com [https://www.dean24.com]
Hi Friend,
Yesterday, Republican presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy shared his repulsive views on the Texas abortion case [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MKFXdO_UvpM] , in which Kate Cox was denied abortion case in her home state of Texas.
Her doctor had testified that the pregnancy was not viable — a statement that Ramaswamy declares to be incorrect. Not only does Ramaswamy not believe in a woman’s autonomy, but he doesn’t even believe her medical providers.
Candidates like this are no longer outside of the norm for the Republican Party. At some point or another, every Republican candidate running for president, especially the front runners, have made comments on abortion that not only disrespect a woman’s right to choose, but actively declare that they know better.
Dean believes that the government should have nothing to do whatsoever with what a woman does with her body. We should allow easy and safe access to abortion care, especially when the life of the mother or the child would be at risk.
This is the future we’re against. We have seen what unsafe abortion looks like, and we’re not going back. We’re fighting to codify abortion rights and end this debate once and for all. Are you with us? Chip in $24 to help us win this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.4.2024.vivek&amount=24]
Thanks,
Dean Team

Peter, it's Jon Tester.
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.
That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them.
Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**
When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.
[_**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $3 or more donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. clean_body: = Peter, it's Jon Tester. Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you. When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Politics isn’t a game. Friend, Last week, Lauren Boebert announced that she is abandoning Colorado’s 3rd Congressional district and**will now be running against me in Colorado's 4th**(South Denver suburbs/Eastern Plains)**** in a last ditch attempt to save her fledgling campaign.

My name is Ike McCorkle and I am the retired Marine Corps Force Recon Officer, Purple Heart recipient, and Democrat running in Colorado’s 4th Congressional district for the past two cycles. Since 2020 this campaign has been laying the groundwork to take back CO-04 and we are now poised to take back Colorado's 4th and rid Colorado of national disgrace Lauren Boebert once and for all. Lauren Boebert is beyond vulnerable and has _no ties to this district_ \- we have name recognition, over 22,000 grassroots donations, and a coalition of thousands of volunteers and supporters from across the district and state. **Beating Boebert on our home turf is how we finally get her out of Congress.** We are now taking on one of the GOP’s biggest fundraisers and we need to supercharge our fundraising _immediately._[**Can I count on you to chip in $25 to help supercharge the coalition that will beat Lauren Boebert this 2024?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jQgLygbMMhvwHOlCuF-aCf02XZYoP8uEKjMcZs4NPzCn-Co37UX0kyf8WalSy21PJAauHj1etnhLACJazKuNnmhJX4-KfupV-uzDLu7XLITcuaRyQNJgdI8hUuTuUTsVteoG5KM2XTLG2BHvku8C0jm1F4fAiSAQy_HC09e8e-v9_k09rqvP_X9LMw2kn9hNotiFeo9zj2z32QzCuBDeVNCICqSB03-Ry9sDY22P1pksYpGSmJMeHmMnZT0BWtcAvb0dOLRY19x1-jUFKuUa8fl-onbfvM034hMR-OP9h4wjriSFFW5nvU_wN0B2ZqAQkAMGeuaukY8gbhI-7mjsFjTNhIc2Jw13nhQRhpWr1vXIvOwRptN-NC6aA71kr0AhTyo16nyMZ6XcgTfJZKHiyZjFlZFZ8oAT-gb_n4kQAgNLBjjs_IkevhJXP86kIpAWETqmdJYjPQ_mmT9FJPHxjBDtcWy-f8_KsF_nYn06eOB9mcWXX5vYU7lkJDmXKzNPGA/42p/2NcwU05YR1SdSt-H6NDX9Q/h2/P_xxmRN0FPWTaS5x_SMfpH0bKtxtMx5aJltF1OZy6M8)
