clean_body: I am now the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in her new district | | Friend, Last week, Lauren Boebert announced that she is abandoning Colorado’s 3rd Congressional district andwill now be running against me in Colorado's 4th(South Denver suburbs/Eastern Plains)** in a last ditch attempt to save her fledgling campaign. | My name is Ike McCorkle and I am the retired Marine Corps Force Recon Officer, Purple Heart recipient, and Democrat running in Colorado’s 4th Congressional district for the past two cycles. Since 2020 this campaign has been laying the groundwork to take back CO-04 and we are now poised to take back Colorado's 4th and rid Colorado of national disgrace Lauren Boebert once and for all. Lauren Boebert is beyond vulnerable and has no ties to this district \- we have name recognition, over 22,000 grassroots donations, and a coalition of thousands of volunteers and supporters from across the district and state. Beating Boebert on our home turf is how we finally get her out of Congress. We are now taking on one of the GOP’s biggest fundraisers and we need to supercharge our fundraising immediately. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. or Boebert can run from her constituents, but she won't find a safe place to hide in my district. Isaac "Ike" McCorkle Combat Wounded U.S. Marine Corps, Retired Democratic Candidate for CO-04 | | Our mailing address is: Ike McCorkle for Congress** , | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Ike for Congress, please .

name: Robert Powell
subject: why I know Debbie will be our next senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Let me tell you about my wife
| | |
---
Hi there, friend. It's Robert, Debbie's husband.
It's been a busy couple of months here in the Mucarsel-Powell household. But I want to take a moment to step back from it all to tell you a little bit about my wife — and why I know that she's the senator our state deserves.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76479246/447635788/849749119?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk597-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBmNmRmODEtNGFhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tjVUaKLgo8BLB5mg2xOdSM60BPCjviV-3LJMkY330H4=)
Debbie has always been a rock for her family and her community. As a young immigrant in America, she worked her way through high school to help her mom pay the bills. After graduating college, she dedicated her life to giving back, a path that led her all the way to Congress. On top of all that, she's a dedicated caretaker for her mother, a devoted mom to our children, and my best friend.
Debbie is the kindest, most generous person I've ever met, and a true public servant. But don't let that fool you: _She's a fierce fighter when it comes to protecting Florida and Floridians._ From expanding health care access at Florida International University to flipping a U.S. House seat blue, she's a fearless leader who does not back down.
**In short, Debbie represents everything that our leaders should be.** Meanwhile, Rick Scott represents everything wrong with Washington — and everything that Debbie has spent her life fighting against.
Rick Scott oversaw the largest Medicare fraud in HISTORY. He wants to raise taxes on working families, ban abortions nationwide, and end Social Security and Medicare. He's pushed some of the most harmful, anti-democratic, and divisive rhetoric I've ever heard. **It's no wonder that Republicans, Independents, and Democrats all don’t like him.**
Floridians know that they deserve a leader who understands the real problems facing families; a leader who will never stop fighting for them; a leader like Debbie.
I know that Debbie has what it takes to win this race and create a better future for Florida — _the latest polling puts her one point ahead!_ **But to defeat Rick Scott and his seemingly endless personal war-chest, she needs people like you to believe in her, too.**[So please, will you show Debbie that you're all in to flip Florida blue by rushing a gift before midnight? Every donation truly makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76479247/447635789/849749119?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk597-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBmNmRmODEtNGFhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tjVUaKLgo8BLB5mg2xOdSM60BPCjviV-3LJMkY330H4=)

Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

clean_body: Let me tell you about my wife | | | Hi there, friend. It's Robert, Debbie's husband. It's been a busy couple of months here in the Mucarsel-Powell household. But I want to take a moment to step back from it all to tell you a little bit about my wife — and why I know that she's the senator our state deserves. = Debbie has always been a rock for her family and her community. As a young immigrant in America, she worked her way through high school to help her mom pay the bills. After graduating college, she dedicated her life to giving back, a path that led her all the way to Congress. On top of all that, she's a dedicated caretaker for her mother, a devoted mom to our children, and my best friend. Debbie is the kindest, most generous person I've ever met, and a true public servant. But don't let that fool you: She's a fierce fighter when it comes to protecting Florida and Floridians. From expanding health care access at Florida International University to flipping a U.S. House seat blue, she's a fearless leader who does not back down. In short, Debbie represents everything that our leaders should be. Meanwhile, Rick Scott represents everything wrong with Washington — and everything that Debbie has spent her life fighting against. Rick Scott oversaw the largest Medicare fraud in HISTORY. He wants to raise taxes on working families, ban abortions nationwide, and end Social Security and Medicare. He's pushed some of the most harmful, anti-democratic, and divisive rhetoric I've ever heard. It's no wonder that Republicans, Independents, and Democrats all don’t like him. Floridians know that they deserve a leader who understands the real problems facing families; a leader who will never stop fighting for them; a leader like Debbie. I know that Debbie has what it takes to win this race and create a better future for Florida — the latest polling puts her one point ahead! But to defeat Rick Scott and his seemingly endless personal war-chest, she needs people like you to believe in her, too.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do, Robert Powell (Debbie's Husband) | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=2442db69593848f29a2f7407fcb13dbe&_e=YFwE5YJpes1GwesWExTp4z0rzVVW73T_K2qP6E0E-m4qXjE7pqGKP3Oece4k8f3nbcJuMHkcRyoQ_rL-xvX5C6WvhwrKrGziFiX91SD5dmJJgyy4tdcduD3ti6xXIkYJT6zOVfYjptM9t6YXSerLrHs4y6UPH18cFE4R9Gs-Wai6O08uOYzb7k_qN-ATiK9-6qwWmhXXnNC1mDHicnBewnKN37pSM0CKS9WYRTOq1g8PbftmV88FAB8eFf1woJEHLkbohTzRDAOB4QdR_KtccuW4yXdzCeIG6dYwOZPRyKbC0vKSNSJCjRCizv8wu60fe0wGc49rqNQmQeWAbEu7jjVhtveBN_-3yfvnUocnjVeDAj68GzUvvHJDghmgmPxPVmr0eEb9WdA6wQcxcGmRyA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=2442db69593848f29a2f7407fcb13dbe&_e=YFwE5YJpes1GwesWExTp4z0rzVVW73T_K2qP6E0E-m4qXjE7pqGKP3Oece4k8f3nbcJuMHkcRyoQ_rL-xvX5C6WvhwrKrGziFiX91SD5dmJJgyy4tdcduD3ti6xXIkYJT6zOVfYjptM9t6YXSerLrHs4y6UPH18cFE4R9Gs-Wai6O08uOYzb7k_qN-ATiK9-6qwWmhXXnNC1mDHicnBewnKN37pSM0CKS9WYRTOq1g8MsVcDyzeW9tkfOTY-w9DebZcElDHXON2o-fA-OBE7T0Myw6S050plKx5YZn-F_qxYqL1CElHU9iGH-K4n7kdbRJMSdzbgMJyBLe2wjayC9_FRgF-TrsgnSZMHqdd710zLxRnECS9Cg_CqLUCTWL-aKLelLUNe-8P1Gl2bLw6PNQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=2442db69593848f29a2f7407fcb13dbe&_e=YFwE5YJpes1GwesWExTp4z0rzVVW73T_K2qP6E0E-m4qXjE7pqGKP3Oece4k8f3nbcJuMHkcRyoQ_rL-xvX5C6WvhwrKrGziFiX91SD5dmJJgyy4tdcduD3ti6xXIkYJT6zOVfYjptM9t6YXSerLrHs4y6UPH18cFE4R9Gs-Wai6O08uOYzb7k_qN-ATiK9-6qwWmhXXnNC1mDHicnBewnKN37pSM0CKS9WYRTOq1g9tVGD_UsV2UPgZiIAy5-gId3lJFfUcnv4xEsqseirqJIg8Hzk-ctYk8EDLDg75YJRdQYMAJG4sXGEApk_rkoL3U33CpuzsQiiaQ7bRqHa7bwBzwKuKAbmWe70ggxAwyTKsW99SgrVi-tNgzGA7cZKyZGtRkkCR44331jdSgUUSng%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

body:
Sharing my 2023 reflections with you...| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=36c67a6376514913816553c85e067e18&_e=egCpyAgQmUUKWYnAfnPoiZN-oR7xZH-SpaNkwUriZE2LmXEG1WgwoZYAGMbtV2rlIJmBfYmjsnX4C6z4DdOZi2cAQ8DQR04oQ0wvKmS-6CU7peR_Y45kLVsw7lj-wMe-LVp6kS1UrauBDZVYN9QTzFmR9_nWW7mAQ-E50S4NNHh25hUSisFk_2-QU7YZ16zuaBEm6DPlvRcM_KQbcf4W_5rrVPkSEWiHBJIt_t_-CTru1k94AxHPnaZRMf1GCnQjIMBfDG4t3yeWPaDf5TnSbqIhrG86WKpFYnlvRANobh_5aNg6ZZdb_HRt3tCUMTvtPk5q8qk07fCDlXUpZnoVmglpNAqhg1PhFfNt6tbGlx5OHw-WF1ldUuP3FnWJ6JHGKo9Yz1U9vnE_AQBytvvXyUweR72iWvr6fq1zAoNQGuCn25WbZpdwGeylm1K3rivjqBUf8IhoNb6IEAxM__cXbUQs_iHp-MgGPzpoB6kRx4A7FM6Yk_JlhAfOCOPV3Klw)

| | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. TrumpRe: 2023 -- a dark year for America
---
Dear Patriot,

---
With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just 11 days, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year – _one of the darkest years in American history_.
---
All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much _GREAT AGAIN!_
---
But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, _that_ is the ultimate crime.
---
**In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the _leading_ 2024 presidential candidate (_yours truly_) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the _“corporate death penalty”_ against me and my family. **
---
It might be hard to believe given what you’ve witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life...
---
_...Even the media said nice things about me!_
---
But then, I did something they couldn’t possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones.
---
I chose _**YOU**_**** – the _PEOPLE!_
---
I chose to put _AMERICA_ FIRST.
---
I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State.
---
And if I could go back and do it all over again, _I wouldn’t have it any other way!_
---
**Remember, they’re not really coming after me, Patriot, they’re coming after** _**YOU**_**. I’m just standing in their way – ****_and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way._**
---
Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of _**LEGAL**_****_**WARFARE**_ imaginable to try and stop us.
---
**But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will** _**NEVER**_**,**_**_EVER_**_****_**SURRENDER**_**our country to their tyranny!**
---
_And I know that patriots like YOU won’t either..._
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=36c67a6376514913816553c85e067e18&_e=egCpyAgQmUUKWYnAfnPoiZN-oR7xZH-SpaNkwUriZE2LmXEG1WgwoZYAGMbtV2rlIJmBfYmjsnX4C6z4DdOZi2cAQ8DQR04oQ0wvKmS-6CU7peR_Y45kLVsw7lj-wMe-LVp6kS1UrauBDZVYN9QTzFmR9_nWW7mAQ-E50S4NNHh25hUSisFk_2-QU7YZ16zuaBEm6DPlvRcM_KQbcf4W_5rrVPkSEWiHBJIt_t_-CTru1k94AxHPnaZRMf1GCnQjIMBfDG4t3yeWPaDf5TnSbqIhrG86WKpFYnlvRANobh_5aNg6ZZdb_HRt3tCUMTvtPk5q8qk07fCDlXUpZnoVmrB3hHoqtWt2CapHF83VCYOGpCNbVvgaJgw5hX7q4MgvJlpUO3J4iRm8w6HYK5QLyXi4r0py3fiZpklJLnNi43GjqK9ajEy3WBvJF49-LMbIT9AGFERbcHMtCwpaanJxzJ32_II2g_SGw63wtY36Hu0Qba7Yv2Et6kUPUVoqXaZW)

clean_body: Sharing my 2023 reflections with you...| | | | | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. TrumpRe: 2023 -- a dark year for America Dear Patriot, With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just 11 days, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year – one of the darkest years in American history. All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much GREAT AGAIN! But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, that is the ultimate crime. In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the leading 2024 presidential candidate (yours truly) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family. It might be hard to believe given what you’ve witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life... ...Even the media said nice things about me! But then, I did something they couldn’t possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones. I chose YOU** – the PEOPLE! I chose to put AMERICA FIRST. I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State. And if I could go back and do it all over again, I wouldn’t have it any other way! Remember, they’re not really coming after me, Patriot, they’re coming after YOU. I’m just standing in their way – **and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way. Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of LEGAL**WARFARE imaginable to try and stop us. But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will NEVER,EVERSURRENDERour country to their tyranny! And I know that patriots like YOU won’t either... | Come November 5, WE THE PEOPLE will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off the Radical Democrat regime that is destroying our country from within, and replace it with a government that serves and protects YOU. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | was to get in touch with you today | Fellow Patriot, This is it – it’s officially the biggest election year of our lifetime. Will you join me in starting it off right? Since I was elected in 2020, our movement has been a bright spot amidst liberal chaos, not just in Florida, but across the country. Now, our country needs us more than ever, Fellow Patriot. Please join me in setting things RIGHT on November 5th by claiming your 2024 Election Year Membership right away. | | | | | Below, is just some of the good work I want to keep doing for YOU this election year and beyond: ➡️ Fiscal Responsibility \- I have earned praise from many of the national conservative organizations around the country, and I have earned a reputation as one of the most fiscally conservative members of Congress. ➡️ Defender of Life \- I have led the charge in Washington to defend the unborn and be a strong voice for the pro-life movement in Congress. ➡️ Champion of Border Security \- I have visited our southern border on multiple occasions seeing firsthand what our patrol agents have done for this country, and what they need to enforce our laws. Do you think you can help me keep it up by joining my team as an Election Year Member? Thank you, | | Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03 | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: We don’t need to live like this.

body:
Gun violence is tearing our nation apart.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76479989/447638182/-849459103?refcode=ea.c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWIzMjQ0ZS00ZGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mK8Jd4etCJkq1lBGeOKzz2JHwLMmzUSovVVfS10Tw5E=&emci=90d06950-42ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)
---
**I’m sick and tired of watching communities devastated by gun violence.** Just this morning, there was another school shooting in Perry, Iowa. I want to wake up in a world where we’re safe to send our kids to school, safe to go to church, safe to run out for groceries, and safe to go out without the fear of a mass shooting. We all deserve that — and it’s not impossible. _But some politicians want you to think that’s too much to ask for._ They want you to believe that thoughts and prayers _really are_ the only possible response and that the solutions experts and advocates propose are nothing more than fantasies. They’re not, though. We know that common sense gun safety measures work because we see their effects _everywhere else._ You know why Republicans like to play dumb when it comes to gun violence? Because they’re terrified that any progress we make could hurt the gun lobby’s bottom line and their campaign contributions could dry up. **That’s BS.** As Tennessee’s next Senator, I’ll stand tall for _people_ — not the NRA and other special interests. I am committed to curbing the gun violence epidemic. I’ll vote for measures like red flag laws and waiting periods that’ll help keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people. **_[Sign on NOW if you agree that these steps and more are essential to protecting America’s kids, families, and communities >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76479990/447638183/1918991643?refcode=ea.c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWIzMjQ0ZS00ZGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mK8Jd4etCJkq1lBGeOKzz2JHwLMmzUSovVVfS10Tw5E=&emci=90d06950-42ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)_** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76479991/447638184/1918991643?refcode=ea.c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWIzMjQ0ZS00ZGFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mK8Jd4etCJkq1lBGeOKzz2JHwLMmzUSovVVfS10Tw5E=&emci=90d06950-42ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c1b3244e-4dab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)

| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

name: Team Tina
subject: What’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
While we’re out campaigning, we want to make sure we’re uplifting the issues that matter most to you. |
#
Hi team — Now that the election year has begun, Tina and the rest of our team are making our plans for the next few months. We’re thinking about how best we can reach voters in Minnesota with Democrats’ winning message about progress and building a better future for everyone. We need to uplift Senate Democrats’ accomplishments over the last year and remind everyone about the stakes of this election. And while we’re out campaigning, we want to make sure we’re uplifting the issues that matter most to you. Because Tina runs a grassroots campaign, she knows how important it is to get your input on her message to voters. **[So as we begin the year, will you take a moment or two to share with us what’s on your mind and what your top priorities are for this election year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76480205/447638867/-1484744587?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC60_20240104_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTg1NzBhZi00ZWFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WGphne-BWR0T0yE04qnq5GxlNzWYTwoi2J6CuAAhslM=&emci=34630238-37ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e18570af-4eab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76480207/447638871/-1484744587?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC60_20240104_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTg1NzBhZi00ZWFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WGphne-BWR0T0yE04qnq5GxlNzWYTwoi2J6CuAAhslM=&emci=34630238-37ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e18570af-4eab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=6227932)

subject: Downing out the GOP’s noise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
The last year has shown us we need more progressives in Congress – leaders who are committed to advocating for the issues that matter most.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76480223/447638948/602314541?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2024-01-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRjODlkMC00ZWFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xH-JyEPurum7yXjF1mEZe7ET0XG3pEtWTxTee5ALDgM=)

| Peter,

As we step into 2024, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your support throughout my campaign.

The last year has shown us we need more progressives in Congress – leaders who are committed to advocating for the issues that matter most.

The GOP has made national headlines for chaos on the House floor. _Their pursuit of an extreme agenda has targeted our voting rights, reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more._ **Now, more than ever, the 2024 election is our opportunity to drown out the noise that comes from the Republican Party’s hateful rhetoric and protect vulnerable Americans.**

Supporting campaigns like mine goes a long way in creating the progressive action we need. [_**As we enter 2024, I couldn't be more grateful for your support. Will you join me as a 2024 Founding Donor by contributing whatever you can afford today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76480224/447638949/2125913804?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2024-01-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRjODlkMC00ZWFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xH-JyEPurum7yXjF1mEZe7ET0XG3pEtWTxTee5ALDgM=)

clean_body: The last year has shown us we need more progressives in Congress – leaders who are committed to advocating for the issues that matter most. | = | Peter, As we step into 2024, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your support throughout my campaign. The last year has shown us we need more progressives in Congress – leaders who are committed to advocating for the issues that matter most. The GOP has made national headlines for chaos on the House floor. Their pursuit of an extreme agenda has targeted our voting rights, reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more. Now, more than ever, the 2024 election is our opportunity to drown out the noise that comes from the Republican Party’s hateful rhetoric and protect vulnerable Americans. Supporting campaigns like mine goes a long way in creating the progressive action we need. = | = Onward, Valerie * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. subject: We can’t sit on the sidelines, Peter. Take the pledge to defeat Trump and the MAGA agenda now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
We’ve said it before: The future of our democracy, and the state of our essential rights are all at stake in the 2024 elections. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480340/447639264/-1449784667?source=direct_link&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2024%3Frefcode%3Djtk1398&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0ZmYyZjYyLTRmYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RulpWpdUQ31RrlM3PodRhzVPPr_0btODV8vd101wLT4=&emci=731812bb-34ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=94ff2f62-4fab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=920818)
---
Peter,
We’ve said it before: The future of our democracy and the state of our essential rights are all at stake in the 2024 elections. That’s not an exaggeration. That’s a fact. **So we’re asking 500 Emerge supporters to step up and sign our urgent pledge to fight the MAGA agenda this year.**
**[Will you add your name now to pledge to vote and fight to defeat Trump and the GOP in the 2024 elections?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480342/447639268/-1449784667?source=direct_link&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2024%3Frefcode%3Djtk1398&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0ZmYyZjYyLTRmYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RulpWpdUQ31RrlM3PodRhzVPPr_0btODV8vd101wLT4=&emci=731812bb-34ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=94ff2f62-4fab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=920818)**
| | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480344/447639270/-1449784667?source=direct_link&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2024%3Frefcode%3Djtk1398&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0ZmYyZjYyLTRmYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RulpWpdUQ31RrlM3PodRhzVPPr_0btODV8vd101wLT4=&emci=731812bb-34ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=94ff2f62-4fab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=920818)
---
Right now, Donald Trump is hell-bent on retaking the White House and dragging our country deeper into his own personal power fantasy. We can’t allow that to happen. **That means fighting back against the MAGA agenda at every level of government and building strong Democratic majorities, from city councils to the U.S. Congress. But that can't happen without bold Emerge women. Here's why: **
State by state, Emerge women are running unstoppable campaigns to change the face of politics, defend our essential rights, and deliver for ALL our communities. These women are the defenders of democracy that we need right now in order to build a truly representative government for the FIRST time in our nation's history – because Emerge women are rooted in the communities they serve. **They’re the voices we need to uphold the rights of all Americans, ensure all votes are fairly counted, and defeat the MAGA agenda for good.**
But it’s going to take committed supporters like you staying in this crucial fight to empower the leaders we need up and down the ballot! **That’s why your pledge today is so important, Peter. Please, right now, before our response deadline at midnight tonight:**
**[Sign the pledge to vote to defeat Donald Trump and the GOP in 2024!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480346/447639272/-1449784667?source=direct_link&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2024%3Frefcode%3Djtk1398&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0ZmYyZjYyLTRmYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RulpWpdUQ31RrlM3PodRhzVPPr_0btODV8vd101wLT4=&emci=731812bb-34ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=94ff2f62-4fab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=920818)** | | | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480348/447639274/-1449784667?source=direct_link&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2024%3Frefcode%3Djtk1398&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0ZmYyZjYyLTRmYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RulpWpdUQ31RrlM3PodRhzVPPr_0btODV8vd101wLT4=&emci=731812bb-34ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=94ff2f62-4fab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=920818)
---
Thank you for being a part of our movement to transform politics.

– Team Emerge
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480349/447639275/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1398-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0ZmYyZjYyLTRmYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RulpWpdUQ31RrlM3PodRhzVPPr_0btODV8vd101wLT4=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:

subject: Would $25 be worth keeping Trump out of the White House???

body:
Can President Biden count on you today? | | |
---
$25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. clean_body: Can President Biden count on you today? | | | $25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you very much, Biden Campaign

clean_body: Everyone from Rachel Maddow and Chris Hayes to Jen Psaki and Morning Joe can’t stop talking about Adam Frisch’s race to replace Lauren Boebert in Congress. Hello, Everyone from Rachel Maddow and Chris Hayes to Jen Psaki and Morning Joe can’t stop talking about Adam Frisch’s race to replace Lauren Boebert in Congress. = Here’s why: In 2022, Adam Frisch shocked everyone by coming just 546 votes short of defeating Lauren Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country. What’s more: He did it in a “Safe Republican” district without one dime of support from the national Democratic party! Now, Adam is running again, and this time, everyone agrees that he can finish the job and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress. We need to raise another $50,000 before our first fundraising deadline of 2024 to counter the Super PAC lies, and we cannot afford to fall even one dollar short – not if we want to win. The only way Adam can replace Boebert in Congress is if grassroots donors like you give right now:= Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We are about to enter the next phase of this campaign, and your continued support is absolutely critical. Adam is not taking money from corporate PACs, so anything you can afford to give goes a long way. We are so eternally grateful for everything you do, Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Dear Peter,
Our year-end campaign has come to a close, and we’re beyond grateful to share that the generosity of your fellow redwoods supporters helped us to hit our goal for the Redwood Land Fund.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480632/447640350/810651203?contactdata=yAmLPWgjzuIxYBuUVwHT4/FAQvDn1Re/y5CzR6p4ldRMVRGXs6k6pPbaZx3V4SRMREFbBZEEjpBt1cJCnLKBWmWK4xBQJP672lALbTtx6lBiuFjMNKh/8c6zOpo3a9pwKjPUUL5je+Lwk8XplgqWhKu1Nco3GNxNRcdw091A6XQ=&ms=YE23-Em11-GIF&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3MWUxZTdjLTUxYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9sTYucIQ-CJbxUE1WF0A4e_LsllS-OL7xbulf2Mw59k=&emci=78d99117-f899-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=f71e1e7c-51ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1504551)
**It’s hard to overstate the importance of this fund to the League’s work.** As many of you know, we’ve protected more than 225,000 acres of redwood forests over the past 105 years, and in that time, we’ve also learned a great deal about what saving the redwoods really means.
Conservation requires more than “representative stands” of old-growth trees, as our leaders once believed. Now, thanks to the ever-evolving work of our scientists and conservationists, we understand that one protected grove does not a forest make.
We’ve learned to focus on protecting the sea of young redwood forests that surround the island of old growth already protected.
When we protect a redwood forest, we’re keeping alive the ancient roots of forests that have existed for millennia.
This successful fundraising for the Redwood Land Fund will translate directly into more forests protected and growing into healthy old growth, all thanks to you.
From all of us at the League, and from the forests awaiting protection, thank you for being part of our conservation family.
Save the Redwoods League

clean_body: From the redwood forests Dear Peter, Our year-end campaign has come to a close, and we’re beyond grateful to share that the generosity of your fellow redwoods supporters helped us to hit our goal for the Redwood Land Fund. It’s hard to overstate the importance of this fund to the League’s work. As many of you know, we’ve protected more than 225,000 acres of redwood forests over the past 105 years, and in that time, we’ve also learned a great deal about what saving the redwoods really means. Conservation requires more than “representative stands” of old-growth trees, as our leaders once believed. Now, thanks to the ever-evolving work of our scientists and conservationists, we understand that one protected grove does not a forest make. We’ve learned to focus on protecting the sea of young redwood forests that surround the island of old growth already protected. When we protect a redwood forest, we’re keeping alive the ancient roots of forests that have existed for millennia. This successful fundraising for the Redwood Land Fund will translate directly into more forests protected and growing into healthy old growth, all thanks to you. From all of us at the League, and from the forests awaiting protection, thank you for being part of our conservation family. Save the Redwoods League * | | | | ---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | |

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: Ensure that an insurrection never happens again
body:
Almost three years ago, thousands of people violently stormed the Capitol building in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election results.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480642/447640389/444630146?refcode=1-4-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiNjAzZWMwLTUxYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5tmd_h6qqGGuhT1LF-uh7Q7Jp1iiisJPs1sl3ucKWlc=)
---
| | Friend, Almost three years ago, thousands of people violently stormed the Capitol building in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election results. This illegal and insurrectionist act left our democracy on the brink, nine people dead, hundreds injured, and hundreds charged with seditious conspiracy and disorderly conduct. Donald Trump inspired and encouraged this attack. This is a man who is facing 91 felony charges across the country including for falsification of records, conspiracy to obstruct official proceedings, and willful retention of national defense information. **[**Trump was a danger to the country during his first term, and he remains a danger to our democracy. If you agree that we must take action to protect our democracy, please chip in $10 today so we can ensure that an insurrection like January 6th never happens again. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480643/447640390/444630146?refcode=1-4-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiNjAzZWMwLTUxYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5tmd_h6qqGGuhT1LF-uh7Q7Jp1iiisJPs1sl3ucKWlc=)** Even three years later, the fallout from January 6th can be felt. Candidates across the country are still running on the Big Lie, Donald Trump is claiming that all the charges against him are shams, and trials for the Capitol insurrectionists are still ongoing. **[Republicans may be trying to shrug off the insurrection as just another day of tourists at the Capitol, but we know better. January 6th was a tragic day in our nation’s history and we must ensure that something like this never happens again. Please contribute $10 now to show support for our free and fair elections.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76480644/447640391/444630146?refcode=1-4-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiNjAzZWMwLTUxYWItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5tmd_h6qqGGuhT1LF-uh7Q7Jp1iiisJPs1sl3ucKWlc=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Our hearts are with Perry, Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
This morning, students at Perry High School in Perry, Iowa woke up to what should have been a day of excitement. The first day back to school after winter break should be an opportunity for students to settle back into classes and reconnect with their friends at the start of a new year.
Instead, their morning ended in tragedy when a shooter opened fire, killing an innocent sixth grade student. At least four other students and a school administrator were injured.
Our hearts go out to today’s victims and to the entire Perry community. Perry now joins countless other American communities that have been forever altered by the horror of gun violence. Another family must now endure the unfathomable heartbreak of losing their child to a cruel act of gun violence.
I mourn for the young people who now must live with the trauma of experiencing a mass shooting. Until our elected officials stand up and do more, gun violence will continue to hurt our nation’s children and educators.
Tragedies like the one that occurred this morning in Perry are preventable, but only if leaders at every level of our government take the initiative to pass commonsense gun safety legislation. I will not rest until our schools and our communities are safe from the threat of gun violence. Please keep standing with me in this crucial fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240104-1-60&t=1&akid=7147%2E3935704%2E2IWNYK)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=7147%2E3935704%2E2IWNYK) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Folks, thank you.

We know you’ve had to endure a flooded inbox these last few days (believe us, we get them too) but we wanted to reach out and say thank you!

Your support, and the support of hundreds of grassroots supporters across our district (and the country!) has made a critical impact as we begin the New Year and enter the final stretch of this campaign.

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m coming to you to ask if you can make your very first donation of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek, it's John.
It's been exactly one year and one day since I was sworn in as PA's junior Senator, and it's been quite a journey since then.
Through it all, I'm in the Senate to fight for what matters to working Pennsylvanians. Standing with workers, lowering costs, and making a real difference in people's lives is what this job is about -- and I wouldn't be here without your help.
**[I can't do any of it alone. That's why I've got to ask: Can I count on you to make your VERY FIRST donation of 2023 to support our work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240104-1?refcode=em20240104-1-8737&refcode2=8737_434096_A3LwmW&akid=8737%2E434096%2EA3LwmW)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240104-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240104-8737&refcode2=8737_434096_A3LwmW&akid=8737%2E434096%2EA3LwmW)**
I need you with me in this fight. We send you these emails because every time, someone chips in for the first time -- **[or the first time in 2024!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240104-1?refcode=em20240104-1-8737&refcode2=8737_434096_A3LwmW&akid=8737%2E434096%2EA3LwmW)** -- and person by person, we're able to power our efforts in DC.
Standing up to GOP chaos and extremism is really important work. We'll only be able to do it if we do it together. 💪
**[So, what do you say? Will you chip in any amount as your FIRST donation of 2024 so I can keep fighting for the needs of working people in the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240104-1?refcode=em20240104-1-8737&refcode2=8737_434096_A3LwmW&akid=8737%2E434096%2EA3LwmW)**
I'm so thankful you believe in our mission to deliver for PA. Seriously, thank you soooo much.
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240104-8737-footer&t=1&refcode2=8737_434096_A3LwmW&akid=8737%2E434096%2EA3LwmW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8737%2E434096%2EA3LwmW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8737%2E434096%2EA3LwmW)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Through it all, I'm in the Senate to fight for what matters to working Pennsylvanians. Standing with workers, lowering costs, and making a real difference in people's lives is what this job is about -- and I wouldn't be here without your help. I need you with me in this fight. We send you these emails because every time, someone chips in for the first time -- -- and person by person, we're able to power our efforts in DC. Standing up to GOP chaos and extremism is really important work. We'll only be able to do it if we do it together. 💪 I'm so thankful you believe in our mission to deliver for PA. Seriously, thank you soooo much. ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

clean_body: = Friend, it’s Patrick. I’m sure you know, but from January 10 until April 8, the team will be prohibited from all fundraising. Any funds we receive after January 10, we will have to return. That means that we only have six more days before we shut down all of our fundraising links and pages, and only six more days to reach our pre-session fundraising goal of $10,000. So if you’ve been waiting for the best time to contribute to Wes, this is your chance! You can make a contribution at this link we created: = Having to pause fundraising for three months puts a strain on the team, and we need to make sure that we have resources in place. Fundraising after the holidays is hard, but we know that this team can make it happen. So let’s hit the ground running, and make sure we have a strong start to 2024. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support! Patrick

name: Team Casey
subject: Just one question for Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We’d like to hear from you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1591%2E552475%2EbPT0Le)
Peter, 2024 is finally here, and we’re getting our campaign’s priorities in order. We’re building a team of supporters all across the Commonwealth, so we wanted to hear from you about the issues that are on your mind.
**Can you take a moment to answer this quick one-question survey?** Your opinion is important to the entire team.
[What is the #1 reason to defend our Democratic Senate Majority this year?](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20230104-2&akid=1591%2E552475%2EbPT0Le) Select an issue: Protecting Democracy Supporting our seniors Stopping cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid Fighting for workers' rights Ensuring our veterans have access to the care they need Preventing a national abortion ban Strengthening gun safety laws Creating good-paying jobs Lowering costs for working families [Take the Survey ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20230104-2&akid=1591%2E552475%2EbPT0Le)
---
Bob is running for re-election because there is still work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results that make hardworking Pennsylvanians' lives a little bit easier.
He’s not done fighting for us in the Senate, but in order to reflect your priorities in our campaign, he needs to hear from you. That’s why we put together a short survey to hear your thoughts.
[**Take our one-question survey today about defending Senate control in 2024. We want to make sure we hear from everyone on our team.**](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20230104-2&akid=1591%2E552475%2EbPT0Le)
Thank you for sharing your thoughts,
Team Casey

* * *

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

The Democrats are on a warpath to destroy our liberties and individualism that made America great. Dave is a battle-tested leader who will fight to secure the border, restore our economy, stand up to China, and support law and order once he gets to the Senate.

| | We're less than one year away from the next House of Representatives being sworn in. **We'll either be ushering in a new Democratic majority committed to building on the progress we've made, or faced with two more years of extremist Republicans running the show and sowing chaos.** Right now, Republicans have just a 5-seat margin in the House, meaning who wins the House in 2024 could easily come down to just one or two districts. Right now, at least _three_ seats in Oregon are shaping up to be competitive (two Democratic-held, and one Republican-held). **If we sweep these races, our chances of winning the House will greatly improve.** Ron wants to make sure that Oregon Democrats have the resources to defend their seats early on and flip another from red to blue. clean_body: | | | | We're less than one year away from the next House of Representatives being sworn in. We'll either be ushering in a new Democratic majority committed to building on the progress we've made, or faced with two more years of extremist Republicans running the show and sowing chaos. Right now, Republicans have just a 5-seat margin in the House, meaning who wins the House in 2024 could easily come down to just one or two districts. Right now, at least three seats in Oregon are shaping up to be competitive (two Democratic-held, and one Republican-held). If we sweep these races, our chances of winning the House will greatly improve. Ron wants to make sure that Oregon Democrats have the resources to defend their seats early on and flip another from red to blue. And now that we're in an election year, and officially one year out from the new Congress being sworn in, there's no time to waste. we do today will determine whether one year from now we have a Congress that delivers for working families...or special interests. = Let's go! Friend, Update: Last week, the Biden administration AGAIN bypassed Congress to send weapons to the Israeli military while it commits war crimes and genocide. Last week’s sale was worth more than $147 million. And Biden still wants Congress to send $14 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military, without any conditions on upholding human rights. Biden and leaders in his administration can’t legitimately claim that they’re pushing the Israeli government to protect Palestinians when they’re continually vetoing and watering down UN resolutions, and sending more weapons to Israel’s military. [**Add your name and demand President Biden call for a permanent ceasefire, protect human rights, and stop sending U.S. bombs and weapons for war crimes.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKumdBhCO9Efk9gkWg105y-civwjPS_N0Mdt0NRAh3qdwjcd52XBdGgErnTyAfNjPKty4yc3gfKX_j9gHQe2uYHqgCmZKuuM78B9f7uDvgQS_bxUWy1BzSvJ-hVK_StuNu3zbWr2HkZv9vP4Qz5C0Cr75WqyQYZ9pl89fSTVpAygq-7uVdmx1TvCTSlkoP747dQq-_5mEVKCK1976O5fLCVjoHxDbRwP9Ur0pE7E5cLiyS45uzqO8DlwxhDdnamOzrtheDvrdIgekmpEDhN2xHFjI0YnmuwcZ1gQvnbvu0IuSIzv6IHQRrXhexFvcXvKNAN1L6KqNALLcqpxAdbR3tL6gp22dDuQIl6ROgl7yMQs-TSWIIXNUMCbisbBxRF8igmG9cVohxtpmaJRgAHejbuyTKfBtwwWCNiIztzl_sqCn38C-sZuSHk0qfkIfFMwR2RMR2Ev11GHzlrb7J2zbl5B475cly-QVS2yUiCpRqcdbE/42p/zqxPuvxHSh-BT_xEUV8Mdg/h1/jU9Kn6yIt_8aJSEW6fogVQNc5BSz6MOq3hcAIpr4WHw) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKumdBhCO9Efk9gkWg105y-civwjPS_N0Mdt0NRAh3qdwjcd52XBdGgErnTyAfNjPKty4yc3gfKX_j9gHQe2uYHqgCmZKuuM78B9f7uDvgQS_bxUWy1BzSvJ-hVK_StuNu3zbWr2HkZv9vP4Qz5C0Cr71DyZIzSSAQPjDLcoistseix5pTmkqRwVvSX9nbzRIoKcLXAg0n-MLKWW6TrMYELS4OIMvPo77aetuHgxkGZmNcFpCw14cP-nZ9-Cf9kuErgIlnpUiPAEPXiE3gvZu9nvat6-bdXR-By1mE3EhUEzGjWxqJ9fl6ODzf_5aga16FVySC6SDJlrkUZTn6NKfnSpyrh_SRr-EkaPf4JMjpU6pgiBwZ3hlhnWVzJQmOTCWVPl1mkKknDYutg1PuDxVBd-K5ZhpBNUFLUryWsftk3sKmvSH5MT_mtWj8-TrbOqFvjmf8zm7mvUO0YyJh502QYBKxFee3m4NkxH-2he9XZsP4/42p/zqxPuvxHSh-BT_xEUV8Mdg/h2/6R3MWxVLo0GuCpeIFQ8DT-dYVDv60QicapiFsXTGG6U)

**The American people overwhelmingly want a ceasefire, and they don’t want our tax dollars funding ethnic cleansing.**
Even as there is growing international outcry over the genocide that Israel’s government is perpetrating against the Palestinian people, the U.S. government continues to send more weapons of war to Israel, which has dropped more than 22,000 U.S.-provided bombs on Gaza, killing more than 20,000 Palestinians, mostly women and children.
UNICEF called Gaza “the most dangerous place in the world to be a child.”
UNICEF’s Executive Director said: “Access to sufficient amounts of clean water is a matter of life and death, and children in Gaza have barely a drop to drink.” She blamed “the constant bombing, along with the restrictions on materials and fuel allowed into the territory.”
Health organizations are now warning that more Palestinians in Gaza may die from dehydration, hunger, and disease than from the bombing. Our government has the power to stop all of this!
[**Sign now to demand President Biden call for a permanent ceasefire and protect human rights—including the right to water, food, healthcare, housing, and electricity.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKumdBhCO9Efk9gkWg105y-civwjPS_N0Mdt0NRAh3qdwjcd52XBdGgErnTyAfNjPKty4yc3gfKX_j9gHQe2uYHqgCmZKuuM78B9f7uDvgQS_bxUWy1BzSvJ-hVK_StuNu3zbWr2HkZv9vP4Qz5C0Cr78TOe742qk5GCSQ9tW4OmoLJq_QD8RhxJN0o0iOVDkk3__FskBK1H8WLxqYKG84sEHupjAMp2sbt5WRAWsdCh-WvefPFIaqnxDFetJ9Fn2PjAvn6BSF9a7xRZRxpR91zx_fx12yZARl09o-xYM5SE72kYP6HlJP9d3Ls-oGGOnQ9mpZukQMoeUqNewHXaSsXIfuPokhbj-SEZT6gfVV5mWhQONGzYItJSPeK5oC_fzopcMvteQiCQ9-H23aQJBIv8xdRwCuB34_zYPW0epsmswpg07rZqgmy7AuTsa-LAjZkcfQHFaLmfXLgnathgU52J-PhVwwNCI44kih2090K2yM/42p/zqxPuvxHSh-BT_xEUV8Mdg/h3/1BUuQu-qQlXTHxnVBJYLXOWJX7twX-vsNQ-VOPNeUmU)
Achieving a just and lasting peace—where Israelis and Palestinians have equal rights and freedoms, and where no person lives in fear for their safety—requires not only a ceasefire but also ending the blockade, occupation, and dehumanizing system of apartheid.
Thank you for being part of our growing movement for peace and equality.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Mike Feuer
subject: Starting 2024 with THANK YOU!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS
body:
To start 2024 on the right foot, there were two things on my to-do list.

Mike Feuer for Congress [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76481252/447642645/1100932385?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.01.04_B1_ThankYou_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2NhOTMwYWUtNTVhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1c81VtH49GUy8Jr6t-Hyp_pigMV1EpwXIb6zjBVlhOM=&emci=161c3abd-49ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=7ca930ae-55ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13691217) | Friend, To start 2024 on the right foot, there were two things on my to-do list. The first was to enjoy the annual Rose Parade. The second (but much more important) item: Say a big **THANK YOU for being part of my campaign.** Not only did we hit our end-of-year fundraising goals, but we also exceeded 1,000 grassroots donors. Because of you, we can run a responsive, grassroots-funded campaign focused on improving the lives of real people — not the agendas of special interests or PACs. I sincerely appreciate everything you did for this campaign in 2023 — whether you donated, forwarded one of our emails to friends and family, or spread the word on social media. clean_body: To start 2024 on the right foot, there were two things on my to-do list. Mike Feuer for Congress | Friend, To start 2024 on the right foot, there were two things on my to-do list. The first was to enjoy the annual Rose Parade. The second (but much more important) item: Say a big THANK YOU for being part of my campaign. Not only did we hit our end-of-year fundraising goals, but we also exceeded 1,000 grassroots donors. Because of you, we can run a responsive, grassroots-funded campaign focused on improving the lives of real people — not the agendas of special interests or PACs. I sincerely appreciate everything you did for this campaign in 2023 — whether you donated, forwarded one of our emails to friends and family, or spread the word on social media. In a crowded race like this one, every single action matters! subject: [INVITATION] 2024 Democratic Focus Group
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi -- It’s Christie, Executive Director of the DSCC. Looking through your past survey responses, I was VERY impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 90 percent of Democrats in our database!**

Folks like you will help make or break 2024. So, with one of the most important elections of our lifetime _quickly_ approaching, it’s **essential** that we hear from you!

To kick off the election year, I’m launching a high-priority 2024 Focus Group that's ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **and you’re in the top 10% of Democrats who made the cut.**

**So please, click this link to accept your invitation and join my 2024 Focus Group right away by taking this survey:** [**www.dscc.org/2024DemocraticStrategists/#9716520**](https://go.dscc.org/go/17116?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240104-Christie-Christie2024PrioritiesSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240104-Christie-Christie2024PrioritiesSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=13112%2E9716520%2EKC4Is6)**

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
Executive Director, DSCC

Hi Friend,

It's Kari Lake, and I'm currently in the fight of my life trying to **save the soul of America in Arizona.**

No matter what happens, I'm never going to give up. I'm in this fight for ALL OF US. I will NEVER SURRENDER.

If I lose, Arizona is lost.

If Arizona is lost, the country is lost.

We must preserve what we have left and FIGHT to save this state and our conservative values.

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Our 2024 Campaign Kick Off
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Did you know that early voting for the Texas primary begins in just 47 days?! That’s why we’re holding our Campaign Kick-Off this Saturday, January 6, 2024.
When our team looked at the calendar and saw that the first Saturday in January of this election year was also the third anniversary of the January 6 insurrection, I had mixed feelings. For the past two years, I have observed the anniversary of the attack on our Capitol, our Constitution, and our country in a somber and reflective way, honoring Capitol Police Officers by serving them meals with my colleagues who I was with in the House Gallery that day and remembering and honoring those who defended our democracy that day and in the days since.
But I realized that this year had to be different, because this year is different. And there is no greater reminder of what is at stake in this election than what happened on January 6, 2021. So we will honor and remember with action to empower people across our district to protect and to participate in our democracy.
If you can join us in person, you can RSVP here: https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596396/ [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596396/]
And if you can’t be there in person, you can still be part of it by supporting our efforts to talk to voters with a contribution here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240104goal?refcode=lpfe240104goal]
We will continue that work all through this important year, when we will have many opportunities to work together. Our work together is all about electing people who will honor our Constitution and our country and our fellow citizens. There is no better reminder of the challenges before us, and the importance of our work together, than January 6.
Thanks for all you have done and will do in 2024.
Together, we can do anything,
LizzieSignature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240104goal?refcode=lpfe240104goal]

name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: Friend <> Mike Rogers introduction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Meet my friend who’s going to flip Michigan’s Senate seat| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=34083d02b3864c11a77d056ab76fb051&_e=ggjsenl9PVPwn0qHLaHvOgPDT3Gm2M8dzO-LPCUtgRss53qfnTQ3yx8XUBPEgstObqz5d9BaXeEXybPRtL2YlIyzuyNJGRcCTY0AD7Bt3b8Qr5qMoNP_B-WVbaNMSny2fX818gifnow0LQOfrPk0z11d_wc_2T3eo6DvdXSGGRkNlz1jurTQ4FDAPrmpHuFIcocff1n4Ib5kEgmLKEM9H-mhfnleWkqTcOTFQ8gd-BHBRIkEKyaIkOa3iDUs_Sge24hJaJ3VEtOxf1NCwoiUpGyfECf3gMKvkbwSzLQ5Ub_VGI30XLzyF4jWEP49zy9-cDU0EKu_lNY0YcTPb2O1m8CSsN9q7NUpQEXYLPKQ_vnwYilkiNJ2exzEeqOcKcDhQP40O_l5HW-J1E7wPDayYQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Mike Rogers is a fellow Army veteran, and I served with him in Congress for two years. Trust me, he’s the real deal. Mike chaired the House Intelligence Committee. He knows the threats our country faces, from the border to Communist China. And he has experience it’s going to take to make America strong again. Now, Mike is running in a **[crucial](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=34083d02b3864c11a77d056ab76fb051&_e=ggjsenl9PVPwn0qHLaHvOgPDT3Gm2M8dzO-LPCUtgRss53qfnTQ3yx8XUBPEgstObqz5d9BaXeEXybPRtL2YlIyzuyNJGRcCTY0AD7Bt3b8Qr5qMoNP_B-WVbaNMSny2fX818gifnow0LQOfrPk0z11d_wc_2T3eo6DvdXSGGRkNlz1jurTQ4FDAPrmpHuFIcocff1n4Ib5kEgmLKEM9H-mhfnleWkqTcOTFQ8gd-BHBRIkEKyaIkOa3iDUs_SgeLSyxn5geR0eGxAdPQHyF3FE7JHzP9wLzoy9amS4oXcqKIeMjAQy7n7rhHl1PYP_uP6ultVP4HSVbNSSEIvVl2lOB1wyp8q_goeMBDKY07OvSCKfkOiiQDyNB40h8QaW6wpEu9F0QVQTmtsDmgzBdBA%3D%3D) **race for the U.S. Senate in Michigan. The Democrats are going to do and spend whatever it takes to defeat him. I **[refuse](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=34083d02b3864c11a77d056ab76fb051&_e=ggjsenl9PVPwn0qHLaHvOgPDT3Gm2M8dzO-LPCUtgRss53qfnTQ3yx8XUBPEgstObqz5d9BaXeEXybPRtL2YlIyzuyNJGRcCTY0AD7Bt3b8Qr5qMoNP_B-WVbaNMSny2fX818gifnow0LQOfrPk0z11d_wc_2T3eo6DvdXSGGRkNlz1jurTQ4FDAPrmpHuFIcocff1n4Ib5kEgmLKEM9H-mhfnleWkqTcOTFQ8gd-BHBRIkEKyaIkOa3iDUs_SgealEUeFfxR-AdG37K9PUDa9BniMLPVRfmk_l7HcweWSniwlC0wWXVGcJ0U8TII-j5ur7CqbGvNrXK9miwuljY3OrHrsHDCYGe2gu5PHHHzuATuSXAim5QCXLfEIeiUapXaJqHBqo3s9dvTB8TfeTcWA%3D%3D)** to let that happen. The party that’s won Michigan has won the Senate and the White House in the last _**[four](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=34083d02b3864c11a77d056ab76fb051&_e=ggjsenl9PVPwn0qHLaHvOgPDT3Gm2M8dzO-LPCUtgRss53qfnTQ3yx8XUBPEgstObqz5d9BaXeEXybPRtL2YlIyzuyNJGRcCTY0AD7Bt3b8Qr5qMoNP_B-WVbaNMSny2fX818gifnow0LQOfrPk0z11d_wc_2T3eo6DvdXSGGRkNlz1jurTQ4FDAPrmpHuFIcocff1n4Ib5kEgmLKEM9H-mhfnleWkqTcOTFQ8gd-BHBRIkEKyaIkOa3iDUs_Sge-QAicYFh4fkcYV2Ss2WSaLa82Ne2u2iI5VgLBJ-itzj6OdR4ZnUTh39xO55laemgsGvWyh_PUogD5O6N1_GYIOUUus_06modAYVa-YRpLmd8BLZ9IDG9jjuMzzKCGUoxgUqCj9bY78AdxCqTE4y2hQ%3D%3D)**_ elections — so we must win Michigan, we must flip this Senate seat, and we must elect Mike Rogers. **[He has my full support, and I’m asking you to join me by donating any amount here. Let’s win Michigan and take back the Senate.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=34083d02b3864c11a77d056ab76fb051&_e=ggjsenl9PVPwn0qHLaHvOgPDT3Gm2M8dzO-LPCUtgRss53qfnTQ3yx8XUBPEgstObqz5d9BaXeEXybPRtL2YlIyzuyNJGRcCTY0AD7Bt3b8Qr5qMoNP_B-WVbaNMSny2fX818gifnow0LQOfrPk0z11d_wc_2T3eo6DvdXSGGRkNlz1jurTQ4FDAPrmpHuFIcocff1n4Ib5kEgmLKEM9H-mhfnleWkqTcOTFQ8gd-BHBRIkEKyaIkOa3iDUs_SgeXBvKN5aU47T4VDuqFX0dWnU_rRxK19ug9tM_dnj-si8BGwGFMbfk_DpLyokYIcB4mxepWM8s0dQhnaFzA6mhG01AMi6kStzWJWoW3Sluep4I_A4Ibc6ibMfZ90mlrP4Fcv4MloEHZY9GDR4LbRPhxA%3D%3D)** In service,
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=34083d02b3864c11a77d056ab76fb051&_e=ggjsenl9PVPwn0qHLaHvOgPDT3Gm2M8dzO-LPCUtgRss53qfnTQ3yx8XUBPEgstObqz5d9BaXeEXybPRtL2YlIyzuyNJGRcCTY0AD7Bt3b8Qr5qMoNP_B-WVbaNMSny2fX818gifnow0LQOfrPk0z11d_wc_2T3eo6DvdXSGGRkNlz1jurTQ4FDAPrmpHuFIcocff1n4Ib5kEgmLKEM9H-mhfnleWkqTcOTFQ8gd-BHBRIkEKyaIkOa3iDUs_SgeFMWXxIpd81ENHECj4Zm-eULe3tcvvnfFEaFRBJkZyyJwzJQ5swQvHfAqJDmiDLSo5cZDFBe2KzGtN1bf7cP7qX-8EqnnHBq1zsUJg3w6UiQVrcbw-4GHdaFIDigYpYCYxd9SMa31OcWWENsMSYyZuw%3D%3D)
---

clean_body: Meet my friend who’s going to flip Michigan’s Senate seat| | | Friend, Mike Rogers is a fellow Army veteran, and I served with him in Congress for two years. Trust me, he’s the real deal. Mike chaired the House Intelligence Committee. He knows the threats our country faces, from the border to Communist China. And he has experience it’s going to take to make America strong again. Now, Mike is running in a race for the U.S. Senate in Michigan. The Democrats are going to do and spend whatever it takes to defeat him. I to let that happen. The party that’s won Michigan has won the Senate and the White House in the last elections — so we must win Michigan, we must flip this Senate seat, and we must elect Mike Rogers. In service, Tom Cotton Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: Five seats to secure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Just five seats represent the battle for the Senate Majority. Pitch in now to provide direct support to these critical races!
**Five Senate candidates need your help today, Fellow American.**

Tough conservatives are taking on sitting Democrats, and running for open seats, across the country. These are the races that will decide the Senate. More details:

_In West Virginia, Joe Manchin is NOT to run for re-election, and[**Gov. Jim Justice**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulK_jGcIiu05A4Z-xZfiw_rdi3Iaa7VBFgPT3rhMVKeuX3QhqEvYhR15MzxwJelAkKQL6t6TmeqkEh7aO5wcS-fs3OknERYRMBpiD30LqhOwXmNg3DMESDqKXpTucGHI0yJXN_nM4O4mxzl8a3HVajgAqlKmgE5eWCGTxJMVkU0BKI) can flip the seat.

In Montana, Democrat Jon Tester is up against [**Tim Sheehy**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulK5nJkpk9MJzSE-L2j-FgVbSd-ocPbAGScX-Z2UpwxVHCn88SvcGNhFjwf-cl9hW8h1ConsOFTK1097cwA1TNNoVshDVzsquqtZdPYTducyqsIUogRBnfvYBRWjuT9Gh1kXnGQ6da0nHQE5NNTFV7GLbFheUhlVcz_7oGG6GP3nCe), a tough conservative, and fellow veteran, who can win.

In Ohio, there are several strong GOP challengers running against [**Sherrod Brown**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulK69OTS-Z0FKT7K7Uf2kTj-nt7Mk03vwq7k2Qs7P5hk0u_DM3RwbujYRm62nKJbVyHJXQmERFSo_1RTlIl7zizAL9sfyUid6OXPeWybUtxFq6kKjspNzXgzzbWSJt2W-idjMP43-1L6NkpGiHJh-JidecF9qcjKcCQ0YN9Wy0cyb0). With an early investment, we can win this seat.

In Pennsylvania, another veteran, [**David McCormick**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulK7lron8NAMpt85A1QQj63eYD14-UrEZoqsyhC21VAerxSsm0eorle0CwK8uMJM2iSt4NANGqC0PEfE89tzJUZ_SiZijeek5v3vYKsrz4fKwombiq1PrupfQ1A5f8N-YbV7XSf-z4cAGBS85i1V0xFtdrBuh46P6eRwHnHg9RQXUh), is taking on Democrat Bob Casey. It’ll be as close as it gets.

And in Arizona, [**Kari Lake**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulKwZpNBPNMA2VCtsutfxMhBxOlMksfpOtm7nv77glaSfJqRuSS1e8ofoAvWKQgJIr-xcjm86O_5V-drUJdpq38R4Bu4KAYLc1lu2tT_1gC4jI1MVf2cGDnjy7_VclqQs5snQd-dRD39JUkO_YNKSEDV9ZabXtYYRQNQ4C4aw_L1ZF) can defeat Sen. Kyrsten Sinema and Democrat Reuben Gallago._
We can win all five of these elections — and we [**cannot**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulKzMbEb0fpkOzJnEMvQy0m624hebXtXsXJEz6gtvM_7RtK5RASSkmPvg_XXHq93XmtY6NCWBjwx5BMsGSRVYFj6BVi-kmdK6DKKpyJwXvGKFOujf4zDN3aobwIjfOWbeUNRD5AToP1uW41UzWzj6ci0V7y2Y8z6gF9L-xwPhUHi3P) risk losing even one of them.

I’m asking you to split a donation between [**all five**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulKzhk8BSOIefCqHg_zKxqakMd4QL3TLD5R7s-uQAo1-rbR54lv2xJtSmkSmrzKOnJVhkhArfb7Sbzs1CwR34p77q5yIiUU-q3iXyZT06nxO4-udQpUT5oCV_DWiircRhFQhj-OUFnwImfQtrx3NVCklAnyDOqfl78TJBQEcIYgDD8) of these races. It will immediately be used to invest in victory come November.

[**Pitch in $10, $15, $25, or even more.>>**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulKymWhUp0hiiD1_I2eRHQnJLfPKzZsZmaknSoclmMj9eWaVslPAkObGWc-KxM5iwBouOyPQGGjlgFEPFtXueBmiC_HPKJ4pDKbv6DQhJ9JGjvlvJk4twc128WpReLQWDG_dixNszVKIMReJN4JmxtiC_SPZ3e-ljy8nn2nJty86S8)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e37665f46e424c578352463c825c1c68&_e=7zis0ebv1ykZjXBEYfsBVF0uIlIVfpuHCi8DuCE_FRnWuOo49xW5BiPB7dk6eu4jNcx1D9z4GVe2hbz4lTNkH7hCrP7WetF7aa7whEnHVAC9MmbQR_FgqUtuIMnVCX27zlTD1T6l5D-y8xs5m9qfsl235iYx53ciozoKb4hAojx4Q6APQ8KT6DQEbFnbrYpX5SlG2KwijU8uo6MZYSsLMAt4aHLUkLG51eEOkl7Lfiw9kte1G-H1dvHLU0Glr4gXi4xJQCUrhmHmIQDRhCulKxUIEVRbDcmqNk1Bi4oi2a0WItTE9OyJzG3BbDJeazqCoMqev0fTig97Snpipy9NWoCSuAN4lFVZVeV0IYMfly-OxgYVaXuTh_JLGY_VRxmFHSNeQTJgqvw7E46qRpeSpOiPr51FFEUlOHg56mLBgotv1bHy67erhXADsZ8HZmOD)
As I’ve said before, if we lose in 2024, we’re done.

But if we take back the White House, keep the House, and flip the Senate, we’ll have a chance to make America strong again.
