clean_body: Just five seats represent the battle for the Senate Majority. Pitch in now to provide direct support to these critical races! Five Senate candidates need your help today, Fellow American. Tough conservatives are taking on sitting Democrats, and running for open seats, across the country. These are the races that will decide the Senate. More details: In West Virginia, Joe Manchin is NOT to run for re-election, and can flip the seat. In Montana, Democrat Jon Tester is up against , a tough conservative, and fellow veteran, who can win. In Ohio, there are several strong GOP challengers running against . With an early investment, we can win this seat. In Pennsylvania, another veteran, , is taking on Democrat Bob Casey. It’ll be as close as it gets. And in Arizona, can defeat Sen. Kyrsten Sinema and Democrat Reuben Gallago. We can win all five of these elections — and we risk losing even one of them. I’m asking you to split a donation between of these races. It will immediately be used to invest in victory come November. As I’ve said before, if we lose in 2024, we’re done. But if we take back the White House, keep the House, and flip the Senate, we’ll have a chance to make America strong again. We have a plan to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks. The first step is sending reinforcements to the Senate, and that’s why I need every tough conservative to split a donation between these key races ASAP. subject: I will never forget where I came from, Peter

body:
When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in community.

| Hi, it’s Ritchie. It’s been a while since I introduced myself to you, Peter.

[If you’ve been on Team Ritchie from day 1, you can click here to skip my story and support our grassroots movement »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76482417/447646337/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240104_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0ZTFmNy01YmFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9_mkEzOxa_hHJp3Pf3p3e3DndatkQxwuvsFGAixvvo=)

**_Here’s a little bit about me:_**

📍 I was born and raised in the Bronx.

🏠 Growing up with a single mom, public housing was a lifeline for my family — so I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for affordable housing and building social safety nets to eliminate poverty.

🏳️🌈 I’m the first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man in Congress. My lived experience as a gay Black man motivates me to fight _every day_ until we are fully equal in the eyes of the law.

👊🏽 I’m a tireless advocate for Social Security and Medicare. I believe proper health care cannot be limited to physical health, and I’ll continue to advocate tirelessly for access to mental health care.

**_And here’s why my story matters for you:_**

When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in _community._

From fighting for affordable housing to community initiatives to Medicare and more, I know this grassroots movement is capable of _changing the game_ for the Bronx.

**I’ve got your back, Peter, and I’m hoping you’ve got mine:[Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, to help me continue fighting for you? We’re aiming for 22 more donations from PA before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76482419/447646339/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240104_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0ZTFmNy01YmFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9_mkEzOxa_hHJp3Pf3p3e3DndatkQxwuvsFGAixvvo=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76482428/447646350/-866719404?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20240104_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0ZTFmNy01YmFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9_mkEzOxa_hHJp3Pf3p3e3DndatkQxwuvsFGAixvvo=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m honored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I’m deeply grateful for your support as we start 2024 together.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1885%2E4032634%2EIyaELE)
---
In politics, no one gets anything done all by themselves — whether it’s creating the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, getting elected to the U.S. Senate, or making billionaires cry. And I’m deeply grateful that you’re on this team. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for everything you did to help grow our campaign in 2023. As we begin 2024, we’ve got plenty on our plates. I’m up for re-election, I’m keeping up the fight to root corruption out of Washington, and I’ll do everything I can to help re-elect President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris. This year’s elections will decide the future of our freedoms. The ability of our government to deliver results for working families. The strength — or survival — of our democracy. I’m staying in the fight to secure abortion rights nationwide, pass a wealth tax to fund opportunity for all of our kids, ensure universal child care, and put power in the hands of the people, not powerful special interests. And I’m honored to fight by your side. When we organize, hold those in power accountable, and fight righteous fights, we can continue to make positive change. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---
